hiku2100.7: {TIME:00}The Al Bhed have left riddles in 1000{\n}year old ruins, scattered across Spira.{\n}Decipher them to learn the passwords.

swin0700.0: Bickson{\n}Yo, mister star player from Zanarkand!{\n}Take it easy on us today.
swin0700.1: Graav{\n}Let’s see them moves you’ve learned{\n}in those ruins then!
swin0700.4: Doram{\n}Hey, that boy in{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} is a cutie.
swin0700.5: Doram{\n}Now, what should we play next?
swin0700.6: Balgerda{\n}My, you’re kinda cute, too.{\n}Wanna have some fun?
swin0700.7: Balgerda{\n}What? You want to hang out with us?{PAUSE}Balgerda{\n}Hmm... Maybe later.
swin0700.8: Datto{\n}Tournament’s coming up real soon.{\n}I wish we had more time to practice, ya?
swin0700.9: Letty{\n}Why do we have to be on the same{\n}ship as those {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}ns anyway?
swin0700.11: Keepa{\n}Urgh...{\n}Why do I feel like I’m being watched?
swin0700.13: Botta{\n}Those herbs I bought in {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} for{\n}seasickness are working great, ya?

bvyt0600.0: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Get me outta here!{\n}I want out now!
bvyt0600.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}everything in Spira seems to{\n}revolve around people dying?
bvyt0600.12: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Summoners challenge the bringer{\n}of death, {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and die doing so.
bvyt0600.13: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Guardians give their lives{\n}to protect their summoner.
bvyt0600.14: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}The {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} are the souls of the dead.{\n}Even the maesters of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} are unsent.
bvyt0600.16: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Only {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is reborn,{\n}and then only to bring more death.
bvyt0600.17: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It is a cycle of death,{\n}spiraling endlessly.
bvyt0600.20: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Really, now, what person{\n}would execute a dear friend?

klyt0500.58: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
klyt0500.60: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
klyt0500.16: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I think {PC:04:WAKKA} needs to{\n}do a little more praying.
klyt0500.22: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}And all these people are your{\n}guardians? My, what a rabble!
klyt0500.23: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}As I recall, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}had only two guardians.
klyt0500.24: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Quality over quantity, my dear.{\n}Whatever were you thinking?
klyt0500.25: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}I have need of only one guardian.{\n}Right, {MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}?
klyt0500.26: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I only have as many guardians{\n}as there are people I can trust.
klyt0500.27: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I trust them all with my life!
klyt0500.28: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}To have so many guardians{\n}is a joy, and an honor!
klyt0500.29: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Even more so than{\n}being my father’s daughter.
klyt0500.30: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Of course, I would never think{\n}of questioning your ways, either.
klyt0500.31: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}So, Lady {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}, I ask of you:{\n}please leave us in peace.
klyt0500.32: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}You do what you want.{\n}{MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}, we’re leaving.
klyt0500.34: {\n}A guardian is someone a summoner can rely on.{\n}Someone she can trust with her life.
klyt0500.35: {\n}I wondered, did {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}feel that way about me?
klyt0500.37: {\n}Yeah! Once we win the tournament,{\n}this will be my victory pose!
klyt0500.38: {\n}Yeah! Teamwork and trust are key elements{\n}for both guardians and blitzers!
klyt0500.39: {\n}Yeah! Once we win the tournament{\n}next year, this will be my victory pose!
klyt0500.40: {\n}Yeah! When the ship comes flying by,{\n}I’m going to cheer it on like this!
klyt0500.41: {\n}Yeah! When the Calm comes,{\n}this is how I’m going to celebrate!
klyt0500.43: {\n}Are you a blitzer? Or a guardian?{\n}Don’t tell me you’re both!
klyt0500.44: {\n}He should stop wasting his time with all those{\n}poses, and devote more time to praying.
klyt0500.46: {\n}I wonder what the summoners{\n}fighting {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} are like?
klyt0500.50: {\n}The responsibility lies with the monks.{\n}We could not ease the people’s anxieties.
klyt0500.52: {\n}If the temples cannot provide the people{\n}with hope, then what purpose do they serve?

ssbt0100.3: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Everyone look sharp!{\n}Time to hit the other side!
ssbt0100.6: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Dang it! All right, back inside!{\n}Time for another plan!
ssbt0100.8: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Every blitzer knows: when you got{\n}the ball, you gotta score!
ssbt0100.11: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}A day with you is never dull!

luca0600.4: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin sure is{\n}taking its time wearing off.
luca0600.5: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Anyway, I knew you’d find{\n}someone you knew here.
luca0600.7: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You’re a real guardian now,{\n}so no mistakes. Understood?
luca0600.10: {\n}Their owner’s a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}{\n}and he hasn’t returned yet...
luca0600.18: {\n}I am well aware of the risks of this{\n}mission. But we cannot simply run away.
luca0600.20: {\n}Well, if they really can wipe out {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}I guess it’s worth a little confusion.
luca0600.22: {\n}I hope the surviving {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}rest well and recover quickly.
luca0600.26: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Whatcha doing here?{\n}The tournament’s about to start!
luca0600.28: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Well, you’re looking in the wrong place.{\n}There aren’t many people here.
luca0600.29: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Everyone’s either at the stadium{\n}or watching the game on the sphere.
luca0600.32: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}We’d like to, but we’re{\n}waiting for some couriers.
luca0600.34: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Wanna ditch the courier{\n}and go watch the game?
luca0600.35: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}But...but we’re still on duty.{\n}What about the mission, sir?
luca0600.38: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}We might be a little late, {\n}but we will go watch you play.
luca0600.39: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}You’d better be winning{\n}when we get there.
luca0600.43: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Sorry for making you wait, {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}I had some promises to keep, ya?
luca0600.47: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Hey, it’s good to be back, ya?
luca0600.53: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Do you think he’ll find{\n}a way back to {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}?
luca0600.54: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}In any case,{\n}I’ll miss having him around.
luca0600.55: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}He’s still in town, isn’t he?{\n}I think I’ll go see him...
luca0600.61: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I wish to become your guardian.{\n}Do you accept?
luca0600.71: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Thank you, Sir {PC:02:AURON}!{\n}You’re welcome to join us!
luca0600.76: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Can’t say. Haven’t{\n}seen him in ten years.
luca0600.91: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I really don’t think{\n}that’s gonna help this time.
luca0600.94: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But summoners and their guardians{\n}are kind of like {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s ray of light.
luca0600.95: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}A lot of people in{\n}Spira depend on us.
luca0600.96: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I learned to practice smiling{\n}when I’m feeling sad, you know?
luca0600.114: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I want my journey to{\n}be full of laughter.
luca0600.116: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If we should get separated, just whistle.
luca0600.124: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Right, now let’s see what you can do!
luca0600.133: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We were just worried{\n}you guys might’ve gone crazy!
luca0600.136: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Now, we will go to{\n}the temple at {CLR:BLUE}Djose{CLR:WHITE}.
luca0600.139: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We don’t know where{\n}the fiends came from.
luca0600.140: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"} is safe and sound,{\n}thanks to Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.

znkd0300.9: Fayth{\n}We’ve been dreaming so long...{\n}we’re tired.
znkd0300.10: Fayth{\n}Would you and your father...{\n}Would you let us rest?
znkd0300.12: Fayth{\n}Both you and your father{\n}have been touched by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
znkd0300.13: Fayth{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, the one around whom all{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}--the spiral--revolves.
znkd0300.14: Fayth{\n}You two are more{\n}than just dreams now.
znkd0300.17: Fayth{\n}Just a little more, and maybe...
znkd0300.18: Fayth{\n}Maybe you are the dream{\n}that will end our dreaming at last.

genk0600.2: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Would you like to hear a bit{\n}about the wondrous shoopuf?
genk0600.4: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Perhaps you’d like to hear{\n}a bit about the Hypello, hmm?
genk0600.7: {\n}Aww, leaving already?{\n}Well, come back again, you hear?
genk0600.9: {\n}Careful where you shop.{\n}This area is full of cunning merchants.
genk0600.12: {\n}With all the traitors and {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} around,{\n}not many travelers pass through here anymore.
genk0600.13: {\n}The merchants are suffering{\n}with so few customers.
genk0600.14: {\n}They say {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} landed in {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.{\n}It’s better to stay away from the north.
genk0600.17: {\n}My plans are ruined.{\n}Now what am I supposed to do?
genk0600.19: {\n}I want to quit the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}and settle down in the country.
genk0600.21: {\n}By the time we get home, they’ll{\n}be celebrating their marriage.
genk0600.22: {\n}Welcome! You seem to{\n}have fine taste, sir!
genk0600.23: {\n}Listen, buy from me and you won’t{\n}have any problems down the line.
genk0600.24: {\n}Well, hello there.{\n}Are you in luck today!
genk0600.25: {\n}If you buy something now, I’ll give you{\n}a big discount! Well, what do you say?
genk0600.26: Driver{\n}Noo, I don shink sho.{\n}Ish bad idea, yesh.
genk0600.30: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}This guy won’t let{\n}our chocobo on the shoopuf!
genk0600.36: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}It is no good.{\n}We will have to find another way.
genk0600.37: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}We will find a ford{\n}where we can cross on foot.
genk0600.40: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Where there’s a will, there’s a way.
genk0600.43: {\n}Where there’s a will, there’s a way.
genk0600.49: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Some things little boys{\n}never grow out of!
genk0600.51: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The merchants here are wily.{\n}Pick your shop well.
genk0600.53: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}There are many things{\n}we do not know about the shoopuf.
genk0600.54: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}For example, what does it eat?{\n}It eats nothing!
genk0600.55: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The water it sucks through its shnoz{\n}somehow supports its considerable size.
genk0600.57: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
genk0600.58: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}These shoopuf handlers belong to a race{\n}of water-dwellers known as the Hypello.
genk0600.59: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They may be slow on land, but in{\n}the water they’re quick as silvery fish!
genk0600.61: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}But their lackadaisical disposition{\n}draws them to less strenuous pastimes.
genk0600.62: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
genk0600.63: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}I believe I’ve said{\n}all there is to say.
genk0600.69: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
genk0600.71: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

ptkl1400.20: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
ptkl1400.22: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
ptkl1400.3: {\n}You should save your records{\n}onto the Save Sphere.
ptkl1400.8: {\n}This is my home, and no matter{\n}how bad it gets, I ain’t movin’.
ptkl1400.10: {\n}I ain’t leaving my home.{\n}Nope. Never, I tell you.
ptkl1400.13: {\n}I’m gonna be a blitzball{\n}when I grow up!
ptkl1400.14: {\n}When I grow up, I’m gonna{\n}ride the flying ship!

mihn0800.1: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Hey, we saw the game!{\n}You guys were great!
mihn0800.6: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}This mission requires our full attention.{\n}We’ve no time to waste!
mihn0800.10: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}See? Keep your head down,{\n}say ”sir” a lot, and you’ll do fine.
mihn0800.14: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}we still believe in you.{\n}That won’t ever change.
mihn0800.16: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But, you know... It’s not too late{\n}for you to go back to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}, and...
mihn0800.26: {\n}My name is {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}.{\n}I am a disciple of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
mihn0800.28: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You mean the one {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} and{\n}{MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} were talking about?
mihn0800.29: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I heard they were to use forbidden{\n}machina! I had to stop them.
mihn0800.31: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The use of machina is strictly{\n}forbidden by the {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} priesthood.
mihn0800.36: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}The teachings of Yevon must be upheld!
mihn0800.38: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}But you don’t understand!{\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s won’t even listen to me.
mihn0800.39: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}And it’s all because{\n}I’m just a lowly acolyte.
mihn0800.41: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Well, I haven’t been a summoner{\n}for very long myself, you see.
mihn0800.42: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Still, I can’t put myself{\n}down every time I fail.
mihn0800.43: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}People are depending on me.{\n}They’re depending on both of us!
mihn0800.44: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Yes! Yes, you’re right,{\n}my lady. Absolutely right!
mihn0800.46: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Now I feel I have the courage{\n}to finish my training.
mihn0800.47: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I will do my best to get myself{\n}appointed to a temple, as a nun.
mihn0800.48: {\n}Here, take this. Just don’t tell{\n}anybody that I was trembling.
mihn0800.49: {\n}There are lots of fiends, so stay sharp.{\n}Use this when the going gets tough.
mihn0800.50: {\n}Providing is preventing.{\n}Need I say more? This’ll help.
mihn0800.51: {\n}Here’s a little something to{\n}cheer you up before the big fight.
mihn0800.52: {\n}I stocked up on too many.{\n}Please take some, if you like.
mihn0800.54: {\n}I’m not scared. Don’t get me wrong.{\n}I’m just trembling with fury!
mihn0800.56: {\n}It’s not good once those guys get going.
mihn0800.59: {\n}They say luck decides the{\n}battle, but we can’t afford to lose.
mihn0800.60: {\n}I’m gonna vanquish {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} and{\n}return home a hero.
mihn0800.62: {\n}No doubt we’re gonna win. And just in{\n}case, we have an ace up our sleeves, too.
mihn0800.64: {\n}{MCR:s06l36:"High Summoner Yocun"}, who slew {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}started as a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}.
mihn0800.65: {\n}If I fight as valiantly as Lady {MCR:s06l35:"Yocun"},{\n}will I too receive {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s blessing?
mihn0800.67: {\n}I suppose only a summoner can defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.{\n}The teachings are right after all.
mihn0800.72: {\n}Cruel punishment for defying the{\n}teachings... Too cruel, I’d say.
mihn0800.73: {\n}I thought about joining the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s, but{\n}maybe I should join the warrior monks instead.
mihn0800.75: {\n}All we can do is trust the summoners.{\n}I feel so helpless.
mihn0800.76: {\n}Our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} was blown to smithereens.{\n}I am trying not to think about it.
mihn0800.79: {\n}You look awful depressed,{\n}and it’s such a beautiful day.
mihn0800.81: {\n}There are some things that can’t be helped.
mihn0800.84: {\n}Sorry. I don’t feel like talking anymore.
mihn0800.88: {\n}We should focus on what we can do{\n}and not dwell on what we couldn’t do.
mihn0800.90: {\n}I sang aloud to release all of my anxiety.{PAUSE}{\n}I was so desperate at the time.
mihn0800.91: {\n}I’m gonna sing whenever I see the{\n}flying ship; I can’t help but sing.
mihn0800.92: {\n}That flying ship will bring about the Calm.
mihn0800.93: {\n}Even for a moment, a fleeting Calm,{\n}I want to feel peace from my heart.
mihn0800.94: {\n}I’m going to live to see the day{\n}the Calm dawns on us.
mihn0800.95: {\n}Fiends often appear here, but{\n}people pass through here, regardless.
mihn0800.98: {\n}I wush walking and ended up here.{\n}Where am I? What plashe ish thish?

lchb0601.1: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} may have lost{\n}the game, but what a way to go!
lchb0601.7: {\n}This looks like history{\n}in the making, Bobba.
