mimm0200.3: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I told you this was a waste of time.
mimm0200.5: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}It’s the right thing to do!{\n}Everyone’s depending on us.

mtgz0300.5: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Someone is drawing{\n}energy from all of them!
mtgz0300.7: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Who wields power on this scale,{\n}and what could they be calling?
mtgz0300.8: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Hey, you know something, don’t you?{\n}Spill the beans!
mtgz0300.9: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Look not to others for knowledge.{\n}This is your journey, too.
mtgz0300.23: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Nothing like a good nap!{\n}Well, I’m ready. Let’s go!

lchb1200.0: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Set Music Sphere.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Set Movie Sphere.{\n}{CHOICE:02}Return to the {CLR:BLUE}reception desk{CLR:WHITE}.
lchb1200.26: M09 : Out Of The Frying Pan
lchb1200.207: {\n}I’ve done it.{\n}I have become a summoner!
lchb1200.209: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But no matter what he{\n}looks like, he isn’t {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}.
lchb1200.210: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You shouldn’t have brought{\n}him here in the first place!
lchb1200.215: {\n}Ladies and gentlemen, the day{\n}we’ve all been waiting for!
lchb1200.218: {\n}And this year we celebrate{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"}’s 50th year in office.
lchb1200.222: {\n}Thought I was done for, back there.
lchb1200.225: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Correct. {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}...{\n}as it looked one thousand years ago.
lchb1200.233: {\n}A city dead for a thousand years.
lchb1200.234: {\n}A city I had{\n}to see with my own eyes.
lchb1200.246: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Everyone here has lost{\n}homes, dreams, and friends.
lchb1200.251: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Now we can make new homes{\n}for ourselves, and new dreams.
lchb1200.252: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Although I know the journey{\n}will be hard, we have lots of time.
lchb1200.254: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The road is ahead of us,{\n}so let’s start out today.
lchb1200.256: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The people and the friends we have lost,{\n}or the dreams that have faded...

sins0300.18: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}But even after I am gone,{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s sorrow will prevail.
sins0300.3: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}I am part of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}I am one with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, forever.
sins0300.6: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}I will learn to control it, from within.{\n}I have all the time in the world.
sins0300.7: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Since you were gracious enough{\n}to dispose of {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}...
sins0300.8: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}the only means of destroying{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is forever gone.
sins0300.12: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}You should thank me.{\n}Your death means your father’s life!
sins0300.16: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}So it is you, after all,{\n}who will send me.

bsil0400.1: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}, of the {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} tribe.{\n}He’s learned the fiends’ way of fighting.
bsil0400.7: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Sometimes we don’t understand him either.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} doesn’t talk much anyway.
bsil0400.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But he has protected{\n}me since I was a child!
bsil0400.14: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bsil0400.16: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

mcyt0200.40: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}What has happened?{\n}Is there anything I can do?
mcyt0200.41: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Well... We have much to{\n}do before the ceremony.
mcyt0200.42: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}We are all going to be very busy.
mcyt0200.44: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}, rest his soul,{\n}would be pleased. I’m sure of it.
mcyt0200.45: {\n}Entry is not permitted. Lady {PC:01:YUNA} is{\n}on her way to the Cloister of Trials.
mcyt0200.49: {\n}The temple cannot operate much{\n}longer without a high priest.
mcyt0200.50: {\n}Why would the lady{\n}have such a thing?
mcyt0200.52: {\n}There are times when I think about{\n}quitting the clergy and going home.
mcyt0200.55: {\n}Hmph, the {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} will probably{\n}be singled out next. Just you watch.
mcyt0200.57: {\n}Listen to our magnificent music!{\n}We’ll have a ball!
mcyt0200.58: {\n}Let us add joy to the wedding{\n}by contributing our song!
mcyt0200.61: {\n}We’d better start the wedding{\n}before I get too sleepy.
mcyt0200.67: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mcyt0200.69: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mcyt0200.4: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I couldn’t be happier...{\n}even if it was my own wedding.
mcyt0200.5: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Now, victims of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will have{\n}something to be joyful about.
mcyt0200.12: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}she’s gone to the Cloister of{\n}Trials with Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.
mcyt0200.14: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Thanks to you, I was able to{\n}bring Lady {PC:01:YUNA} here safely.
mcyt0200.16: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}It...it isn’t much,{\n}but I want you to have this.
mcyt0200.25: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}No need, I already know{\n}what I’ll tell the other maesters.
mcyt0200.29: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Let you go? Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} would{\n}never forgive us if we did.
mcyt0200.31: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}’s sphere!{\n}We can show it to them!

bvyt0500.0: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}conspired with the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"},{\n}and joined in their insurrection.
bvyt0500.1: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}These are traitorous and unforgivable{\n}crimes that disturb the order of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
bvyt0500.2: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Tell this court what possessed{\n}you to participate in such violence.
bvyt0500.3: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Their battles, their sacrifices--{\n}were they all in vain?
bvyt0500.4: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}There is nothing futile in the life{\n}and death of a summoner.
bvyt0500.5: {\n}The High Court of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}is now in session.
bvyt0500.7: {\n}To those on trial: believe in{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, and speak only the truth.
bvyt0500.10: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}You have sworn to protect{\n}the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, true?
bvyt0500.16: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}He killed his father, {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"},{\n}with his own hands!
bvyt0500.21: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}It is a summoner’s sacred duty to send{\n}the souls of the departed to the Farplane!
bvyt0500.22: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} was only doing{\n}her job as a summoner!
bvyt0500.29: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}You would have to send me, too.
bvyt0500.31: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Grand {MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"} is a wise leader.{\n}Even in death, he is invaluable to Spira.
bvyt0500.32: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Enlightened rule by the dead is preferable{\n}to the misguided failures of the living.
bvyt0500.33: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Life is but a passing dream, but{\n}the death that follows is eternal.
bvyt0500.34: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Men die. Beasts die. Trees die.{\n}Even continents perish.
bvyt0500.35: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Only the power of death{\n}truly commands in Spira.
bvyt0500.38: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I am a summoner, my lord,{\n}like my father before me!
bvyt0500.39: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I am on a pilgrimage to stop{\n}the death that {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} brings.
bvyt0500.40: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Are you... Are you telling{\n}me that, too, is futile?
bvyt0500.44: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}No matter how many summoners give{\n}their lives, {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} cannot be truly defeated.
bvyt0500.46: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Yet the courage of those who{\n}fight gives the people hope.
bvyt0500.51: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} is embodied by eternal,{\n}unchanging continuity, summoner.
bvyt0500.53: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Those who question these truths--{\n}they are traitors!
bvyt0500.61: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}She may be of some{\n}use to us alive.
bvyt0500.66: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}No one thrown into the Via{\n}Purifico has ever survived.
bvyt0500.67: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Yet there is always a small{\n}chance that they might.
bvyt0500.68: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Place guards at the exit.{\n}Kill any who emerge.
bvyt0500.71: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Allow me to do this{\n}because she is my bride.
bvyt0500.74: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Would you trust a man{\n}who murdered his father?
bvyt0500.76: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Why are you here?{\n}You must go and defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, quickly!
bvyt0500.77: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}You have obtained the Final Aeon{\n}from {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}, have you not?
bvyt0500.82: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}You have profaned and subverted{\n}a thousand-year-old tradition?
bvyt0500.83: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Fools! Infants!{\n}Do you realize what you’ve done?
bvyt0500.84: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}You’ve taken away the only{\n}means of calming {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
bvyt0500.85: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, maybe that’s not the only way!{\n}We think we’ve got another.
bvyt0500.89: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Spira has lost its only hope.{\n}Destruction is inevitable.
bvyt0500.90: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Yu Yevon’s spiral of{\n}death will consume us all.
bvyt0500.96: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}He who crafts the souls of{\n}the dead into unholy armor.
bvyt0500.98: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Clad in it, Yu Yevon is invincible.
bvyt0500.99: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}And the only thing that could have{\n}pierced that armor, you have destroyed!
bvyt0500.101: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Disappear on us, will ya?{\n}Rotten son of a shoopuf!
bvyt0500.104: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He’s not here yet.{\n}How long must we wait?
bvyt0500.105: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}That’s odd... I’ll go{\n}look for His Grace.

ptkl1300.0: Datto{\n}Hey! You awake?{\n}Cap’n {PC:04:WAKKA}’s waitin’ for you!
ptkl1300.7: {\n}It’s not just {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}. All of{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} has been ravaged by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
ptkl1300.10: {\n}Everything is in shambles.{\n}I don’t know where to start.
ptkl1300.13: {\n}I’m sure my grandchildren made it{\n}to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"} in peace.

mcfr0500.8: {\n}Hey, did you not hear me the{\n}first time!? Get outta here, kid!
mcfr0500.3: {\n}The road to {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} is closed.{\n}None may pass.
mcfr0500.5: {\n}I guess I’ll have to keep watch{\n}until I receive new orders.

scene6.0: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}It was a voice from the past.{\n}...No, it was a voice that’s never left me.{CMD:0E:11}
scene6.2: Wakka{\n}What’s he doing? {\n}I mean, is that really him?
scene6.3: Wakka{\n}Is that...? Is he...? What’s going on?
scene6.5: Rikku{\n}But you wanna find out, don’t cha?
scene6.11: Rikku{\n}I know! Kimahri found the sphere--{\n}let’s go talk to him!
scene6.13: Wakka{\n}Can’t you wait until{\n}we find out a little more first?
scene6.14: Rikku{\n}And just who’s supposed to{\n}do the finding out?
scene6.16: Yaibal{\n}I’m sure Meyvn Nooj will agree to help. {\n}In fact, I’ve volunteered to ask him myself!
scene6.19: Rikku{\n}Well... Look, I really want Yuna to go.
scene6.23: Rikku{\n}Oh yeah? Well, what about what she wants?
scene6.25: Wakka{\n}Okay, maybe once things{\n}calm down, y’know?
scene6.26: Rikku{\n}And what if they don’t, Wakka?{\n}What then, huh?
scene6.27: Rikku{\n}I don’t believe it.{\n}After everything Yuna did for us!
scene6.28: Rikku{\n}Why can’t she just do{\n}what she wants to do now? Why?
scene6.29: Rikku{\n}Y’know, every time I visited here, I wondered:
scene6.30: Rikku{\n}why is it that when everyone’s{\n}out making their dreams happen...
scene6.31: Rikku{\n}and everyone’s getting their chance,{\n}Yuna’s dreams are on hold?
scene6.33: Rikku{\n}What do you know anyway, tubby?
scene6.38: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}if I leave, I’ll be{\n}disappointing everyone else.{CMD:0E:11}
scene6.40: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}What’s the point of pretending{\n}to be all grown-up...{CMD:0E:11}
scene6.41: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}if it means the things I want{\n}to say never get said?{CMD:0E:11}
scene6.45: Yuna{\n}I know it’s selfish,{\n}but this is my story.
scene6.47: Rikku{\n}I knew you’d say that, so I brought{\n}something just for the occasion!
scene6.50: Rikku{\n}You need a new look. You are a celebrity,{\n}so incognito’s the way to go!
scene6.51: Wakka{\n}Wait, you two!{\n}Uhh... I’ll go get Lu!
scene6.53: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}a slightly chubby Wakka,{\n}and my 2 minutes, 41 seconds.{CMD:0E:11}
scene6.57: Yuna{\n}Rikku, let’s leave!{\n}Let’s leave right now!

ssbt0000.1: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Hey, I saw somethin’ shine{\n}at the base of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s arm!

scene5.0: {\n}No, I’m not sorry!{\n}I haven’t done anything wrong!
scene5.3: {\n}What would you do if you were me?
scene5.4: {\n}Let me out!{PAUSE}{\n}I want to see her!

scene4.2: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}It’s tiring work, but you wouldn’t{\n}know it from looking at her.{CMD:0E:11}
scene4.4: Rikku{\n}Love sure got a handle on you!
scene4.6: Wakka{\n}Back in the village. Go say hi, ya?
scene4.8: Rikku{\n}And Yuna, you...{\n}seem the same as always.
scene4.10: Wakka{\n}Is Kimahri still on Mt. Gagazet?
scene4.11: Rikku{\n}Yeah, he’s been up there teaching{\n}the orphaned Ronso all kinds of stuff.
scene4.12: Rikku{\n}He’s like this big guru now.
scene4.14: Rikku{\n}Here we go. Kimahri found it up on the mountain.

scene3.31: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
scene3.33: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
scene3.2: Wakka{\n}No, no... Just wanted to chat, ya?
scene3.3: Wakka{\n}It’s just... The old folks in the village,{\n}they’d like to see you get...y’know...
scene3.4: Yuna{\n}And who is it this time?
scene3.5: Wakka{\n}Well, they’re saying it’s the son of{\n}the Chairman of New Yevon, ya?
scene3.7: Yuna{\n}He would only use me, after all.
scene3.10: Yuna{\n}Don’t worry. I’ll go tell them myself.
scene3.11: Wakka{\n}No, no, you leave that to me, ya?
scene3.12: Wakka{\n}You really don’t want to see them{\n}anyway. You know how they get.
scene3.17: {\n}I bring a message for you{\n}from our leader, Meyvn Nooj.
scene3.18: Wakka{\n}She’s not interested in joining, ya?
scene3.22: Yuna{\n}I’m sorry, but I will not{\n}be joining any group.
scene3.23: Yaibal{\n}Perhaps the lady will start{\n}a group of her own?

scene2.2: Yuna{\n}That’s very kind of you to say.
scene2.3: Tasgio{\n}The reason I’ve come here today is{\n}to talk to you about my grandson.
scene2.4: Tasgio{\n}He’s joined the Youth League, you see.
scene2.8: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}In the last two years, new groups{\n}have been springing up all over.{CMD:0E:11}
scene2.10: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}And they’re all racing to find{\n}their own way to do it.{CMD:0E:11}
scene2.14: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}I just have to tell myself that for now, {\n}I’m doing the right thing.{CMD:0E:11}

scene1.27: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
scene1.29: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
scene1.6: Wakka{\n}You’re diving like a real pro, ya?
scene1.7: Yuna{\n}You’ll always be the pro, Wakka.
scene1.8: Wakka{\n}I don’t know.{\n}It’s been so long since I trained!
scene1.9: Yuna{\n}You have gotten a little chubby!
scene1.11: Yuna{\n}And you’re not even{\n}the one having the baby!
scene1.14: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}I’ve learned how to hold my breath{\n}for more than two minutes now.{CMD:0E:11}
scene1.20: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}A slightly chubby Wakka,{\n}and my 2 minutes, 41 seconds.{CMD:0E:11}

bsyt0300.0: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsyt0300.1: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsyt0300.2: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsyt0300.3: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsyt0300.5: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsyt0300.8: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsyt0300.9: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsyt0300.10: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsyt0300.11: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsyt0300.12: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsyt0300.13: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsyt0300.16: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsyt0300.18: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsyt0300.19: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsyt0300.20: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsyt0300.21: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsyt0300.22: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsyt0300.24: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsyt0300.25: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsyt0300.28: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsyt0300.29: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsyt0300.30: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsyt0300.31: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsyt0300.35: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsyt0300.36: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsyt0300.37: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsyt0300.38: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsyt0300.39: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsyt0300.40: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsyt0300.41: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsyt0300.42: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsyt0300.43: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsyt0300.44: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsyt0300.46: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsyt0300.47: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsyt0300.48: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsyt0300.49: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsyt0300.50: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsyt0300.52: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsyt0300.53: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsyt0300.54: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsyt0300.56: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsyt0300.57: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsyt0300.58: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsyt0300.59: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsyt0300.66: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsyt0300.68: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsyt0300.71: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsyt0300.77: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsyt0300.78: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsyt0300.80: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsyt0300.84: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsyt0300.86: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsyt0300.87: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsyt0300.88: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsyt0300.91: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsyt0300.92: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsyt0300.94: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsyt0300.95: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsyt0300.96: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsyt0300.99: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsyt0300.100: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsyt0300.102: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsyt0300.103: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsyt0300.105: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsyt0300.107: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsyt0300.108: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsyt0300.109: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsyt0300.110: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsyt0300.111: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsyt0300.114: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsyt0300.115: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsyt0300.116: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsyt0300.117: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsyt0300.119: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsyt0300.120: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsyt0300.122: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsyt0300.123: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsyt0300.124: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsyt0300.125: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsyt0300.126: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsyt0300.127: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsyt0300.128: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsyt0300.129: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsyt0300.132: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsyt0300.133: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsyt0300.136: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsyt0300.137: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsyt0300.140: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsyt0300.141: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsyt0300.144: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsyt0300.153: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsyt0300.154: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsyt0300.156: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsyt0300.158: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsyt0300.159: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsyt0300.160: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsyt0300.161: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsyt0300.163: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsyt0300.165: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsyt0300.166: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsyt0300.167: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsyt0300.168: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsyt0300.170: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsyt0300.171: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsyt0300.172: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsyt0300.177: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsyt0300.178: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsyt0300.180: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsyt0300.182: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsyt0300.183: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsyt0300.184: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsyt0300.185: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsyt0300.186: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsyt0300.188: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsyt0300.189: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsyt0300.191: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsyt0300.192: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsyt0300.194: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsyt0300.196: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsyt0300.197: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsyt0300.198: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsyt0300.201: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsyt0300.204: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsyt0300.205: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsyt0300.206: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsyt0300.209: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsyt0300.212: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsyt0300.213: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsyt0300.215: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsyt0300.218: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsyt0300.220: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsyt0300.222: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsyt0300.225: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsyt0300.226: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsyt0300.228: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsyt0300.229: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsyt0300.230: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsyt0300.232: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsyt0300.233: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsyt0300.234: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsyt0300.237: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsyt0300.239: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsyt0300.240: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsyt0300.242: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsyt0300.243: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsyt0300.247: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsyt0300.249: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsyt0300.253: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsyt0300.255: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsyt0300.256: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsyt0300.257: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsyt0300.259: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsyt0300.261: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsyt0300.264: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsyt0300.265: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsyt0300.266: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsyt0300.269: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsyt0300.270: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsyt0300.271: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsyt0300.273: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsyt0300.275: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsyt0300.276: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsyt0300.277: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsyt0300.279: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsyt0300.281: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsyt0300.282: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsyt0300.284: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsyt0300.285: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsyt0300.286: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

guad0000.13: {\n}We have been expecting you, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}Welcome to {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"}.
guad0000.16: {\n}Oh, I beg your pardon.{\n}I am called {MCR:s06l11:"Tromell Guado"}.
guad0000.19: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Business with me?{\n}Whatever could it be, I wonder?
guad0000.26: {TIME:00}Now that {PC:06:RIKKU} has joined the party,{\n}you can {CLR:YELLOW}customize{CLR:WHITE} weapons and armor.{\n}Let’s take a look!
guad0000.27: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, the high summoner’s daughter.{\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}, the leader of the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}.
guad0000.28: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Married in the name of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"},{\n}overcoming the barriers of race.
guad0000.29: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}It would give {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} something{\n}cheery to talk about, for a change.
guad0000.30: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Sounds just like a passin’ daydream,{\n}like {PC:02:AURON} says.
guad0000.31: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Come on, let’s just{\n}get on with the pilgrimage!
guad0000.36: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}He sure picked a fine time{\n}to lay this one on us.
guad0000.41: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If I could do that for people...{\n}maybe I should do what I can.
guad0000.43: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But, I won’t answer till{\n}I know what’s right.
guad0000.45: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You could always just quit{\n}your pilgrimage and get married.
guad0000.52: {\n}I had to stop myself from shouting:
guad0000.55: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I’m going to see my father{\n}and think on this.
guad0000.57: {\n}I wondered why none of the others{\n}ever asked {PC:01:YUNA}.
guad0000.58: {\n}Do you love {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}?{\n}Do you even like him?
guad0000.64: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So, {PC:05:LULU}, what do you think{\n}about {PC:01:YUNA} getting married?
guad0000.65: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}As long as the pilgrimage{\n}continues, either way’s fine.
guad0000.67: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What if she doesn’t even{\n}like the guy? Is that okay?
guad0000.71: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and bring joy{\n}to the people of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
guad0000.72: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Get married, and bring joy{\n}to the people of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
guad0000.73: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}For {PC:01:YUNA}, they’re just{\n}two ways down the same road.
guad0000.75: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If you have that, you don’t need love.
guad0000.82: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}I don’t care.{\n}{CHOICE:01}I guess you’re right.{\n}{CHOICE:02}I’d rather have you, {PC:06:RIKKU}.
guad0000.84: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I think she should get married{\n}and stop being a summoner.
guad0000.89: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}In the end, she has to fight {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
guad0000.91: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}She would never marry{\n}someone who wanted her to quit.
guad0000.94: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Then, you could take her away{\n}and live a quiet life somewhere.
guad0000.106: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If she is to marry, I would{\n}want her to marry for love.
guad0000.109: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If {PC:01:YUNA} said she{\n}wanted to marry the one she loves,
guad0000.120: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I just don’t want to give it words.{\n}Not yet.
guad0000.121: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I shouldn’t have to say this,{\n}but don’t fall in love with her.
guad0000.126: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You must keep your feelings inside,{\n}until the pilgrimage is over.
guad0000.128: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I suppose I could add you to my list.
guad0000.129: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I wish you good luck, little boy.{\n}You’re going to need it.
guad0000.134: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Some people marry really{\n}young in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}, you know.
guad0000.138: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}One of them might{\n}get you, you know?
guad0000.139: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Lots of people marry the first person{\n}they fall in love with, just like that!
guad0000.146: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I wish I had some younger{\n}brothers and sisters, though...
guad0000.148: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Mom died...{\n}A machina went on a rampage...
guad0000.150: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}When I get married,{\n}I’m gonna have lots of kids!
guad0000.151: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}That way they’ll all{\n}have brothers and sisters!
guad0000.153: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You’re really thinking about your{\n}future, aren’t you? That’s great.
guad0000.156: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}For a while there, I was a little worried{\n}about what was gonna happen, ya?
guad0000.161: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}When we leave here, we have to go{\n}through the {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl28:"Thunder Plains"}{CLR:WHITE} next, you know.
guad0000.163: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We leave as soon as {PC:01:YUNA} returns.{\n}I trust you’ll be ready.
guad0000.172: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I believe he went{\n}to the temple in {CLR:BLUE}Macalania{CLR:WHITE}.
guad0000.173: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}is also the high priest of that temple.
guad0000.175: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Please, tell the lady {PC:01:YUNA} that{\n}I am doing just as she advised me!
guad0000.176: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I, too, will go to the temple{\n}in Macalania shortly.
guad0000.181: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Why would the lord maester{\n}head off without a peep to anyone?
guad0000.182: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Maybe he wasn’t expecting{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s answer so soon.
guad0000.189: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Why are you in {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"}?{\n}What business have you here?
guad0000.191: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}If it would please you{\n}to harm a defenseless old man...
guad0000.192: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}then burn me, boil me, it matters not.
guad0000.193: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} is gone.{\n}No lord rises to take his place.
guad0000.194: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}The {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} merely wait for{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} to come and finish us off.
guad0000.195: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Why should I care what you do to me?
guad0000.197: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}then your taking off my head{\n}would be the greatest kindness.
guad0000.198: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Come to kill the old man?{\n}I welcome it!
guad0000.199: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Or are you here to laugh?{\n}Laugh at the fallen {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}?
guad0000.200: {\n}A ferocious storm is ripping through{\n}the Thunder Plains. Please, remain inside.
guad0000.201: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} awaits at{\n}{MCR:s0Dl2D:"Macalania Temple"}. Please, make haste.
guad0000.203: {\n}It is to remain sealed until a new{\n}lord is chosen to lead the {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"}.
guad0000.208: {\n}Please, leave the matter of{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} to us {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}.
guad0000.209: {\n}We have no intention of fighting you,{\n}for we know that we cannot win.
guad0000.210: {\n}Many brave {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} have given their lives.{\n}Now, only a handful remain.
guad0000.212: {\n}People come to {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"} from every corner{\n}of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} to see their loved ones again.
guad0000.213: {\n}Why Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}?{\n}We gave him such a warm sending.
guad0000.214: {\n}This is most disturbing. We must{\n}inform Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} at once.
guad0000.219: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} embodies death’s sheer force.{\n}After all, no man can stop the inevitable.
guad0000.222: {\n}Once, a human child simply looked at me{\n}and then burst into tears. That hurt.
guad0000.224: {\n}One of my friends patrols the roads.{\n}If you meet him, please say hello for me!
guad0000.225: {\n}We lost so many in{\n}the recent struggles...
guad0000.226: {\n}My best friend walks the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.{\n}I...I can’t go on like this.
guad0000.227: {\n}I want to go to him...{\n}To see him on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
guad0000.230: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} came back!{\n}Don’t you find it intriguing?
guad0000.231: {\n}Maybe Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} knows why!{\n}After all, he is of Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}’s blood.
guad0000.232: {\n}Don’t you need to catch up{\n}with Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}?
guad0000.233: {\n}Must keep quiet about Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}.{\n}A grownup said so.
guad0000.236: {\n}Once everyone in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s dead,{\n}it’ll get real stuffy on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
guad0000.238: {\n}We {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} protect the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}{\n}so the dead can rest in peace.
guad0000.240: {\n}We {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"} will solve our own problems.{\n}Please understand.
guad0000.242: {\n}No {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"} has the strength{\n}to weave dark conspiracies anymore.
guad0000.243: {\n}Since embracing {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, we {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"}{\n}have learned the joy that is {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"}.
guad0000.244: {\n}I hope that the people of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}{\n}will find peace through {MCR:s06l67:"blitz"}ball.
guad0000.245: {\n}I want to congratulate Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} on his{\n}marriage by blitzing like nobody’s blitzed before.
guad0000.246: {\n}{MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"} is a natural stronghold.{\n}No fiends will find their way in here.
guad0000.248: {\n}I’m sorry.{\n}I cannot put it into words.
guad0000.249: {\n}It’s called endurance training.{\n}Stay out of my way.
guad0000.250: {\n}What do you want?{\n}I’ll face you in the sphere pool soon enough.
guad0000.252: {\n}First a tribe, then a temple, and now...a bride.{\n}Everything just falls into {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s lap.
guad0000.255: {\n}No one will lord over the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} but me!{\n}Mwahahaha.

genk0200.2: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}All right!{\n}We board soon as we’re ready, ya?

lchb0900.3: {\n}The monks have been looking stern lately.{\n}I wonder what’s gonna happen to the temple?
lchb0900.4: {\n}I asked a monk to buy me a sphere, but he{\n}said that we have no need for such luxuries.
lchb0900.5: {\n}I came to buy a sphere, but{\n}I don’t have enough money.
lchb0900.6: {\n}A fiend might be attracted to the music!{\n}Keep your eyes open and stay alert!
lchb0900.20: {\n}I quit the sailor’s life because I’m terrified{\n}of Sin. I’m too ashamed to face my shipmates.
lchb0900.21: {\n}Sin attacks unexpectedly.{\n}I’m through with life at sea.
lchb0900.22: {\n}I gave up the seafaring life.{\n}I’ve had enough of storms and shipwrecks.

zkrn0600.3: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{CMD:0E:10}Just give me a little more time!{CMD:0E:11}

dome0600.0: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Have you chosen the one{\n}to become your {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}?
dome0600.3: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Will {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} come back even should I{\n}use the Final Summoning to defeat it?
dome0600.5: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Every aeon that defeats it{\n}becomes {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} in its place...
dome0600.8: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is an inevitable part of{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s destiny. It is never-ending.
dome0600.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But...but...if we atone for our crimes,{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will stop coming back, ya?
dome0600.14: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The teachings state that we can{\n}exorcise {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} with complete atonement!
dome0600.15: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}It’s been our only{\n}hope all these years!
dome0600.17: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}It allows us to accept fate,{\n}however tragic it might be.
dome0600.20: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Where is the sense in all this?
dome0600.21: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} believed in {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s{\n}teachings and died for them!
dome0600.22: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} believed in {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}and gave his life for him!
dome0600.23: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}They chose to die...{\n}because they had hope.
dome0600.25: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Without hope, they would{\n}drown in their sorrow.
dome0600.27: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Who will be the one to{\n}renew {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s hope?
dome0600.30: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Your father sacrificed himself{\n}to give that hope to the people.
dome0600.32: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Sorrow cannot be abolished.{\n}It is meaningless to try.
dome0600.36: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}I will free you before you{\n}can drown in your sorrow.
dome0600.37: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}It is better for you to die in{\n}hope than to live in despair.
dome0600.41: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I can’t believe we’re gonna{\n}fight Lady {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}! Gimme a break!
dome0600.44: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}If I die, so does the Final Aeon.
dome0600.48: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Even if there was...{\n}Even if you did destroy {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}...
dome0600.49: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Yu Yevon the immortal{\n}would only create {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} anew.
dome0600.52: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} has been robbed of the light{\n}of hope... All that remains is sorrow.
dome0600.53: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I cannot believe what we just did.
dome0600.56: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t know how just yet.{\n}But I’ll find out.
dome0600.58: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I live for the people of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"},{\n}and would have gladly died for them.
dome0600.60: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}is a false tradition that{\n}should be thrown away.
dome0600.64: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Not just cover it up with lies!
dome0600.67: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I will live with my sorrow,{\n}I will live my own life!
dome0600.68: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I will defeat sorrow, in his place.
dome0600.69: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I will stand my ground and be strong.
dome0600.70: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I don’t know when it will be{\n}but someday, I will conquer it.
dome0600.71: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}And I will do it without...false hope.
dome0600.74: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Die and be free of pain{\n}or live and fight your sorrow!
dome0600.75: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Now is the time to shape your stories! {\n}Your fate is in your hands!
dome0600.77: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I’d never forgive myself--no way!{\n}Not if I ran away now.
dome0600.80: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}This is our story! Now let’s see{\n}this thing through together.
dome0600.82: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So it won’t come back,{\n}and without the Final Aeon.

znkd1000.20: {\n}Can I see you after the game?
znkd1000.7: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}That will mean it was for you, okay?
znkd1000.24: {\n}I’ve been a big fan of yours.{\n}From the very beginning!
znkd1000.29: {\n}Are you gonna show{\n}us that shot tonight?
znkd1000.38: {\n}You’re {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}’s son!{\n}I’d be crazy not to cheer for you!
znkd1000.42: {\n}I want to be a blitzer, too!
znkd1000.52: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, I got a game to play!

lchb0100.9: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Hey, lad. I appreciate yer offer,{\n}but ye ain’t got enough gil.
lchb0100.7: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Blimey, lad! Will ye actually{\n}lend me {VAR:02} gil?
lchb0100.25: {\n}The flying machina ship is{\n}such a spectacle to look at!
lchb0100.22: {\n}A ferry bound for {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} is anchored{\n}here at {CLR:BLUE}dock number 2{CLR:WHITE}.
lchb0100.23: {\n}Patrolling a large structure such{\n}as this would be next to impossible.
lchb0100.24: {\n}That is why we have a guard{\n}stationed at every dock.
lchb0100.40: {\n}I shang the Hymn.{\n}Sho now the Calm will come?
lchb0100.39: {\n}I wonderss what that ship ish?{\n}An anshient mashina?
lchb0100.33: {\n}Tournament over. {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} return to{\n}mountain to protect {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} holy land.
lchb0100.34: {\n}{MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is safe.{\n}{MCR:s06l30:"Maester Kelk Ronso"} is relieved.
lchb0100.42: {\n}Shum blitzer tried to recruit me,{\n}but I don’t want to practish ebulliday!
lchb0100.41: {\n}Thish ish a big ribber.{\n}You shink shoopuf can make it here okay?
lchb0100.35: {\n}We come all the way from {MCR:s0Dl3A:"Gagazet"}.{\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} will surely win!
lchb0100.36: {\n}The {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} are the strongest.{\n}They will not be defeated!
lchb0100.43: {\n}{MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"} is such a strange place.{\n}The {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} are walking around freely.
lchb0100.46: {\n}I ran out of {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} as fast as I could,{\n}so I didn’t pack any summer clothes.
lchb0100.51: {\n}Is it true that the temple is in chaos?{\n}I don’t believe that one bit!
lchb0100.49: {\n}Even though the sea is close by, I still{\n}miss being out on the vast ocean.
lchb0100.50: {\n}I feel a lot safer, now that the warrior{\n}monks are keeping a watchful eye on us.
lchb0100.30: {\n}I will not ride the {MCR:s06l58:"airship"}.{\n}I get airsick easily.
lchb0100.29: {\n}Many {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} lost their{\n}lives in the operation.
lchb0100.28: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} had nothing to do with that{\n}{MCR:s06l56:"fiend"} attack. That is the truth!
lchb0100.27: {\n}I do not know a thing!{\n}I swear to you!
lchb0100.12: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}The stores in the stadium are{\n}closed during the tournament.
lchb0100.16: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I guess it pays to ask!{\n}Thank ye kindly, lad!

maca0200.8: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}He’s gonna use an{\n}anti-magic field on us!
maca0200.13: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} is safe! We will{\n}guard her! She is safe!
maca0200.16: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I told him I was a guardian.
maca0200.25: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I can’t believe I’ve been traveling{\n}with an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}! A heathen!
maca0200.39: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You bad-mouth {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} and that’s{\n}all you can come up with?
maca0200.41: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}that doesn’t mean you should do{\n}whatever they say without thinking!
maca0200.45: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}There might be a way{\n}to stop it, you know!
maca0200.46: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be gone once we{\n}atone for our past mistakes!
maca0200.48: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}If we keep faith in {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s{\n}teachings it will be gone one day!
maca0200.53: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Wait... Sir {PC:02:AURON} isn’t{\n}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} too, is he?
maca0200.56: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I mean, getting angry just ’cause{\n}you found out {PC:06:RIKKU}’s an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}...
maca0200.57: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You guys got along fine{\n}till now, didn’t you?
maca0200.59: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well, I don’t claim to{\n}know that much about {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
maca0200.60: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And I probably know even less{\n}about the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}, but...
maca0200.64: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Just think of this as an opportunity{\n}to learn more about the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
maca0200.71: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You sure you{\n}know how to drive this?

klyt0000.24: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}We could throw a hundred {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}at it and still lose.
klyt0000.25: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Ochu poison is a surefire way{\n}to get to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}, and fast.
klyt0000.26: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}The fiend before us is{\n}Ochu, Lord of the Wood!
klyt0000.28: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Do your best, kid.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s counting on you.
klyt0000.32: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Hey, after the tournament,{\n}you should join the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
klyt0000.33: {\n}I can’t believe you defeated Ochu!{\n}Say, how would you like to join the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s?
klyt0000.34: {\n}Here’s a little something for your victory.
klyt0000.35: {\n}I’d steer clear of Ochu, Lord of the Wood.{\n}It’s a powerful fiend even we {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s avoid.
klyt0000.36: {\n}Are you heading for {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl14:"Kilika Temple"}{CLR:WHITE}?{\n}Then just follow this trail.
klyt0000.37: {\n}There are poisonous fiends in the forest.{\n}Be on your guard!
klyt0000.39: {\n}Are you okay? Don’t be so reckless!{\n}Sometimes it’s best to just go around it.
klyt0000.40: {\n}Fiends are everywhere.{\n}Never let your guard down.

klyt0000.4: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}He may be a {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} whiz kid,{\n}but up against fiends, he’s a newbie.
