mihn0300.1: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}This might be the last time{\n}we can rest like this.
mihn0300.3: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I’ve heard that the proprietor,{\n}Mr. {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}, is an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
mihn0300.4: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}But I was very relieved to find that{\n}he keeps nothing sacrilegious here.
mihn0300.8: {\n}I meant to say ”pardon me,”{\n}but it came out in {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
mihn0300.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well {CLR:OL_PURPLE}helly doo sad wee{CLR:WHITE} to you, too.
mihn0300.15: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} primers can be found{\n}all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
mihn0300.16: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Finding them and learning{\n}our language might be fun.
mihn0300.17: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Here, let me give you one in{\n}commemoration of our meeting.
mihn0300.18: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Although you might want to be careful{\n}where you speak our language.
mihn0300.19: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yeah, I hear {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} aren’t{\n}liked much. Oh, sorry!
mihn0300.23: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Thank you for your help.{\n}Please, use this.
mihn0300.26: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}We appreciate this thing you have done.
mihn0300.29: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}There are branches of my{\n}travel agency all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
mihn0300.32: {\n}There are so many things I want,{\n}I can’t decide what to get.
mihn0300.33: {\n}Say... Will you buy something for me?
mihn0300.37: {\n}Man, I’m beat. I woke{\n}up early for nothing.
mihn0300.39: {\n}Oh, you didn’t know? The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}have sealed off the Highroad.
mihn0300.40: {\n}Is it true? Th-There’s a fiend outside!?{\n}No way! I’m staying right here!
mihn0300.41: {\n}What are you standing around for?{\n}Go take care of it!
mihn0300.45: {\n}Do you wish to make a purchase?
mihn0300.47: {\n}That guy always keeps his promises.{\n}I’m not leaving here until he comes.
mihn0300.48: {\n}I know what happened to his friend,{\n}but I...I just can’t tell him.
mihn0300.79: {\n}There are various books.{\n}Many are written in {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
mihn0300.80: {\n}Weapons, armor, and food are sold here.{PAUSE}{\n}Purchase at the counter.

mcfr1400.5: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mcfr1400.7: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

bvmm0600.1: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}You are the one they call {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"},{\n}the man from {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, are you not?
bvmm0600.5: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}I’ve come to take you from this place.
bvmm0600.10: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}I would like you to join us.{\n}It will be a dangerous trip.
bvmm0600.12: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}my prayers will be answered, and{\n}you will be able to go home, we think.
bvmm0600.18: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}{PC:02:AURON}, tell the jailer{\n}to let this man free.
bvmm0600.20: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But I must protest...{\n}This drunkard a guardian?
bvmm0600.22: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}You want to step{\n}in here and say that?
bvmm0600.24: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}No one truly believes that I, a fallen{\n}summoner wed to an {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}...
bvmm0600.25: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}could possibly defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.{\n}This is what they say.
bvmm0600.31: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}What delightful irony it would{\n}be if we defeated {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
bvmm0600.32: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Stop gabbin’ and get me outta here!
bvmm0600.35: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}I am in your hands{\n}until we reach {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.

sins0600.5: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Hah! You got tall,{\n}but you’re all bones!
sins0600.20: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}You know what you have to do.
sins0600.22: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I... I can’t hear the{\n}Hymn so well anymore.
sins0600.26: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}When it starts,{\n}I won’t be myself anymore.
sins0600.27: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I won’t be able to hold myself back.
sins0600.34: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hit me with all you got, Dad!
sins0600.35: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}You’ll cry. You’re gonna cry.{\n}You always cry. See? You’re cryin’.
sins0600.38: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Right... We’ve got a job{\n}to do, don’t we?
sins0600.39: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Good. That’s right.{\n}You are my son, after all.
sins0600.55: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}This is the last time{\n}we fight together, okay?
sins0600.77: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Everyone here has lost{\n}homes, dreams, and friends.
sins0600.82: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Now we can make new homes{\n}for ourselves, and new dreams.
sins0600.83: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Although I know the journey{\n}will be hard, we have lots of time.
sins0600.85: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The road is ahead of us,{\n}so let’s start out today.
sins0600.87: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The people and the friends that we have{\n}lost, or the dreams that have faded...

bsvr0000.8: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} came to this village ten years{\n}ago, when the last {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"} started.
bsvr0000.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Since then, she’s been like{\n}a little sister to me and {PC:05:LULU}.
bsvr0000.11: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But she had the talent...{\n}She became an apprentice.
bsvr0000.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}This is our journey...{\n}We should leave together.
bsvr0000.14: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You really don’t need all that luggage.
bsvr0000.21: {\n}I knew all along you weren’t{\n}traitors. Please, go through.
bsvr0000.22: {\n}No one will try{\n}to stop you now.
bsvr0000.27: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsvr0000.28: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsvr0000.29: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0000.30: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsvr0000.32: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsvr0000.35: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsvr0000.36: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0000.37: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsvr0000.38: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsvr0000.39: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsvr0000.40: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsvr0000.43: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsvr0000.45: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsvr0000.46: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsvr0000.47: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsvr0000.48: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsvr0000.49: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsvr0000.51: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsvr0000.52: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsvr0000.55: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsvr0000.56: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsvr0000.57: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsvr0000.58: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsvr0000.62: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsvr0000.63: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsvr0000.64: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsvr0000.65: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsvr0000.66: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsvr0000.67: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsvr0000.68: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsvr0000.69: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsvr0000.70: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsvr0000.71: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsvr0000.73: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsvr0000.74: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsvr0000.75: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsvr0000.76: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsvr0000.77: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsvr0000.79: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsvr0000.80: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsvr0000.81: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsvr0000.83: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsvr0000.84: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsvr0000.85: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsvr0000.86: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsvr0000.93: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsvr0000.95: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsvr0000.98: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsvr0000.104: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsvr0000.105: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsvr0000.107: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsvr0000.111: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsvr0000.113: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsvr0000.114: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsvr0000.115: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsvr0000.118: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsvr0000.119: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsvr0000.121: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsvr0000.122: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsvr0000.123: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsvr0000.126: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsvr0000.127: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsvr0000.129: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsvr0000.130: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsvr0000.132: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsvr0000.134: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsvr0000.135: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsvr0000.136: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsvr0000.137: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsvr0000.138: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsvr0000.141: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsvr0000.142: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0000.143: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsvr0000.144: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsvr0000.146: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0000.147: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsvr0000.149: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsvr0000.150: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsvr0000.151: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsvr0000.152: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0000.153: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsvr0000.154: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsvr0000.155: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsvr0000.156: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsvr0000.159: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsvr0000.160: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsvr0000.163: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsvr0000.164: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsvr0000.167: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsvr0000.168: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsvr0000.171: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsvr0000.180: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsvr0000.181: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsvr0000.183: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsvr0000.185: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsvr0000.186: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsvr0000.187: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsvr0000.188: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsvr0000.190: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsvr0000.192: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsvr0000.193: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsvr0000.194: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsvr0000.195: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsvr0000.197: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsvr0000.198: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0000.199: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsvr0000.204: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsvr0000.205: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsvr0000.207: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsvr0000.209: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsvr0000.210: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsvr0000.211: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsvr0000.212: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsvr0000.213: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsvr0000.215: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsvr0000.216: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsvr0000.218: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsvr0000.219: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsvr0000.221: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsvr0000.223: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsvr0000.224: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsvr0000.225: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsvr0000.228: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsvr0000.231: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsvr0000.232: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsvr0000.233: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsvr0000.236: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsvr0000.239: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsvr0000.240: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsvr0000.242: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsvr0000.245: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsvr0000.247: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsvr0000.249: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsvr0000.252: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsvr0000.253: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsvr0000.255: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0000.256: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsvr0000.257: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsvr0000.259: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsvr0000.260: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsvr0000.261: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsvr0000.264: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0000.266: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsvr0000.267: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsvr0000.269: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsvr0000.270: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsvr0000.274: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsvr0000.276: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsvr0000.280: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsvr0000.282: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsvr0000.283: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsvr0000.284: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsvr0000.286: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsvr0000.288: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0000.291: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsvr0000.292: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsvr0000.293: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsvr0000.296: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsvr0000.297: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0000.298: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsvr0000.300: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsvr0000.302: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsvr0000.303: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsvr0000.304: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsvr0000.306: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsvr0000.308: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsvr0000.309: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsvr0000.311: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsvr0000.312: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsvr0000.313: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

kino0700.60: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}But the way it turned out,{\n}they deserved a better deal.
kino0700.78: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Please heal us.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Keep up the good work!
kino0700.84: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kino0700.86: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kino0700.0: {\n}I thought I sensed my old man there.
kino0700.2: {\n}Or maybe it was just {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s{\n}toxin playing tricks on my mind.
kino0700.6: {\n}When will she stop dancing?{\n}When will it stop?
kino0700.7: {\n}{PC:01:YUNA} won’t stop dancing--{\n}not until {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is gone.
kino0700.15: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} had come and gone,{\n}but I remained here.
kino0700.19: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Those who turned from {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}died, while the faithful live on.
kino0700.21: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}The past ten years have{\n}changed you, I see.
kino0700.24: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Anyone else would be expected{\n}to show their sorrow.
kino0700.26: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Until {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, you must{\n}not relent. Do you understand?
kino0700.32: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yeah, for a while there,{\n}I thought I could feel him.
kino0700.35: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So he killed all those people{\n}just for a chance to see me?
kino0700.37: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He wanted to show that to you.
kino0700.41: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}As long as he is {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}{MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} will keep killing.
kino0700.44: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}How do you know{\n}all of this, anyway?
kino0700.46: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’m not done talking to you!{\n}Don’t you run away!
kino0700.48: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You were in contact with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} again.{\n}The toxin--are you okay?
kino0700.50: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You should let her{\n}know you’re all right.
kino0700.55: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I guess...{\n}I guess I’ll just have to do better.
kino0700.59: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I made a bundle with{\n}the operation prices.
kino0700.61: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I guess the summoners{\n}are our only hope.
kino0700.68: {\n}My wounds are nothing compared{\n}to what the others suffered.
kino0700.69: {\n}It wasn’t supposed to end like this.
kino0700.72: {\n}How could they leave that crap{\n}in the middle of the Highroad!
kino0700.76: {\n}I wish they’d attend{\n}to our needs, too.

bsvr0001.6: {\n}I had never seen anything like it in my life.
bsvr0001.7: {\n}Sure, it was a little scary,{\n}but still...
bsvr0001.8: {\n}I could feel a strange kind of{\n}gentleness coming from it.
bsvr0001.10: {\n}That night, we talked for{\n}the first time.
bsvr0001.11: {\n}I didn’t know it then, but after{\n}that night, everything changed.

open0200.3: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}so I didn’t have to feel alone anymore.{CMD:0E:11}

bsvr0002.2: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We’ll get you something over there{\n}later. Take a look around first.
bsvr0002.4: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ Lodge is over yonder.{\n}{MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} are usually there.
bsvr0002.9: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}I don’t remember.{\n}{CHOICE:01}I don’t know any prayers.
bsvr0002.10: {\n}I didn’t know it in the first{\n}place, to tell the truth.
bsvr0002.11: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Man, that’s like the basics of the{\n}basics. Alright, I’ll show you.
bsvr0002.14: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Okay, now go present yourself{\n}to the temple summoner.
bsvr0002.17: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You...must have forgot or{\n}something. Here, I’ll show you.
bsvr0002.20: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsvr0002.21: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsvr0002.22: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0002.23: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsvr0002.25: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsvr0002.28: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsvr0002.29: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0002.30: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsvr0002.31: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsvr0002.32: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsvr0002.33: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsvr0002.36: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsvr0002.38: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsvr0002.39: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsvr0002.40: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsvr0002.41: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsvr0002.42: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsvr0002.44: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsvr0002.45: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsvr0002.48: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsvr0002.49: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsvr0002.50: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsvr0002.51: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsvr0002.55: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsvr0002.56: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsvr0002.57: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsvr0002.58: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsvr0002.59: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsvr0002.60: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsvr0002.61: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsvr0002.62: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsvr0002.63: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsvr0002.64: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsvr0002.66: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsvr0002.67: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsvr0002.68: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsvr0002.69: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsvr0002.70: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsvr0002.72: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsvr0002.73: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsvr0002.74: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsvr0002.76: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsvr0002.77: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsvr0002.78: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsvr0002.79: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsvr0002.86: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsvr0002.88: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsvr0002.91: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsvr0002.97: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsvr0002.98: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsvr0002.100: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsvr0002.104: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsvr0002.106: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsvr0002.107: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsvr0002.108: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsvr0002.111: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsvr0002.112: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsvr0002.114: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsvr0002.115: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsvr0002.116: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsvr0002.119: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsvr0002.120: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsvr0002.122: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsvr0002.123: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsvr0002.125: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsvr0002.127: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsvr0002.128: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsvr0002.129: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsvr0002.130: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsvr0002.131: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsvr0002.134: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsvr0002.135: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0002.136: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsvr0002.137: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsvr0002.139: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0002.140: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsvr0002.142: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsvr0002.143: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsvr0002.144: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsvr0002.145: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0002.146: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsvr0002.147: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsvr0002.148: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsvr0002.149: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsvr0002.152: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsvr0002.153: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsvr0002.156: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsvr0002.157: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsvr0002.160: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsvr0002.161: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsvr0002.164: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsvr0002.173: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsvr0002.174: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsvr0002.176: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsvr0002.178: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsvr0002.179: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsvr0002.180: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsvr0002.181: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsvr0002.183: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsvr0002.185: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsvr0002.186: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsvr0002.187: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsvr0002.188: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsvr0002.190: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsvr0002.191: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0002.192: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsvr0002.197: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsvr0002.198: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsvr0002.200: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsvr0002.202: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsvr0002.203: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsvr0002.204: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsvr0002.205: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsvr0002.206: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsvr0002.208: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsvr0002.209: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsvr0002.211: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsvr0002.212: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsvr0002.214: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsvr0002.216: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsvr0002.217: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsvr0002.218: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsvr0002.221: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsvr0002.224: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsvr0002.225: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsvr0002.226: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsvr0002.229: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsvr0002.232: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsvr0002.233: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsvr0002.235: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsvr0002.238: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsvr0002.240: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsvr0002.242: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsvr0002.245: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsvr0002.246: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsvr0002.248: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0002.249: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsvr0002.250: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsvr0002.252: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsvr0002.253: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsvr0002.254: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsvr0002.257: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0002.259: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsvr0002.260: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsvr0002.262: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsvr0002.263: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsvr0002.267: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsvr0002.269: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsvr0002.273: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsvr0002.275: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsvr0002.276: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsvr0002.277: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsvr0002.279: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsvr0002.281: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0002.284: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsvr0002.285: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsvr0002.286: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsvr0002.289: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsvr0002.290: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0002.291: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsvr0002.293: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsvr0002.295: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsvr0002.296: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsvr0002.297: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsvr0002.299: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsvr0002.301: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsvr0002.302: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsvr0002.304: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsvr0002.305: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsvr0002.306: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

bjyt0200.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I get the picture.{\n}All right, let’s go!
bjyt0200.21: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bjyt0200.23: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
bjyt0200.1: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I almost got eaten by a fiend here.

djyt0200.5: {\n}This inn belongs to {MCR:s0Dl23:"Djose Temple"}.{\n}Will you be staying with us for the night?

ptkl0600.13: {\n}Leave it to me! I’ll take you{\n}anywhere you want to go.
ptkl0600.31: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
ptkl0600.33: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
ptkl0600.18: {\n}The warrior monks aren’t here anymore.{\n}They returned to {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.
ptkl0600.19: {\n}The warrior monks probably don’t{\n}consider {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} worth protecting.
ptkl0600.23: {\n}Even if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is destroyed,{\n}there will always be fiends around.
ptkl0600.24: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ mission to{\n}protect the people will never end.
ptkl0600.25: {\n}Feel free to buy loads of merchandise,{\n}but I ain’t giving you a discount.
ptkl0600.15: {\n}Let me know if you ever need a ride.

bsyt0600.0: {\n}Sin is cursed. Sin prays.{\n}It curses its form, it prays for dissolution.
bsyt0600.1: {\n}Sin sees dreams of its own destruction.{\n}Sin is looking at us.
bsyt0600.2: {\n}We live in a fading echo of{\n}time left us by the destroyer.
bsyt0600.3: {\n}Free him from Yu Yevon.{\n}Free him -- the fayth that has become Sin.

genk1300.1: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} attacked you!{\n}Are you okay?
genk1300.2: {\n}I hope to celebrate Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}Calm while I’m still alive.
genk1300.4: {\n}With a summoner like you at our side,{\n}we’ve no need to fear {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
genk1300.5: {\n}I’ll have great stories to tell{\n}about meeting Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
genk1300.6: {\n}Never even crossed my mind that Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}would marry... Now that’s a great story to tell!
genk1300.8: {\n}Even sanctioned machina gives{\n}me the creeps, I tell you.
genk1300.9: {\n}I tell you, my wife was as pretty as{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} back in her day.
genk1300.11: {\n}I’m afraid I’ll be attacked{\n}by {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} if I travel alone.
genk1300.12: {\n}I think the temple should crack down{\n}on the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} and teach them a lesson or two!
genk1300.16: {\n}I can see why the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} would{\n}go after someone like Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
genk1300.17: {\n}It’ll be busy with all the wedding{\n}preparations. I’d better get on my feet.
genk1300.18: {\n}Please watch after Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}until her wedding day.
genk1300.20: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} all looked so{\n}gloomy. I wonder what happened?
genk1300.22: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} all looked so{\n}gloomy. I wonder what happened?
genk1300.24: {\n}If only Lady {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"} were here now,{\n}we wouldn’t have to live in fear of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
genk1300.26: {\n}They beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} down with machina and the Hymn!{\n}A summoner just needs to finish it off!
genk1300.27: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Looks like we’re{\n}stuck here for a while.
genk1300.29: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} fail as guardian on shoopuf.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} never fail again.
genk1300.35: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
genk1300.37: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

ikai0800.0: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I need to be alone right now.
ikai0800.2: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Oh, my poor Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}...{\n}Tell me, where do you wander?
ikai0800.4: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Even should {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} disappear, the{\n}{MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} are doomed without a leader.
ikai0800.6: {\n}The summoner’s sending has saved{\n}our son from becoming a fiend.
ikai0800.8: {\n}Never did I imagine our son{\n}would depart before our time.
ikai0800.10: {\n}It feels quite strange to look{\n}older than your own parents.
ikai0800.11: {\n}They look exactly{\n}like my mom and dad.
ikai0800.14: {\n}Rest in peace on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.{\n}We shall join you soon.
ikai0800.16: {\n}Those who are born into {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}{\n}are destined to live a life of sorrow.
ikai0800.12: {\n}Sag mal, warum reden diese{\n}Leute hier überhaupt nicht?

lchb1300.24: Datto{\n}No way! You guys were{\n}on the flying ship?
lchb1300.25: Datto{\n}No one’s gonna believe that{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} is a traitor, man.
lchb1300.26: Datto{\n}Is it true that {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}is gettin’ married?
lchb1300.27: Datto{\n}Don’t worry ’bout the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}.{\n}We’re all in high spirits.
lchb1300.28: Datto{\n}Yes! Thank you! We beat the Goers{\n}all because of you, man.
lchb1300.30: Datto{\n}It may be last minute, but{\n}wanna go over the rules?
lchb1300.32: Datto{\n}You come back soon.{\n}We are really countin’ on you.
lchb1300.34: Letty{\n}We can play {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} twenty-four seven{\n}once {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is gone!
lchb1300.35: Letty{\n}The temple has pardoned the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.{\n}It’s a little too late for that, ya?
lchb1300.37: Letty{\n}So {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"} failed.{\n}Reminds me of when {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"} died.
lchb1300.38: Letty{\n}It’s not the same without you, man.{\n}Come back anytime, ya?
lchb1300.39: Letty{\n}We didn’t do half bad, ya?{\n}Next time, the Goers are goners!
lchb1300.40: Letty{\n}Let’s get them Goers.{\n}Let’s do it for {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}!
lchb1300.41: Letty{\n}No lookin’ back now, ya?{\n}We just wait for the game!
lchb1300.43: Jassu{\n}We even sang the Hymn arm in arm{\n}with the Goers!
lchb1300.45: Jassu{\n}I can’t imagine {PC:01:YUNA} and{\n}{MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"} as a couple.
lchb1300.46: Jassu{\n}So you are {PC:01:YUNA}’s guardian, too?{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s pretty strict, ya?
lchb1300.47: Jassu{\n}Still can’t believe we won, man...{\n}Have to keep pinching myself.
lchb1300.48: Jassu{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA} said he retired, but maybe{\n}he’ll come back if we beg him?
lchb1300.49: Jassu{\n}I should’ve been the one injured,{\n}not {PC:04:WAKKA}...
lchb1300.50: Jassu{\n}I know we only need to win twice,{\n}but that’s the problem.
lchb1300.51: Jassu{\n}We’ve never made it past the first round!{\n}I’m gettin’ the jitters.
lchb1300.52: Botta{\n}No matter what, we’ll always{\n}do our best!
lchb1300.54: Botta{\n}I-Is {PC:01:YUNA} going to quit her pilgrimage?{\n}I hope she does.
lchb1300.55: Botta{\n}We’re gonna keep at it, even{\n}if {PC:04:WAKKA} retires!
lchb1300.56: Botta{\n}I still have lots to learn from {PC:04:WAKKA}.{\n}I wish he’d come back.
lchb1300.57: Botta{\n}We did our best, so I have{\n}no regrets, man.
lchb1300.58: Botta{\n}So, who’s warmin’ the bench?{\n}Could it be me?
lchb1300.59: Botta{\n}Only five players in the sphere pool, ya?{\n}Which of us is warmin’ the bench?
lchb1300.60: Botta{\n}People are here from Besaid, you know.{\n}We gotta win it for them!
lchb1300.61: Keepa{\n}Once {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, you will{\n}be the new legendary guardian.
lchb1300.62: Keepa{\n}Actually, I’m relieved to hear that{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s wedding is called off.
lchb1300.63: Keepa{\n}You saw {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"} on the Farplane?{\n}Kinda looked like you, ya?
lchb1300.64: Keepa{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} visited {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} ten years ago.{\n}He had an amusing guardian with him.
lchb1300.65: Keepa{\n}We won! That means we are the team{\n}to watch out for. Unbelievable.
lchb1300.66: Keepa{\n}If only I had done better, we{\n}could have won. I’m sorry, man.
lchb1300.67: Keepa{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} will be watchin’, ya?{\n}Gotta play hard!
lchb1300.68: Keepa{\n}Play to win, play to win, play to win...{\n}Gotta keep reminding myself, ya?
lchb1300.69: Keepa{\n}I’ll make all the saves,{\n}so you just go out and shoot!
lchb1300.184: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
lchb1300.186: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
lchb1300.7: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Just breathe out, relax.{\n}Like this. Just breathe, yeah!
lchb1300.74: Letty{\n}We had to play the Goers{\n}in the first match last year.
lchb1300.75: Jassu{\n}The year before that,{\n}and the one before that, too!
lchb1300.76: Keepa{\n}Well, we would’ve lost{\n}to anyone anyway.
lchb1300.79: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We’re playin’ the {MCR:s06l48:"Al Bhed Psyches"} first.{\n}If we win, we’re in the finals!
lchb1300.80: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That’s right, we got seeded!{\n}Two wins and we’re the champions!
lchb1300.82: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}First things first.{\n}Let’s go over the basics again, boys.
lchb1300.85: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Someone said they saw{\n}Sir {PC:02:AURON} in a cafe!
lchb1300.88: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Hey! Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey!{\n}The game starts like real soon!
lchb1300.99: {\n}It didn’t even occur to me to think that the{\n}{PC:02:AURON} {PC:01:YUNA} was talking about...
lchb1300.100: {\n}and the one that I knew from{\n}{MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"} could be two different people.
lchb1300.106: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Some {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} saved me{\n}the other day, and...
lchb1300.111: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}If you meet {PC:06:RIKKU},{\n}tell her thanks for me.
lchb1300.112: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Oh, and as for the first game?{\n}May the best team win!
lchb1300.115: Letty{\n}The game starts in a few minutes.{\n}You sure you okay?
lchb1300.123: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}How can you let some{\n}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} kidnap you?
lchb1300.125: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Don’t go near {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} any{\n}more, okay? They’re trouble.
lchb1300.128: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}The game starts soon.{\n}No time for warm-ups.
lchb1300.132: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I got something to tell you boys.
lchb1300.135: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I promised myself this{\n}would be my last tournament.
lchb1300.138: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Since we’re here,{\n}we might as well win!
lchb1300.142: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I’m warming the bench.{\n}He’s taking my place.
lchb1300.143: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}All right, boys, let’s win this one!{\n}Let’s make the Goers goners!
lchb1300.146: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I saw you floating there,{\n}on the sphere.
lchb1300.149: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You really gave it{\n}your all, didn’t you?
lchb1300.155: {\n}In just a few minutes,{\n}the championship game!
lchb1300.159: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Get the ball and{\n}just shoot like crazy!
lchb1300.165: {\n}To be honest,{\n}I did kind of feel left out, but...
lchb1300.166: {\n}It really was the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}’{\n}and {PC:04:WAKKA}’s show, after all.
lchb1300.167: {\n}”My best memories are here.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}, Captain of the Aurochs.”
lchb1300.70: Datto{\n}Hey, {PC:00:TIDUS}!{\n}You wanna go over the rules?

mcyt0300.0: {\n}Hic! Eh...I’ve been protecting{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} since he was a wee lad.
mcyt0300.1: {\n}Ask me anything ye want to know ’bout{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.
mcyt0300.4: {\n}Ye do wanna know more{\n}about Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}, no?
mcyt0300.11: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s getting married.{\n}It’s certainly something to celebrate!
mcyt0300.12: {\n}Please give this congratulatory gift{\n}to Lady Yuna.
mcyt0300.14: {\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} doesn’t flaunt his status.{\n}He’s a down-to-earth gentleman.
mcyt0300.18: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} used to come here{\n}often, but now, everyone’s gone.
mcyt0300.21: {\n}These are leftovers from the banquet.{\n}Go ahead, take ’em with you, lad.
mcyt0300.24: {\n}Such a fine day to celebrate!{\n}The monks should let loose today!
mcyt0300.25: {\n}Live it up, everyone! Have a{\n}blast and make everyone happy!
mcyt0300.26: {\n}With rank set aside like this, I believe{\n}everyone is behaving a little too wildly.
mcyt0300.28: {\n}Did you see my cousin outside?{\n}We’re always competing with each other.

hiku0200.1: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}If it’s not an emergency,{\n}would you mind leaving?
hiku0200.3: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Wait... There’s something{\n}I want to ask you.
hiku0200.4: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}What would you think if I said{\n}I...I was giving up my pilgrimage?
hiku0200.7: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Most people would never{\n}forgive a summoner who quit.
hiku0200.9: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Behind my back, they would{\n}say I was abandoning my duty.
hiku0200.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Why not do your own thing and{\n}let them say what they want!
hiku0200.14: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"} and I should{\n}go someplace far away.
hiku0200.16: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Oh, like all the sympathy you{\n}showed me first time we met?
hiku0200.18: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Quitting now would be{\n}sort of anti-climactic, no?
hiku0200.20: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Tell her she still has a rival: me!
hiku0200.21: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Tell her she’d better{\n}do her best, or be bested.
hiku0200.23: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Thanks for the company.{\n}I feel so much better now.
hiku0200.25: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}I’ll leave this fight to you.{\n}Show us your stuff!
hiku0200.27: {\n}Years of sweat and toil to build{\n}it, and now {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} is rubble!
hiku0200.28: {\n}Come, {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}! I challenge you!{\n}I will fight till you are all dust!
hiku0200.29: {\n}I must tell the other players{\n}in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"} what has happened!
hiku0200.30: {\n}My friends, they died protecting{\n}{MCR:s06l57:"summoner"}. I will do the same.
hiku0200.32: {\n}If you are prepared, we can{\n}attack {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} at any time!
hiku0200.33: {\n}The gravity, it bends!{\n}And with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} at the center!
hiku0200.34: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is still living.{\n}How will we stop it?
hiku0200.35: {\n}You attack from the front?{\n}It is a crazy, but delightful plan!
hiku0200.37: {\n}No time for tears and shouting!{\n}All we must do is rebuild our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}.
hiku0200.39: {\n}I finally have figured out how{\n}it is that this ship is moved.
hiku0200.40: {\n}When you battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}I will be singing too, yes!
hiku0200.41: {\n}Leave the ship to my hands!{\n}You go now to the deck!
hiku0200.42: {\n}The ship must be tuned to{\n}be ready for the final fight!
hiku0200.43: {\n}Our ship is in top shape!{\n}Now, go and fell the great {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
hiku0200.44: {\n}The ship is fine, even{\n}inside {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, I think.
hiku0200.45: {\n}I hit my head when the ship shook.{\n}Now I have a lump!
hiku0200.46: {\n}Not scared, not scared!{\n}Not scared, not scared!
hiku0200.48: {\n}Even without our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}, we must{\n}live on! I only hope I am able.
hiku0200.49: {\n}The corridor is protected by {MCR:s06l57:"summoner"}.{\n}So this room should be safe!
hiku0200.50: {\n}We left kids on the ground.{\n}Safer for them.
hiku0200.51: {\n}I am glad you made it back from {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.{\n}They didn’t welcome us last time.
hiku0200.53: {\n}I wish to be done with battle,{\n}to see my little brother again!
hiku0200.54: {\n}Do not be lazy!{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is right before us!
hiku0200.56: {\n}Poor child, he does not understand{\n}that our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} is no more.
hiku0200.57: {\n}Chased by {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"}! We are all{\n}very tired, and very scared.
hiku0200.58: {\n}It pains me most to see{\n}the children so scared.
hiku0200.60: {\n}I can use a weapon!{\n}I will show them how {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} fight!
hiku0200.61: {\n}These things here belong to Mister {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}.{\n}They are not yours to take!
hiku0200.62: {\n}There is much to buy,{\n}so do not be shy!
hiku0200.63: {\n}Do you have all that you need?{\n}Talk to Mister {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}!
hiku0200.64: {\n}We must repair the damaged ship.{\n}But have we the parts?
hiku0200.65: {\n}It will be a battle most violent!{\n}Check that you have all you need!
hiku0200.66: {\n}All that is here is at your{\n}disposal! Be prepared!

bsil0500.5: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bsil0500.7: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

ikai0000.0: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Wha...what was that just now?{\n}That really Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}?
ikai0000.2: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}He wasn’t sent,{\n}so he became a fiend, right?
ikai0000.3: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I don’t understand how a man like{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} can die and not be sent.
ikai0000.4: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I would think that he was sent once...
ikai0000.6: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Something, a powerful emotion could have{\n}bound him to this world. Such things happen.
ikai0000.8: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It means he died an unclean death.
ikai0000.9: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Come to kill the old man?{\n}I welcome it!
ikai0000.10: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Or are you here to laugh?{\n}Laugh at the fallen {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}?

ptkl1000.4: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}They yearn to live on, and{\n}resent those still alive.
ptkl1000.6: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}And in time, that envy{\n}turns to anger, even hate.
ptkl1000.12: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} chose her own path. She knew{\n}from the beginning what it meant.
ptkl1000.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}All we can do is protect{\n}her along the way.
ptkl1000.20: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}They’ve reached the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"} by now.{\n}But...no tears next time, hm?
ptkl1000.21: {\n}I wished there would{\n}never be a next time.
ptkl1000.22: {\n}No more people being killed by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.{\n}No more sendings for {PC:01:YUNA}.
ptkl1000.25: {\n}I never wanted to see it again.

swin0300.0: {\n}Like I said before, you’re no{\n}match for the Goers! Hahaha!
swin0300.2: {\n}I can’t believe the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} won!{\n}What kind of cheap tricks did they use?
swin0300.5: {\n}Those dirty {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}! What’s{\n}so fun about ruining a wedding?
swin0300.9: {\n}Let us pray that the souls of the{\n}fallen reach the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
swin0300.15: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}A{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}E{CLR:WHITE} ]

swin0300.22: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!

bvyt0200.4: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}What’s a machina doing in the temple?
bvyt0200.6: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That’s not what I mean! The teachings!{\n}What about the teachings?

klyt0900.3: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But first, the Cloister of Trials.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI}? {PC:04:WAKKA}? Ready?
klyt0900.7: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}We’ll be back as soon as we can, okay?
klyt0900.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, I’m not a guardian,{\n}so I’m not supposed to go in, right?
klyt0900.19: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Only guardians allowed,{\n}and I’m sure no guardian.
klyt0900.21: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well, I guess it’s too late now.
klyt0900.22: {\n}An intruder got into the{\n}Cloister of Trials.
klyt0900.23: {\n}Keep an eye out for anyone suspicious!

azmm0000.0: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I want my journey to{\n}be full of laughter.
azmm0000.8: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I really don’t think{\n}that’s gonna help this time.
azmm0000.11: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But summoners and their guardians{\n}are kind of like Spira’s ray of light.
azmm0000.12: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}A lot of people in{\n}Spira depend on us.
azmm0000.13: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I learned to practice smiling{\n}when I’m feeling sad, you know?
azmm0000.20: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Right. Now, let’s see what you can do!
azmm0000.28: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We were just worried{\n}you guys might’ve gone crazy!
azmm0000.31: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Now, we will go to{\n}the temple at {CLR:BLUE}Djose{CLR:WHITE}.
azmm0000.34: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We don’t know where{\n}the fiends came from.
azmm0000.35: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"} is safe and sound,{\n}thanks to Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.

gemm0100.4: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I said I was sorry. It’s never{\n}gonna happen again! I promise!
gemm0100.10: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Only thing I drink{\n}from now on is shoopuf milk!
gemm0100.12: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}We’re on a journey to fight{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} and save {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}, right?
gemm0100.15: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}my wife and kid are{\n}never gonna forgive me.

ptkl1800.16: {\n}I’m gonna win lots of money playing{\n}{MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} and help rebuild {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}!

guad0100.70: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
guad0100.72: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
guad0100.15: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}The maester is also the{\n}high priest of {MCR:s0Dl2D:"Macalania Temple"}.
guad0100.16: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}So he administers both the{\n}temple and {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} affairs.
guad0100.18: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I hope to get an audience with{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}, myself.
guad0100.19: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Please, tell the lady {PC:01:YUNA} that{\n}I am doing just as she advised me!
guad0100.20: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I, too, will go to the temple{\n}in Macalania shortly.
guad0100.21: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Care to hear about the{\n}{MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"} or the pyreflies?
guad0100.22: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}No, thanks.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Tell me about the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.{\n}{CHOICE:02}Tell me about the pyreflies.
guad0100.25: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}’s the place where{\n}pyreflies born from a sending gather.
guad0100.26: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They appear in the shape of people{\n}who’ve died and gone to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
guad0100.27: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Quite the phenomenon;{\n}how I wish I understood it more fully!
guad0100.35: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
guad0100.36: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They may be called ”pyreflies” but{\n}they aren’t really ”flies,” you see.
guad0100.37: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They’re those lights you{\n}see whenever a fiend dies.
guad0100.38: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The little fellows are responsible{\n}for a few fantastic phenomena.
guad0100.39: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Visions of the past, spheres, fiends--{\n}these are all the pyreflies’ doing.
guad0100.41: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}pyreflies have something{\n}to do with aeons, too.
guad0100.42: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The dreams of the fayth reach{\n}through the spirit of the summoner...
guad0100.43: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that which is unreal{\n}becomes real for all to see!
guad0100.44: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Can’t get enough?{\n}Like to hear it one more time?
guad0100.45: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}No, thanks.{\n}{CHOICE:01}What about this {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}?{\n}{CHOICE:02}Let’s hear about these pyreflies.
guad0100.48: {\n}Too scared of the thunder to go on?{\n}And you call yourself a guardian!
guad0100.49: {\n}They say that Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s{\n}bride has to be a summoner.
guad0100.53: {\n}Someday when the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s regroup,{\n}we’ll want them to help us, too.
guad0100.55: {\n}If the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} strike, I will arm{\n}myself and fight alongside my brethren.
guad0100.56: {\n}Some advice from one blitzer to another:{\n}Stay away from {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"}.
guad0100.57: {\n}We {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} have lost our purpose.{\n}No one knows what chaos may ensue.
guad0100.58: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} welcome all guests.{\n}Would you like to rest here?
guad0100.63: {\n}Very well. I know about you, but{\n}I’d never turn away a guest.
guad0100.64: {\n}He that is too secure is not safe...{\n}Oh! Never mind. I was just rambling.

znkd0700.2: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}If she dies,{\n}I wouldn’t know what to do.
znkd0700.5: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}See? So I told him what I{\n}thought of him, right there!
znkd0700.11: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Ah, go to him.{\n}He’ll cry if you don’t.
znkd0700.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Whenever my old man was around,{\n}my mother wouldn’t even look at me.
znkd0700.14: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Maybe that’s when I started{\n}to resent him, even hate him.
znkd0700.17: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}The old lady next door told me...
znkd0700.18: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}when a lovebird dies,{\n}the one left behind...
znkd0700.19: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}It just gives up living{\n}so it can join its mate.
znkd0700.21: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I hated my old man even more.
znkd0700.24: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}They say you don’t practice{\n}anymore, that you’re gonna retire.
znkd0700.27: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}They say you’re no good{\n}’cause you drink all the time.
znkd0700.28: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I can quit drinkin’ whenever I want!
znkd0700.34: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Why do today what{\n}you can leave for tomorrow?
znkd0700.44: Fayth{\n}Long ago, there was a war.
znkd0700.48: Fayth{\n}The summoners of {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}{\n}didn’t stand a chance.
znkd0700.50: Fayth{\n}That’s why we tried to save{\n}it--if only in a memory.
znkd0700.52: Fayth{\n}The remaining summoners and the{\n}townspeople that survived the war...
znkd0700.53: Fayth{\n}They all became {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}--{\n}{MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} for the summoning.
znkd0700.58: Fayth{\n}The dreams of the {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}{\n}summoned the memories of the city.
znkd0700.59: Fayth{\n}They summoned all the buildings,{\n}all the people who lived there.
znkd0700.63: Fayth{\n}You, your father, your{\n}mother, everyone. All dreams.

genk0100.4: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}They say that clouds of pyreflies{\n}gather here when night falls.
genk0100.5: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The entire river glows,{\n}like a sea of stars.
genk0100.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Hey, we better hurry or{\n}we’ll miss the shoopuf!

isho0000.2: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}when my father wanted me taken{\n}from {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}...
isho0000.4: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I had always wanted{\n}to meet you someday.
isho0000.5: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I am truly glad that{\n}I had that chance.
isho0000.7: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Perhaps if I defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}that will be my thanks to you.
isho0000.10: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If you are all there watching this,{\n}then I guess {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is already gone.
isho0000.15: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Do you remember{\n}the first day we met?
isho0000.17: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}My father had defeated {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}and all {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} was celebrating.
isho0000.18: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Everyone was saying what a hero{\n}my father was. I was so happy.
isho0000.19: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But when night came,{\n}it occurred to me.
isho0000.20: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}My father had defeated {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}and now he was dead.
isho0000.23: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I stood on the bridge in {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}{\n}where my father and I had parted.
isho0000.24: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Standing there, alone, I could see{\n}the fields where he had fought {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
isho0000.26: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You said you were looking for{\n}the daughter of {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}, remember?
isho0000.28: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Until I realized what{\n}a gentle person you are.
isho0000.30: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}When I told you that{\n}I was {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}’s daughter...
isho0000.31: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}you said you would take me as{\n}far from {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} as you could.
isho0000.32: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}That it was the wish{\n}of a man facing death.
isho0000.34: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Because that...that was when{\n}I knew my father was dead...
isho0000.35: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}and I would never see him again.
isho0000.36: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You just held me,{\n}without saying a word.
isho0000.38: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}When you tried to go after leaving{\n}me in the care of the temple...
isho0000.39: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I held on to you, crying,{\n}”Don’t go, don’t go!”
isho0000.44: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I’ll never forget my days spent{\n}with you, growing up in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
isho0000.46: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}That’s why I was always{\n}so happy, I think.
isho0000.47: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}And when you refused to let me{\n}become a summoner and I did it anyway...
isho0000.50: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You know, when you tried to stop{\n}me then--really, I was happy.
isho0000.51: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I could tell you{\n}really cared about me.
isho0000.52: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You were like my{\n}big brother and sister.
isho0000.54: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I think you really were{\n}my big brother and sister.
isho0000.57: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I even love it when you{\n}scold me, {PC:05:LULU}! Really!
isho0000.58: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}We haven’t even known each{\n}other that long, but...
isho0000.60: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}So... So this is what it feels like.
isho0000.61: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s a much more wonderful feeling{\n}than anything I had ever imagined.
isho0000.75: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I...I just want to say,{\n}thank you for everything.
isho0000.77: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}When I... When I think about us{\n}never being together again at all...

mamm0300.3: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}You might not know when you’ll get back{\n}home, but you better not be crying!
mamm0300.4: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Although, I guess I’d understand.{\n}But you know what?
mamm0300.5: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}There’s a time when you have{\n}to stop crying and move on.
mamm0300.8: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Never mind,{\n}I’m no good at these things.

lchb0200.1: {\n}D-Did you beat them?{\n}I was so scared I couldn’t move!
lchb0200.2: {\n}The ferry docked here is{\n}headed for {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl11:"Kilika Port"}{CLR:WHITE}.
lchb0200.3: {\n}{CLR:BLUE}Dock number 3{CLR:WHITE} lies straight ahead.{\n}{CLR:BLUE}Dock number 1{CLR:WHITE} lies in the opposite direction.
lchb0200.4: {\n}When you’ve sailed the seas of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}{\n}long enough, little surprises you anymore.
lchb0200.5: {\n}I’m sorry, sir, but the ferry{\n}will remain at anchor for a while.
lchb0200.6: {\n}This ferry will take you to {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}{CLR:WHITE}.{\n}Would you like to board?
lchb0200.8: {\n}We can leave any time you’re ready.{\n}You have everything you need?
lchb0200.10: {\n}Give me a holler when you’re ready.{\n}Then we’ll set sail for {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}.
lchb0200.11: {\n}Hey, hey, outta my way!{\n}I’m tryin’ to work here!
lchb0200.12: {\n}Come on, move it!{\n}The ship’s clearing out soon!
lchb0200.14: {\n}Can’t survive the seas of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}{\n}getting freaked out by that!
lchb0200.15: {\n}Move it! Outta my way!{\n}I’m busy sorting the cargo!
lchb0200.17: {\n}We’re standing guard to keep any{\n}suspicious characters from boarding.
lchb0200.18: {\n}With the warrior monks gone, it’s{\n}up to us {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.
lchb0200.19: {\n}Warrior monks are not tour guides!{\n}Don’t bother us with your small talk.
lchb0200.21: {\n}I want to be a sailor and sail{\n}all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} when I grow up.
lchb0200.23: {\n}Sis once got caught trying{\n}to sneak onto that ferry.
lchb0200.24: {\n}Take it easy, sis!{\n}You’re too obsessed with ships.
lchb0200.25: {\n}I tell her how dangerous it is out{\n}on the ocean, but she never listens.

maca0300.107: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
maca0300.109: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
maca0300.0: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I hope that you’re not{\n}too mad at {PC:04:WAKKA}.
maca0300.7: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Well, I can tell{\n}she’s not a bad person.
maca0300.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You know what the problem is?{\n}She’s just another {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} to {PC:04:WAKKA}.
maca0300.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s head is{\n}as hard as a rock.
maca0300.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I bet it’s because of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.{\n}Or, you know, something like that.
maca0300.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Well, there’s more to it than that.
maca0300.15: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA} doesn’t like the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}because of his brother {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}.
maca0300.24: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I can’t say that I know, but why?
maca0300.26: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is the punishment for, and the{\n}incarnation of, crimes we have committed.
maca0300.28: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So, no one really knows what it is?
maca0300.29: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}There’s no need to{\n}know, so no one asks.
maca0300.30: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You run or you fight.{\n}That is really all you can do.
maca0300.32: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What, that’s all?{\n}I mean, you don’t even wonder?
maca0300.34: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You really do come from a world{\n}where there is no {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, like you say.
maca0300.37: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}He didn’t have to be so mean, yeah?
maca0300.42: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Hey, do I look like{\n}{MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}, you think?
maca0300.44: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Well, my dad’s sister is{\n}{MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}’s mother, you get it?
maca0300.46: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I had no idea!{\n}If you say so.
maca0300.48: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Okay! I guess you’re{\n}guarding your family, then.
maca0300.49: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s not the only one{\n}that I want to protect.
maca0300.51: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}We {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} want to protect{\n}all of the summoners, you know?
maca0300.54: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}they sacrifice themselves to,{\n}well...to bring happiness to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
maca0300.61: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}It takes a lot out of you.
maca0300.63: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But you know, {PC:01:YUNA}’s real{\n}serious about being a summoner.
maca0300.64: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}For {PC:01:YUNA}, well the pilgrimage{\n}kinda means everything to her.
maca0300.65: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You are going to help her,{\n}too, aren’t you, {PC:06:RIKKU}?
maca0300.67: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So you shouldn’t say that{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s sacrificing herself.
maca0300.70: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You’re no fun to ride with at all.
maca0300.78: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t need you to tell me that!
maca0300.79: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I guess there’s some sense{\n}in what you’re saying.
maca0300.82: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}That’s what youth is for after all.{\n}Do not waste it.
maca0300.87: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What do you think about {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}being an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}?
maca0300.94: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}And {PC:06:RIKKU} is not a liar.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} can tell.
maca0300.96: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You know, you might want{\n}to tell her that later.
maca0300.97: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I think she needs to know{\n}that we still want her with us.

mihn0400.24: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Hey, lad. I appreciate yer offer,{\n}but ye ain’t got enough gil.
mihn0400.33: {\n}I’m gonna go to {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} and{\n}see if I can give them a hand.
