mihn0400.0: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}What are you doing on this road?
mihn0400.5: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}You may ask the gate captain up{\n}ahead if you need to pass through.
mihn0400.9: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Coming down to the{\n}Oldroad was a mistake...
mihn0400.10: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Ye can’t run a business{\n}with no customers!
mihn0400.12: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Sure are a lot of {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s about.{\n}I wonder what they’re up to?
mihn0400.13: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I’ll make it up to ye,{\n}that I will!
mihn0400.17: {\n}We trained here before the operation.{\n}Back then, we believed we would win.
mihn0400.19: {\n}My chocobo was killed, too.{\n}We’d fought so many battles together.

bsvr0900.0: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Go present yourself to the temple{\n}summoner before we eat, ya?
bsvr0900.1: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}A little praying might do{\n}your memory some good!
bsvr0900.5: {\n}You could at least{\n}go see how they are doing.

kami0400.1: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I’m scared of lightning!{\n}Let’s rest, please? Pretty please?
kami0400.3: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You’re mean...cruel!{\n}Your moms would be ashamed of you!
kami0400.4: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Are you having fun doing this to me?
kami0400.5: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Fine, we rest.{\n}She’s worse than the storm.

mtmm0000.1: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}I wonder how old you are,{\n}now that you’re watching this sphere.
mtmm0000.2: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}You must be very beautiful,{\n}like your mother.
mtmm0000.6: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}So far, our journey has{\n}been very entertaining.
mtmm0000.7: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Of course, it is a hard journey,{\n}but I have no regrets.
mtmm0000.8: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}It is the path I have chosen.
mtmm0000.9: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, when you have grown,{\n}you will have to find your own path.
mtmm0000.10: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Do what you must do,{\n}the way you want to do it.
mtmm0000.11: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Doors will always open themselves{\n}to those who do.
mtmm0000.13: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Your future is yours to make.{\n}Live the way you want to.
mtmm0000.14: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Whatever way that may be,{\n}you have your father’s full support.
mtmm0000.15: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, I will always be with you.

lchb0201.6: {\n}We apologize for the inconvenience, but{\n}access to the stadium has been sealed off.
lchb0201.7: {\n}{MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} has ruled Spira{\n}for the past fifty years.
lchb0201.8: {\n}Man, this tournament is gonna rock!{\n}Even the big man is here to see the game.
lchb0201.9: {\n}If I can catch one glimpse of Maester {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"},{\n}I’ll have something to brag about back home.
lchb0201.10: {\n}Maester {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"} doesn’t make many public{\n}appearances. He’s getting too old for that.
lchb0201.11: {\n}I’m glad I got here safely.{\n}Don’t want another S.S. Liki incident.
lchb0201.12: {\n}Ladies and gentlemen, the day{\n}we’ve all been waiting for!
lchb0201.15: {\n}And this year we celebrate{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"}’s 50th year in office.
lchb0201.20: {\n}Only a few die-hard fans{\n}are in the audience today.
lchb0201.21: {\n}Best of luck to them, and a{\n}safe journey back to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
lchb0201.24: {\n}Here they are, folks!{\n}Our very own {MCR:s06l45:"Luca Goers"}!
lchb0201.26: {\n}They’re an all-around first-class team!{\n}And they’re back home in Luca!
lchb0201.27: {\n}Without a doubt, they are{\n}the favorite this year, Bobba.
lchb0201.30: {\n}Looks like all of Luca has turned{\n}out to cheer the Goers on!
lchb0201.31: {\n}They know, I know,{\n}and you know, folks!
lchb0201.33: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}It’s like this every year, ya?{\n}Don’t let it bother you.
lchb0201.35: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You guys are smilin’ now,{\n}but not for long!
lchb0201.36: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}’Cause this year, us{\n}{MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are taking the cup!
lchb0201.37: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}What in {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s name{\n}were you doing up there?
lchb0201.48: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"} is the leader of{\n}all the peoples of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
lchb0201.50: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Fifty years? Shouldn’t he{\n}be, uh, retired by now?
lchb0201.54: Image from a different map.{\n}Image inserting movie.
lchb0201.56: {\n}High Summoner {MCR:s06l37:"Ohalland"} used to play{\n}for them--a big name to live up to.
lchb0201.57: {\n}Their hometown was recently attacked{\n}by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}. Isn’t that right, Jimma?
lchb0201.60: {\n}Our next team off the ramp is...
lchb0201.61: {\n}Well, well, well!{\n}If it isn’t the {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"}!
lchb0201.67: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
lchb0201.69: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
lchb0201.2: {\n}Maybe so, but you’d better not{\n}count out the {MCR:s06l44:"Kilika Beasts"}!
lchb0201.4: {\n}Now that’s funny! Hahaha!{PAUSE}{\n}Gimme a break, man!

slik0200.25: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Great {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} tournaments are held{\n}there, and the stands are always full!
slik0200.27: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Sounds like him,{\n}but it can’t be him.
slik0200.29: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Why, that’s the day that{\n}{MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} came to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
slik0200.30: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s true! I first met {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}ten years and three months ago!
slik0200.31: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yeah, but how would he get here?
slik0200.5: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}there is a great stadium,{\n}all lit up even at night!
slik0200.6: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}A man named {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} told me.{\n}He was my father’s guardian.
slik0200.9: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You know, our meeting like this{\n}must be the blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}!
slik0200.10: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}My old man, he died. Ten years ago,{\n}off the coast of {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.
slik0200.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}He went out to sea for training{\n}one day...and never came back.
slik0200.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And no one’s seen him since then.
slik0200.14: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I remember,{\n}that was the day my father left.
slik0200.19: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Stick a harpoon in him{\n}and we’ll all get dragged under!
slik0200.20: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is going for {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}!{\n}We gotta distract it!
slik0200.21: {\n}Our families are in {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}!{\n}Forgive us, Lady Summoner!

bsvr0100.0: Datto{\n}Hey, I was hoping you’d{\n}join the team all along, ya?
bsvr0100.1: Datto{\n}Now that you’re with us,{\n}we got nothing to fear!
bsvr0100.2: Letty{\n}There’s going to be six teams{\n}from all over Spira at the tournament.
bsvr0100.3: Letty{\n}It’s a rough setup.{\n}One loss and you’re through, ya?
bsvr0100.5: Jassu{\n}Everyone’s acting like we already won!{\n}Not that I can blame them, ya?
bsvr0100.6: Jassu{\n}You should get to sleep{\n}early, brudda. Get some rest.
bsvr0100.8: Botta{\n}Hey, I’ll just try to{\n}stay out of your way.
bsvr0100.9: Keepa{\n}Hit the other team hard and{\n}make it easy on the goalkeeper, ya?
bsvr0100.10: Keepa{\n}We head out on the{\n}same boat tomorrow!
bsvr0100.11: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Let me introduce you to the team.
bsvr0100.12: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}This guy here wants into the tournament{\n}so bad, I let him on the team.
bsvr0100.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}His memory’s a little fuzzy, so{\n}don’t mind him if he says anything odd!
bsvr0100.18: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Nope, we got a new goal now!
bsvr0100.20: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}To win every match,{\n}defeat every opposing team!
bsvr0100.21: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}To bring the Crystal{\n}Cup back to our island!
bsvr0100.22: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That’s all we need to do to win!{\n}Easy, ya?
bsvr0100.30: {\n}But it was really my fault to begin with.
bsvr0100.32: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Thank you so much for your help earlier.
bsvr0100.36: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Um, I saw that aeon thing.{\n}That’s amazing!
bsvr0100.38: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Do you think I can{\n}become high summoner?
bsvr0100.42: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}We’re going on the{\n}same boat, aren’t we?
bsvr0100.51: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, but what if she,{\n}like, comes on to me?
bsvr0100.53: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}If you get tired, let me know.{\n}I had a bed made for you.
bsvr0100.54: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We sure got the boys worked up, huh?

djyt0900.0: {\n}For a long time, we had forgotten{\n}how to go forward.
djyt0900.1: {\n}You reminded us we must go forward.
djyt0900.3: {\n}Let us go, you who share our dreaming.
djyt0900.4: {\n}Come, and we will run till{\n}the dream’s end.

bjyt0300.0: {\n}I had made it out of the frying pan...{\n}and into the freezer.
bjyt0300.1: {\n}I thought I was going{\n}to die in this place.

djyt0100.62: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}No matter how dark the night,{\n}morning always comes.
djyt0100.66: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}The monks of {MCR:s0Dl16:"Djose"} have kindly{\n}offered to heal our wounded.
djyt0100.67: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} still looks{\n}out for us... Even now.
djyt0100.68: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}I would pray for{\n}those fallen in battle...
djyt0100.69: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}But how? How can I enter the{\n}temple after what we have done?
djyt0100.72: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}The monks said we could{\n}stay here for a while.
djyt0100.74: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}we’re going to do it for{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, that’s for sure.
djyt0100.77: {\n}Please leave the temple’s safety to{\n}the warrior monks, and enjoy some rest.
djyt0100.78: {\n}I quit the Crusaders and became a{\n}warrior monk. So, what do you think?
djyt0100.86: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
djyt0100.88: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
djyt0100.2: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The Lightning Mushroom Rock. It only opens{\n}when a summoner is addressing the {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}.
djyt0100.10: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I found him...but he was...{\n}torn in half. I...
djyt0100.13: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I can’t do this...{\n}I’m going back to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}!
djyt0100.16: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}He was a good fighter.{\n}He just wasn’t lucky enough.
djyt0100.21: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Why don’t you...{\n}go home now, to Besaid.
djyt0100.24: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You need some R & R.{\n}You’re hurt, ya?
djyt0100.27: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I can’t beat up on you when{\n}you’re all depressed, ya?
djyt0100.33: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}A summoner with bed hair!{\n}What’s the world comin’ to?
djyt0100.35: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We called to you, but{\n}with all that snoring...
djyt0100.38: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}I hadn’t really laughed{\n}like that in a long time.
djyt0100.39: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}It was only later that I realized...
djyt0100.41: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}Laughing must have been the{\n}only thing keeping them going.
djyt0100.46: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}We are going to let the other{\n}summoners deal with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
djyt0100.49: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}We’ll put {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} in{\n}his place in no time.
djyt0100.51: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}No, we found another way{\n}where no one has to die.
djyt0100.55: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Mmm...what is it today?{\n}Everyone’s picking on me!
djyt0100.56: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Ah, damn it! He was young!{\n}He pushed his luck!
djyt0100.57: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}What was he thinking--going up there{\n}in the front lines like that?

bsyt0500.0: {\n}What are you doing here?{\n}Didn’t think we’d be able to handle it?
bsyt0500.2: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}See, I told you she gets mad easy.
bsyt0500.5: {\n}I’ve done it.{\n}I have become a summoner!

genk1200.5: {\n}I’ve seen my daughter, so I have no regrets.{\n}I’m ready for the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"} anytime now.
genk1200.6: {\n}After seeing my dead daughter again,{\n}I felt complete and free of any worry.
genk1200.7: {\n}The wedding will be an absolute joy. It’s good{\n}to be able to experience all this, I tell you.
genk1200.9: {\n}His goods are cheaper than the other merchants’,{\n}but he seems kind of suspicious.
genk1200.11: {\n}People want to forget their anxiety about {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}so they absorb themselves in festivities.
genk1200.12: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} seem docile nowadays,{\n}but it always pays to be cautious.
genk1200.13: {\n}I believe that an {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} conspiracy{\n}is behind all the chaos in the temple.
genk1200.15: {\n}Even if the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} do something nice,{\n}I can’t bring myself to trust them.
genk1200.17: {\n}I’ve expended all my energy coming here{\n}and I can’t run any further.
genk1200.18: {\n}If I could ride the flying ship,{\n}I’m sure I could get back in a jiffy.
genk1200.19: {\n}I’ve expended all my energy coming here{\n}and I can’t run any further.
genk1200.21: {\n}I wonder how long it’ll{\n}take to reach our hometown?
genk1200.23: {\n}This area may also become a battlefield...{\n}Perhaps it’s better to run further away?
genk1200.31: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}M{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}L{CLR:WHITE} ]
genk1200.33: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.34: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.35: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.36: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.37: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.38: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.39: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.40: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
genk1200.41: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!

znkd0000.1: {\n}I thought I had put my feelings{\n}for {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"} behind me.

mcyt0400.10: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}... How horrifying!{\n}I shall pretend I did not witness that.
mcyt0400.11: {\n}This does not bode well.{\n}Please be careful.
mcyt0400.16: {\n}In time, the {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"} will come{\n}to see the light of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, too.
mcyt0400.8: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Come on, {PC:04:WAKKA}.{\n}Let’s at least hear him out.

kino0000.2: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Believe in the path you have chosen,{\n}let faith be your strength!
kino0000.3: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}I, {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}, maester of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"},{\n}will bear witness to your deeds today.
kino0000.7: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}They’re using the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}’s machina!{\n}They’re violating the teachings!
kino0000.9: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Wakka, I think Maester{\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} sees that, too.
kino0000.15: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I’ve got nothing to say about it.
kino0000.17: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Sir {PC:02:AURON} must be a{\n}great asset as a guardian.
kino0000.24: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Isn’t this operation against the teachings{\n}of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}? Aren’t you gonna stop them?
kino0000.27: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Both the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s and the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}truly wish peace for {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
kino0000.28: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}This {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"} was born{\n}from that wish they share.
kino0000.29: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Although it may be sacrilege to{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, their intentions are pure.
kino0000.30: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}And I, {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}--{\n}the person, not the maester of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}...
kino0000.31: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}As a denizen of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"},{\n}I wish them well in their endeavor.
kino0000.34: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Beg your pardon, but that’s not{\n}something a maester should say!
kino0000.37: {\n}From the first time I laid eyes on him,{\n}I never did like {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}...
kino0000.38: {\n}But you know, some of the things he said{\n}that day... They made a lot of sense to me.
kino0000.44: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Take that road to the{\n}command center. It’s not far.
kino0000.45: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}We’re still in the midst of{\n}preparations this way. Sorry.
kino0000.46: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}No, not this way, that way.{\n}I guess I’m not good at explaining.
kino0000.48: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I know, I know.{\n}I don’t even make a good guide.
kino0000.49: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Much less a member of the{\n}proud order of Chocobo Knights.
kino0000.50: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Captain {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"} yells at me{\n}all the time. I’m a disgrace.
kino0000.52: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Come on, don’t say that!{\n}Everyone’s good at something!
kino0000.55: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s supplied us{\n}with some goods. Here you go.
kino0000.56: {\n}Here, take this, and try to{\n}stay out of our way, okay?
kino0000.57: {\n}You must take full precautions here.{\n}Please use this if the need arises.
kino0000.58: {\n}Stay alert during your trip.{\n}I hope this helps.
kino0000.59: {\n}We’re sealing off this area for the{\n}operation. All passage will be denied.
kino0000.60: {\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} got you in,{\n}and now you wanna leave?
kino0000.61: {\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} did not forsake us after all.{\n}Now we can fight without regret.
kino0000.62: {\n}I’ve dispatched my men on patrol.{\n}Fiends have infested the area.
kino0000.64: {\n}I must relay Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s message{\n}to the men. This will be great for morale!
kino0000.65: {\n}I guess we have {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s blessing, since{\n}the maester himself wished us good fortune.
kino0000.66: {\n}Who knows, Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} might{\n}even summon aeons and fight alongside us.
kino0000.72: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}And he fought with an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina weapon instead.
kino0000.73: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That’s got nothing to do with it!
kino0000.75: {\n}I will be the one to finish {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} off.
kino0000.77: {\n}The {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} fools will soon witness{\n}the power of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
kino0000.78: {\n}The cannon got out of place when we fired{\n}a test shot. Packed too much powder, I guess.
kino0000.79: {\n}I have to set her in{\n}place before the operation.
kino0000.82: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s gonna be a huge target.{\n}We probably won’t even have to aim.
kino0000.83: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Welcome to {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}’s! The operation’s{\n}only shop, open fer business!
kino0000.86: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Be makin’ a fortune with{\n}”{MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}” prices!
kino0000.87: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}But you, lad, you get a discount!{\n}I owes ya one, eh?
kino0000.92: {\n}The {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"} are pretty brusque,{\n}but they make reliable comrades.
kino0000.93: {\n}Fiends are on the rampage!{\n}Be on your guard.
kino0000.100: {\n}What is a statue of{\n}{MCR:s06l3B:"Mi’ihen"} doing here?
kino0000.102: {\n}It’s a statue of someone. Looks like{\n}the same one that was in {MCR:s0Dl1C:"Mi’ihen Highroad"}.
kino0000.103: {\n}There’s a {CLR:YELLOW}sword{CLR:WHITE} here, too...{\n}What is its significance?

klyt1100.2: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} will be the one{\n}to suffer the consequences!
klyt1100.5: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The chamber beyond is a sacred{\n}place. Only summoners may enter.
klyt1100.12: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} are people who{\n}gave their lives to battle {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
klyt1100.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} took their souls, willingly{\n}given from their still-living bodies.
klyt1100.16: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But when a summoner beckons, the{\n}souls of the {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} emerge once again.
klyt1100.20: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}She prays with all her heart{\n}for a way to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
klyt1100.22: {\n}That song we heard there, in the temple...{\n}I knew it from my childhood.
klyt1100.24: {\n}Maybe that’s why, suddenly, I felt{\n}like...I just wanted to go home.
klyt1100.25: {\n}I tried to say something, to tell them.{\n}But the words wouldn’t come.

bsil0600.0: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}This is where I was born.{\n}I started blitz when I was five.
bsil0600.2: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Ten years...and we never won a game.
bsil0600.3: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Well, after last year’s tournament,{\n}I quit. Time seemed right.
bsil0600.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"} didn’t pray that day.{\n}Said he’d miss his boat.
bsil0600.15: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}This isn’t the way to the pier.
bsil0600.16: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What are you up to out here?
bsil0600.19: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Even if we cannot defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}we do what we can.
bsil0600.21: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Then you should pray before you go.
bsil0600.22: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}All who leave the island pray{\n}for safe passage over there.
bsil0600.26: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I won’t pray, and I’ll{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} all the same!
bsil0600.27: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Well, I guess you have the spirit.
bsil0600.29: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Even should the temple{\n}forsake us, we will do our duty.
bsil0600.30: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}We are the shield that guards this land.
bsil0600.31: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}I can’t believe they’re{\n}calling Lady {PC:01:YUNA} a traitor.
bsil0600.32: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Calling Lady {PC:01:YUNA} a traitor...{\n}there must be some mistake.
bsil0600.34: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}As long as {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} remains,{\n}so does our duty.
bsil0600.35: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}They say a flying ship{\n}gave {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} a good chase.
bsil0600.36: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Never let your guard down!{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is the most evil of foes.
bsil0600.37: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}All we can do is pray that this{\n}ship of the skies can defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsil0600.44: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bsil0600.46: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

lchb1400.1: {\n}This is the {MCR:s06l45:"Luca Goers"}’ locker room.{\n}No unauthorized entry.
lchb1400.2: {\n}What are you doing out here?{\n}The tournament’s already under way!
lchb1400.3: {\n}Hey, the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}’ locker room is on the{\n}other side. Or are you just here to scout?
lchb1400.4: {\n}You sure are taking it easy.{\n}The opening match is about to start, you know.
lchb1400.7: {\n}It’s like I’m feeding off the{\n}energy of the players!
lchb1400.9: {\n}This guard is so mean!{PAUSE}{\n}He won’t let me in to see Sir Graav!
lchb1400.10: {\n}I don’t care if I have to wait for hours!{\n}I’m not moving until I see Sir Graav!
lchb1400.11: {\n}I’m gonna practice blitz real hard{\n}and be just like Bickson!
lchb1400.12: {\n}Guess what, guess what?{\n}I shook Bickson’s hand!
lchb1400.13: {\n}The Goers didn’t win, but a true fan will{\n}stand behind them through thick and thin.
lchb1400.14: {\n}The Goers’ victory parade was canceled{\n}because of all the chaos with the fiends.
lchb1400.15: {\n}I just want to wish the Goers luck,{\n}but security won’t let me in.
lchb1400.16: {\n}You guys just got lucky!{\n}The Goers will take the cup next year!
lchb1400.17: {\n}You guys made the Goers look good{\n}by putting up a good fight.
lchb1400.23: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}V{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}F{CLR:WHITE} ]

lchb1400.26: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.27: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.28: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.29: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.30: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.31: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.32: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
lchb1400.33: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!

ikai0100.2: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}When somebody dies, a summoner{\n}sends them to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}, right?
ikai0100.3: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So their souls, or whatever they are,{\n}they go to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}, right?
ikai0100.14: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}This is all that is there.{\n}I need it not.
ikai0100.16: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You’re not really going to see the dead,{\n}more like your memories of them.
ikai0100.17: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}People think of their relatives,{\n}and the pyreflies react to them.
ikai0100.18: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}They take on the form of the dead{\n}person--an illusion, nothing else.
ikai0100.24: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Memories are nice,{\n}but that’s all they are.
ikai0100.27: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Come to kill the old man?{\n}I welcome it!
ikai0100.28: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Or are you here to laugh?{\n}Laugh at the fallen {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}?

mcfr0300.4: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}This is what spheres are made of.
mcfr0300.8: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Whoa, this is old!{\n}Don’t know if you can play it back.
mcfr0300.9: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} left it here ten years ago.
mcfr0300.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What’s the point?{\n}He wasn’t on some pleasure cruise.
mcfr0300.14: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}He sounded almost serious,{\n}but it was too late.
mcfr0300.19: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He was always talking{\n}about going home, to {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.
mcfr0300.20: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}That’s why he took all those pictures--{\n}to show them to you when he returned.
mcfr0300.23: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He decided he would join {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}in his fight against {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
mcfr0300.24: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So then, he gave up going home?
mcfr0300.28: {\n}He knew there was no way{\n}back home, back to {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.
mcfr0300.29: {\n}He wanted to go home,{\n}but he knew he couldn’t.
mcfr0300.30: {\n}He couldn’t go on{\n}until he accepted it.
mcfr0300.32: {\n}even if he had{\n}found a way back...
mcfr0300.35: {\n}Maybe I had to start{\n}accepting my own fate.
mcfr0300.40: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He just didn’t know how{\n}to express it, he said.

swin0400.30: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Hey, lad. I appreciate yer offer,{\n}but ye ain’t got nuff gil.
swin0400.33: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Oh yes, before I forget.{\n}Call me if ye need something, lad.
swin0400.21: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Say, lad, you wouldn’t{\n}have a bit o’ gil to lend?
swin0400.36: {CHOICE:00}What do you have?{\n}{CHOICE:01}Lend gil to {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}.{\n}{CHOICE:02}No, thanks.
swin0400.43: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
swin0400.45: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
swin0400.3: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}It might not mean much, but{\n}good luck in the tournament.
swin0400.5: {\n}Yewh! Filthy, filthy! These won’t{\n}sell or me name’s not {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}!
swin0400.6: {\n}Don’t look like you{\n}got much money, either.
swin0400.7: {\n}I’ve no business with ye.{\n}Outta me way!
swin0400.11: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Don’t know me?{\n}Well, not many do, not yet.
swin0400.12: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}They ask a fortune for rags{\n}in Besaid. And Kilika, well...
swin0400.13: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Me business is in shambles!{\n}What’s an {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"} to do, I ask ye!
swin0400.15: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I’ll make it up to ye,{\n}that I will!
swin0400.18: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I’ll make it up to ye,{\n}that I will!
swin0400.20: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}But someday, the name {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}will be spoken all over Spira!

bvyt0300.6: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Folglich gibt es auch solche,{\n}die diese Stärke ausnutzen.

ikai0101.8: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}He is Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} no more.{\n}Send him now!

genk0900.2: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}They built the city on top{\n}of bridges across the river.
genk0900.7: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Why build a city over a river, ya?
genk0900.8: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Uh... Well, it would be convenient,{\n}with all that water there.
genk0900.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}They just wanted to prove they{\n}could defy the laws of nature!
genk0900.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}when humans have power,{\n}they seek to use it.
genk0900.14: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}If you don’t stop them,{\n}they go too far, ya?

guad0200.0: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}More than the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}, at least.{\n}What do ye say?
guad0200.7: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Rippin’ off the pilgrims that{\n}come to visit the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}!
guad0200.8: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Listen, you watch that{\n}they don’t get you, too!
guad0200.11: {\n}We imagine Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} will rise to{\n}great glory in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
guad0200.13: {\n}I heard that Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} studied{\n}the teachings in {MCR:s0Dl29:"Macalania"}.
guad0200.15: {\n}Ah, one of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s guardians.{\n}How may I help you today?
guad0200.17: {\n}I have nothing special,{\n}but I hope I can be of aid.
guad0200.19: {\n}If it please you, do come again.

luca0100.4: {\n}The warrior monk? She’s not around{\n}anymore. I missed my chance at her.
luca0100.6: {\n}Is it true that Maester{\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} isn’t a normal {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}?
luca0100.7: {\n}I’m certain that the {MCR:s06l48:"Al Bhed Psyches"}{\n}are gonna win this year.
luca0100.11: {\n}If anything had happened to {MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"},{\n}the guards would’ve been toast.
luca0100.12: {\n}The opening ceremony’s going to start soon!{\n}All players must proceed to their locker rooms.
luca0100.13: {\n}Where have the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s been hiding?{\n}After that battle they just disappeared...
luca0100.14: {\n}I saw the {MCR:s06l45:"Luca Goers"} were at dock number 3.{\n}Man, those guys were something else!
luca0100.15: {\n}The {MCR:s06l44:"Kilika Beasts"} aren’t advancing?{\n}Well, there’s always next year...
luca0100.16: {\n}With me cheering for them, the{\n}{MCR:s06l44:"Kilika Beasts"} will win hands down!
luca0100.20: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are buying up everything.{\n}Better stock up while you can.
luca0100.21: {\n}Tournaments are when we earn our cash!{\n}There’s no time to waste now!
luca0100.22: {\n}The defeated {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} are now staying{\n}at different travel agencies.
luca0100.23: {\n}I’m all for the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s and the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.{\n}Heck, even the stadium uses machina!
luca0100.24: {\n}The fans always celebrate after the game,{\n}but with the fiend scare, I doubt it.
luca0100.25: {\n}The opening ceremony is about to begin{\n}and you’re taking a walk? Now that’s bold.
luca0100.26: {\n}Whoever thought of destroying {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}with a song was a genius!
luca0100.27: {\n}I wonder how the wedding was?{\n}Haven’t heard anything from the temple yet.
luca0100.29: {\n}This guy in a red robe took down{\n}a fiend in one blow! Is that cool or what?
luca0100.32: {\n}The warrior monks left Luca without a word.{\n}Who do they think they are?
luca0100.35: {\n}We’ve been up all night preparing{\n}for the tournament, so I’m exhausted.
luca0100.36: {\n}Hurray! With the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s back I feel{\n}like we could take on two {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}s!
luca0100.37: {\n}Only a few have returned alive.{\n}It’s the worst defeat in {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"} history.
luca0100.38: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are all taking off.{\n}I hope they’ll come back safe.
luca0100.39: {\n}Auron? Yeah, I know him!{\n}He was a guardian for Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}, right?
luca0100.41: {\n}I don’t know much about religion, but{\n}there’s something weird about the temple.
luca0100.46: {\n}I’ve got official {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} merchandise{\n}as well as other rare items!
luca0100.49: {\n}To tell you the truth, I doubt you can destroy{\n}Sin with the Hymn, but you might as well try.
luca0100.50: {\n}Not all of the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are armed well.{\n}They seem inferior to the warrior monks.
luca0100.70: {\n}My husband likes the warrior monks,{\n}but I simply can’t bear them.
luca0100.71: {\n}What if the Crusaders just angered{\n}Sin? What will we do then?
luca0100.73: {\n}I never believed that the fiends{\n}would attack this city. This is horrible.
luca0100.75: {\n}With {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} also in attendance,{\n}this tournament will go down in history.
luca0100.76: {\n}Is Sin really going to go away?{\n}You’d better not be lying to me.
luca0100.77: {\n}There’s a flying ship at the port!{\n}That’s a forbidden machina, isn’t it?
luca0100.78: {\n}I feel sorry for the Crusaders.{\n}Everyone is so gloomy.
luca0100.79: {\n}You know what? They said that the Crusaders{\n}are bad people disobeying the teachings!
luca0100.80: {\n}Mommy and Daddy aren’t very happy.{\n}Do you know why? Hmmm?
luca0100.81: {\n}I got a red balloon!{\n}Bet you want one, too!
luca0100.83: {\n}Luca is a free city. The fiends{\n}could have snuck in from anywhere.
luca0100.84: {\n}Luca men aren’t my type.{\n}They have to be more manly.
luca0100.86: {\n}I would’ve gladly been attacked{\n}by fiends just to see the game live.
luca0100.88: {\n}Hey, why don’t you go{\n}cheer them on for me!
luca0100.89: {\n}Even the temple makes mistakes.{\n}The monks are only human, after all.
luca0100.90: {\n}Luca’s so quiet now with all{\n}the blitz fans gone home.
luca0100.92: {\n}I like a good riot once in a while,{\n}but I never want to do that again.
luca0100.93: {\n}I hate it when this{\n}cafe is so packed.
luca0100.95: {\n}What’s wrong with the temple these days?{\n}They’re hopeless when we need them most!
luca0100.96: {\n}It’s a pity about the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.{\n}They were all such devoted fighters.
luca0100.97: {\n}It’s all such a big mess, and{\n}I don’t know what’s going on anymore.
luca0100.100: {\n}I wonder if my brother heard{\n}my hymn up on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}?
luca0100.101: {\n}I don’t want to go back to {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"}{\n}because it reminds me of my brother.
luca0100.103: {\n}My brother is very strong. That’s why{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} depends on him.
luca0100.105: {\n}My brother said that he’d do absolutely{\n}anything for Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.
luca0100.110: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I thought every town was little--{\n}you know, like {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} and {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}.
luca0100.112: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Because when a lot of{\n}people start to gather...
luca0100.116: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s not any different,{\n}but the stadium is here.
luca0100.117: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s fight to protect it{\n}with all their strength.
luca0100.119: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Blitzball is really the only{\n}entertainment that we have.
luca0100.120: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s a little short{\n}on fun these days.
luca0100.125: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well, there are more buildings.{\n}All tall ones and cramped together.
luca0100.127: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}They must be so tall!{\n}Don’t you ever get dizzy?
luca0100.134: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}In exchange for her safe return,{\n}they want the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} to lose.
luca0100.136: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If they’re only {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} players,{\n}I doubt they’d do anything drastic.
luca0100.137: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But we shouldn’t take chances.{\n}Let’s go get her.
luca0100.141: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I mean, how good a{\n}team can they be?
luca0100.143: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}He’ll take care of the game.{\n}We should go get {PC:01:YUNA}.
luca0100.149: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I can’t be lying{\n}around in some bed.

znkd0801.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I hope you know how to use it.

znkd0800.15: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
znkd0800.13: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

cdsp0200.3: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}There were these {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} that saved{\n}my life when I first came to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
cdsp0200.4: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}They took me on their ship,{\n}even gave me food.
cdsp0200.5: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I was kinda hoping that this was{\n}the same ship. But it’s not.
cdsp0200.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I made it out okay, but I don’t know{\n}what happened to their ship.
cdsp0200.10: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Um, was there anyone{\n}called Cid on that ship?
cdsp0200.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t know. They were all{\n}speaking that {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} language.
cdsp0200.14: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}He’s my uncle, but I’ve{\n}never actually met him.
cdsp0200.21: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But she told me to seek him{\n}out if I ever needed help.
cdsp0200.24: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The thing about {PC:04:WAKKA}--he never{\n}had much love for the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
cdsp0200.27: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I thought I told you{\n}not to tell {PC:04:WAKKA}!

nagi0500.34: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
nagi0500.36: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
nagi0500.41: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}O{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}Y{CLR:WHITE} ]
nagi0500.43: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.44: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.45: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.46: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.47: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.48: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.49: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.50: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.51: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0500.1: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}What’s a {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} doing{\n}in a place like this?
nagi0500.3: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}They say it was stolen{\n}from a temple long ago.
nagi0500.6: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Without training, they{\n}cannot call the Final Aeon.
nagi0500.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That must be what{\n}the thief was thinking.
nagi0500.14: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}It is...{\n}It’s you, is it not, Lady Ginnem?
nagi0500.16: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}There is no human left{\n}in you now, is there?
nagi0500.18: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Allow me to perform my last duty to you.{\n}My last as your guardian.
nagi0500.19: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Strange.{\n}I thought it would be sadder, somehow.
nagi0500.24: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, the {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} is inside.{\n}Go do what you came to do.

genk0000.0: {\n}We’ve always fought side by side.{\n}Now we go back home together.
genk0000.1: {\n}We’re leaving the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.{\n}Why fight? We know we can’t win.
genk0000.2: {\n}It’s not much of a wound... I should{\n}be able to go on...but I can’t.
genk0000.3: {\n}The mission fails. I can’t even{\n}walk... What did I do to deserve this?
genk0000.5: {\n}After she is wed, we {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}{\n}will protect Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
genk0000.7: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}We can all learn a lesson from {\n}what has happened to the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
genk0000.8: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Only the truly faithful have{\n}a hope of defeating {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
genk0000.10: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I have not spoken with{\n}the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} for some time.
genk0000.11: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Lady Summoner, good fortune{\n}to you and your guardians.
genk0000.12: {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}{\n}Look! One of {PC:03:KIMAHRI}’s friends.{\n}Looks just like him.
genk0000.14: {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}{\n}Both follow summoners on all fours!{\n}Hornless goatlings!
genk0000.20: {MCR:s06l14:"Yenke"}{\n}Poor {PC:03:KIMAHRI}!{\n}Lost his horn, next lose his summoner!
genk0000.23: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What, they were just picking on you?
genk0000.33: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I mean I’m worried about{\n}those summoners disappearing.
genk0000.35: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, if we guardians do our job...{\n}no problem, right?
genk0000.42: {\n}The daughter of a famous summoner,{\n}helping those who defy {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}?
genk0000.43: {\n}No two summoners are alike,{\n}but you’re something else!
genk0000.46: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Well, {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}I think fate has brought us together.
genk0000.47: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Shall we make the best of it, then?
genk0000.53: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}In the end, only summoners{\n}can hope to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
genk0000.54: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You are right. I must train harder.
genk0000.55: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I can help with that, if you like.
genk0000.56: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I propose a contest of aeons.{\n}A friendly contest, of course.
genk0000.58: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I’m ready anytime,{\n}if you change your mind.
genk0000.61: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I have healed your aeons.{\n}Well, shall we?
genk0000.64: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I look forward to meeting you again.{\n}Till next time, {PC:01:YUNA}.
genk0000.65: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Still wet behind the ears,{\n}but you have spirit.

dome0400.3: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}I congratulate you, summoner.{\n}You have completed your pilgrimage.
dome0400.4: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}I will now bestow you{\n}with that which you seek.
dome0400.7: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}You must choose the{\n}one whom I will change...
dome0400.8: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}to become the fayth{\n}of the Final Summoning.
dome0400.11: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}If that bond is strong enough,{\n}its light will conquer {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
dome0400.12: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}A thousand years ago, I chose my{\n}husband, {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}, as my {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}.
dome0400.13: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}Our bond was true, and I{\n}obtained the Final Aeon.
dome0400.15: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}You will soon be freed{\n}of worry and pain.
dome0400.16: {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}{\n}For once you call forth the{\n}Final Aeon, your life will end.
dome0400.19: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It is not too late!{\n}Let us turn back!
dome0400.21: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Would you have some other summoner{\n}and his guardians go through this?
dome0400.23: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}This is the only way we got now!
dome0400.28: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I wanted to make that{\n}runt into a star blitz player.
dome0400.29: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Show him the view{\n}from the top, you know.
dome0400.30: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}But now I know there’s{\n}no way home for me.
dome0400.31: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I’m never gonna see him again.{\n}My dream’s never gonna come true.
dome0400.34: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Then maybe my life will{\n}have meaning, you know.
dome0400.37: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}there may be another way!{\n}We’ll think of something, I know!
dome0400.40: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I ain’t gettin’ any younger, so{\n}I might as well make myself useful.
dome0400.42: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}What! You’re not gonna{\n}try to stop me, too?
dome0400.46: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Guard him well.{\n}Make sure he gets there.
dome0400.51: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}The cycle will continue and{\n}your deaths will mean nothing!
dome0400.52: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}But there’s always a chance{\n}it won’t come back this time.
dome0400.55: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I’ll find a way to break the cycle.
dome0400.62: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If one of us has{\n}to become a {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}...
dome0400.65: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If you want everything,{\n}you’ll end up with nothing.
dome0400.72: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t know, but I have to try.
dome0400.79: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That is just not gonna{\n}happen, brudda, you know?
dome0400.81: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So what would an adult do, then?
dome0400.83: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You’re right, I might{\n}not even have a chance.
dome0400.84: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But no way am I gonna just
dome0400.86: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And what {PC:02:AURON} said{\n}about there being a way...
dome0400.89: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}It’ll go the way I want it...{\n}or I’ll end it here.
dome0400.91: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You say it’s your story,{\n}but it’s my story, too, you know?
dome0400.93: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}to let my fate just carry me away...
dome0400.94: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}following this same path{\n}my whole life through.
dome0400.96: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}What I do, I do...{\n}with no regrets.

bsvr0600.0: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsvr0600.1: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsvr0600.2: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0600.3: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsvr0600.5: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsvr0600.8: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsvr0600.9: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0600.10: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsvr0600.11: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsvr0600.12: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsvr0600.13: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsvr0600.16: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsvr0600.18: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsvr0600.19: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsvr0600.20: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsvr0600.21: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsvr0600.22: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsvr0600.24: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsvr0600.25: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsvr0600.28: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsvr0600.29: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsvr0600.30: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsvr0600.31: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsvr0600.35: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsvr0600.36: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsvr0600.37: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsvr0600.38: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsvr0600.39: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsvr0600.40: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsvr0600.41: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsvr0600.42: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsvr0600.43: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsvr0600.44: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsvr0600.46: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsvr0600.47: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsvr0600.48: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsvr0600.49: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsvr0600.50: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsvr0600.52: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsvr0600.53: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsvr0600.54: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsvr0600.56: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsvr0600.57: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsvr0600.58: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsvr0600.59: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsvr0600.66: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsvr0600.68: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsvr0600.71: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsvr0600.77: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsvr0600.78: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsvr0600.80: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsvr0600.84: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsvr0600.86: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsvr0600.87: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsvr0600.88: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsvr0600.91: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsvr0600.92: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsvr0600.94: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsvr0600.95: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsvr0600.96: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsvr0600.99: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsvr0600.100: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsvr0600.102: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsvr0600.103: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsvr0600.105: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsvr0600.107: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsvr0600.108: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsvr0600.109: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsvr0600.110: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsvr0600.111: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsvr0600.114: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsvr0600.115: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0600.116: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsvr0600.117: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsvr0600.119: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0600.120: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsvr0600.122: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsvr0600.123: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsvr0600.124: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsvr0600.125: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0600.126: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsvr0600.127: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsvr0600.128: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsvr0600.129: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsvr0600.132: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsvr0600.133: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsvr0600.136: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsvr0600.137: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsvr0600.140: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsvr0600.141: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsvr0600.144: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsvr0600.153: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsvr0600.154: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsvr0600.156: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsvr0600.158: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsvr0600.159: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsvr0600.160: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsvr0600.161: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsvr0600.163: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsvr0600.165: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsvr0600.166: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsvr0600.167: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsvr0600.168: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsvr0600.170: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsvr0600.171: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0600.172: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsvr0600.177: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsvr0600.178: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsvr0600.180: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsvr0600.182: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsvr0600.183: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsvr0600.184: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsvr0600.185: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsvr0600.186: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsvr0600.188: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsvr0600.189: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsvr0600.191: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsvr0600.192: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsvr0600.194: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsvr0600.196: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsvr0600.197: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsvr0600.198: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsvr0600.201: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsvr0600.204: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsvr0600.205: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsvr0600.206: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsvr0600.209: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsvr0600.212: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsvr0600.213: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsvr0600.215: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsvr0600.218: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsvr0600.220: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsvr0600.222: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsvr0600.225: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsvr0600.226: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsvr0600.228: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0600.229: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsvr0600.230: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsvr0600.232: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsvr0600.233: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsvr0600.234: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsvr0600.237: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0600.239: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsvr0600.240: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsvr0600.242: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsvr0600.243: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsvr0600.247: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsvr0600.249: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsvr0600.253: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsvr0600.255: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsvr0600.256: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsvr0600.257: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsvr0600.259: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsvr0600.261: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0600.264: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsvr0600.265: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsvr0600.266: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsvr0600.269: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsvr0600.270: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0600.271: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsvr0600.273: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsvr0600.275: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsvr0600.276: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsvr0600.277: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsvr0600.279: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsvr0600.281: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsvr0600.282: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsvr0600.284: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsvr0600.285: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsvr0600.286: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

maca0000.3: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Great!{\n}I knew I could count on you, lad!
maca0000.5: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}You need somethin’ for the big{\n}rescue, eh? I’ve got just the thing!
maca0000.66: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}B{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}P{CLR:WHITE} ]
maca0000.68: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.69: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.70: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.71: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.72: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.73: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.74: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.75: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.76: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
maca0000.8: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}We were surprised you{\n}decided to come so soon.
maca0000.10: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} sends his apologies{\n}for having left without notice.
maca0000.12: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I have one question,{\n}if I may, sir.
maca0000.14: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I want to keep journeying,{\n}even if I marry.
maca0000.15: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Do you think that Maester{\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} would let me?
maca0000.21: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}I’ll have to ask you to wait{\n}here a little while longer.
maca0000.24: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We’re all with you.{\n}Do as you will.
maca0000.32: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Curse that {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} for{\n}taking up a place like this!
maca0000.33: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}He’ll be rich by tomorrow{\n}all on account of this celebration thing!
maca0000.40: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Oh. You want me to scratch you?
maca0000.43: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I’ve always been able{\n}to tell how chocobos feel.
maca0000.44: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Maybe I’d make a better chocobo{\n}breeder than Chocobo Knight, huh?
maca0000.45: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Hey, what job do{\n}you see me doing?
maca0000.50: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Hmm...{\n}You know, I might just give it a try.
maca0000.51: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}We’ll have to get some{\n}new chocobos to rebuild our unit.
maca0000.52: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I wonder how long{\n}that’s gonna take. Ah, well...
maca0000.54: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Would Captain {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"} let me?{\n}{MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"} would probably laugh at me.
maca0000.55: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Wow, I think this is the first time{\n}I’ve seriously thought about my life.
maca0000.56: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I should be fighting,{\n}but my legs refuse to move.
maca0000.57: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I don’t deserve to{\n}be a Chocobo Knight.
maca0000.59: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}It can happen to anyone.{\n}{TIME:00}{CHOICE:01}Yeah, you’re no knight.
maca0000.61: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I thought so.{\n}Thanks for being honest with me.

mihn0500.4: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Would you like to{\n}hear about the Highroad?
mihn0500.15: {\n}There are some {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} wandering around.{\n}What are they up to now?
mihn0500.16: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} wouldn’t be acting so big{\n}if the warrior monks were here.
mihn0500.17: {\n}That ship is an {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} machina, right?{\n}I can’t believe the clergy’s relying on it.
mihn0500.18: {\n}If the temples were to disappear,{\n}what would we pray to?
mihn0500.19: {\n}We live in the desert, so{\n}I have never seen so many flowers.
mihn0500.20: {\n}I like the flower here and the flower{\n}in the desert. I like them both.
mihn0500.22: {\n}I sang out loud so that Dad can hear me.
mihn0500.24: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}E{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}I{CLR:WHITE} ]

mihn0500.27: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!

mihn0500.29: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
mihn0500.30: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
mihn0500.31: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
mihn0500.32: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
mihn0500.33: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
mihn0500.34: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
mihn0500.2: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Thank you so much{\n}for your words yesterday.
mihn0500.6: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}We are currently traveling a part of the{\n}{MCR:s06l3B:"Mi’ihen"} Highroad called the Newroad.
mihn0500.7: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Naturally, that suggests that{\n}there is, or was, an Oldroad.
mihn0500.8: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The road that runs below this Newroad{\n}is the original {MCR:s06l3B:"Mi’ihen"} Highroad.
mihn0500.9: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Hence, the road that Lord {MCR:s06l3B:"Mi’ihen"}{\n}walked is not this road, but the Oldroad.
mihn0500.13: {\n}I’ll bet the dead soldiers became fiends,{\n}and are creeping around.

kami0300.55: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You don’t care? I mean,{\n}you’re not going to stop her?
kami0300.56: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}As long as she is{\n}willing to face {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}...
kami0300.58: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}That is a summoner’s privilege.{\n}As long as she journeys.
kami0300.66: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kami0300.68: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kami0300.7: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}We’re almost out of here! Let’s go!
kami0300.16: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I thought it would{\n}be the best thing to do.
kami0300.31: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But I think it is the right thing to do.
kami0300.35: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I wish we could help somehow, some way!
kami0300.40: {\n}But somehow,{\n}I felt like I didn’t belong.
kami0300.41: {\n}But if I didn’t belong with them,{\n}I’d be stuck in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}, alone.
kami0300.42: {\n}And being alone in that place, well,{\n}I didn’t want to think about it.
kami0300.45: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We guardians will wait until they’re{\n}done, and plan our next move.

lchb0301.6: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}People of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}, I thank{\n}you for your generous welcome.
lchb0301.18: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}All right! Last meeting{\n}before the match! Hustle!

lchb0300.1: {\n}A-Are they gone?{\n}What are machina doing here?
lchb0300.2: {\n}A watchman is posted at{\n}every dock for your safety.
lchb0300.3: {\n}To my left is {CLR:BLUE}dock number 2{CLR:WHITE} and{\n}to my right is {CLR:BLUE}dock number 4{CLR:WHITE}.
lchb0300.4: {\n}Lord Seymour will lead the{\n}Guado to eternal repose.
lchb0300.5: {\n}Seems like they scaled back on security{\n}this year. Hope nothing bad happens.
lchb0300.6: {\n}Hey, hey, hey! You can’t board a{\n}military vessel without permission!
lchb0300.7: {\n}If I were ten years younger, those{\n}machina would be scrap metal!
lchb0300.8: {\n}I’m terribly sorry, but no one{\n}is allowed to board this ship.
lchb0300.9: {\n}I’m really glad I got assigned to {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.{\n}I can catch the game on my day off.
lchb0300.10: {\n}Machina are an unholy abomination!{\n}We must destroy them all!
lchb0300.29: Bickson{\n}Whether you’re a traitor or not{\n}means nothing in the sphere pool.
lchb0300.34: Graav{\n}We’re going to keep on blitzing no{\n}matter what becomes of the temple.
lchb0300.36: Graav{\n}I consider your victory{\n}a total fluke.
lchb0300.38: Abus{\n}The players and the fans all sang{\n}the Hymn when the ship flew by.
lchb0300.39: Abus{\n}Rumor has it that you guys are traitors.{\n}Some people sure talk rubbish.
lchb0300.41: Abus{\n}We thought you’d be a pushover.{\n}You {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} sure have improved!
lchb0300.42: Abus{\n}Another tournament, another victory...{\n}But no parade, thanks to those fiends.
lchb0300.44: Doram{\n}You always seem to be walking around.{\n}When do you have time to practice?
lchb0300.45: Doram{\n}You’re a guardian now, right?{\n}Are you still going to blitz?
lchb0300.46: Doram{\n}We didn’t lose to the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}, we lost{\n}to {PC:04:WAKKA}’s spirit and dedication.
lchb0300.47: Doram{\n}Hey, great game! So you’re not{\n}just a pretty boy after all.
lchb0300.49: Balgerda{\n}What in Spira’s name is the{\n}temple thinking these days?
lchb0300.51: Balgerda{\n}How could we lose to the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"},{\n}of all teams? This is a disgrace!
lchb0300.52: Balgerda{\n}Had enough?{\n}Come back when you’re a man.
lchb0300.53: Raudy{\n}I don’t know who’s flying that ship,{\n}but I just hope they get the job done.
lchb0300.55: Raudy{\n}I hear the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s failed{\n}miserably. As expected.

stmm0100.1: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Well, you said it{\n}was gonna be a long trip.
stmm0100.2: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}We’ll be seeing a lot{\n}of neat things, right?
stmm0100.3: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}So I thought I’d record it all in this.
stmm0100.4: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}To show to my wife{\n}and kid, you know.
stmm0100.7: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Ain’t this supposed{\n}to be a grand occasion?
stmm0100.10: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Too many goodbyes--{\n}people think twice about leaving.
stmm0100.12: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Well, it better be a lot more{\n}colorful when we come back.

djyt0800.2: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}And I hear Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s{\n}quite taken with you.
djyt0800.3: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}The world must look different when{\n}you’re the daughter of Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}.
djyt0800.5: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Then try standing on your{\n}own two legs for once.
djyt0800.6: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Your guardians won’t be able to{\n}protect you when the time comes.
djyt0800.7: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}This has nothing to do with my father!
djyt0800.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I am traveling on my own,{\n}as a full-fledged summoner!

bvyt1200.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I expect it will be a fair trial.
bvyt1200.9: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I’m afraid the grand maester{\n}is nowhere to be found!
bvyt1200.13: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Maybe you could{\n}help us with the hymn.
bvyt1200.15: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}It’s like, we need you to tell{\n}as many people as you can.
bvyt1200.17: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}A ship in the sky will{\n}sing the Hymn of the Fayth.
bvyt1200.18: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}When they hear it,{\n}we need everyone to sing along!
bvyt1200.22: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}A ship in the sky will{\n}sing the Hymn of the Fayth?
bvyt1200.23: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}So when they hear it,{\n}everyone should sing along, correct?
bvyt1200.24: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}If they do, we might{\n}be able to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
bvyt1200.28: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}You can count on me!{\n}I shall tell all of Spira!

kino0500.82: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0500.0: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Why only you, sir?{\n}I want to fight, too!
kino0500.3: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Let me go with you, and{\n}I’ll prove it to them!
kino0500.4: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Guarding the command center{\n}is important too, you know.
kino0500.5: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}But I came all the way from{\n}{MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} to fight {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, sir!
kino0500.6: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}I know, but an order’s an order.{\n}To your post, Crusader.
kino0500.10: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}At least there’s no{\n}chance he’ll get hurt.
kino0500.11: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Why are you guys fighting, anyway? Aren’t{\n}the almighty {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} machina enough?
kino0500.12: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}They still need some{\n}time to get them ready.
kino0500.13: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Our job is to keep {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}at bay till they’re done.
kino0500.17: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}I might not get another{\n}chance to say this.
kino0500.23: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}When we used to play blitz together,{\n}{MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"} used to say...
kino0500.24: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}He’d say that--when we won the{\n}Cup, ya?--he’d propose to {PC:05:LULU}.
kino0500.25: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}And then one day...he goes off and{\n}becomes a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}. Just like that.
kino0500.27: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}That being with your girl is good...
kino0500.28: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}But keeping {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} far{\n}away from her is better.
kino0500.32: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}All {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s in the vanguard{\n}are to assemble on the beach!
kino0500.41: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}As you did when you{\n}became a summoner.
kino0500.43: {\n}before I ever really understood the{\n}reason why {PC:01:YUNA} let {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} pass that day.
kino0500.44: {\n}Be sure to make thorough preparations.{\n}Here, put this to good use.
kino0500.45: {\n}Give this to the lady summoner, and{\n}grant us your help when the time comes.
kino0500.46: {\n}We’ve secured the command center perimeter.{\n}But please take this as a precaution.
kino0500.48: {\n}My friend is stationed there.{\n}All I can do is pray for him.
kino0500.50: {\n}We have neutralized all fiends around{\n}the command center. The sector is secure.
kino0500.52: {\n}Relying on machines goes against the{\n}teachings, but the maester just used it.

mcfr1200.1: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I always thought that this{\n}would be easier somehow.
mcfr1200.2: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I thought that everyone would help me...
mcfr1200.3: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}with all my friends together beside me.
mcfr1200.10: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}It’s just, you know...{\n}all those things I said.
mcfr1200.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I didn’t know what would{\n}happen to you, {PC:01:YUNA}.
mcfr1200.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I guess...{\n}I hope it didn’t make you sad.
mcfr1200.21: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Forget all about {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, about{\n}being a summoner. Forget all that.
mcfr1200.22: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You know, live a normal life.{\n}Come on now, {PC:01:YUNA}, what do you say?
mcfr1200.28: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} would say yes, too, I know.{\n}But Sir {PC:02:AURON}...
mcfr1200.29: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’ll make him understand, {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}It’s the least I can do for you.
mcfr1200.30: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}No, I should tell him.{\n}He deserves it.
mcfr1200.31: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}What’ll I do if I give up my pilgrimage?
mcfr1200.33: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Not the one in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"},{\n}the one I’m from.
mcfr1200.34: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yeah, we can all fly there.{\n}Everyone can go!
mcfr1200.35: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Then we’ll have a big{\n}party at my place!
mcfr1200.38: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}We could all watch you play,{\n}in the stadium all lit up at night.
mcfr1200.39: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I’d cheer and cheer till{\n}I couldn’t cheer anymore!
mcfr1200.45: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Let’s go to the sea,{\n}before the sunrise.
mcfr1200.46: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}The city lights go out one by one.{\n}The stars fade...
mcfr1200.47: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Then the horizon glows,{\n}almost like it’s on fire.
mcfr1200.61: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I could do anything{\n}I wanted to, and yet...
mcfr1200.62: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Even if I was with you,{\n}I could never forget.
mcfr1200.67: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Stay with me until the end. Please.
mcfr1200.71: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Maybe you should{\n}head back to camp first.

azit0400.3: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Wait there until we have{\n}performed the sending.
azit0400.5: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}It’s not much, but the least we can{\n}do is give them a proper sending.
azit0400.8: {MCR:s06l0A:"Pacce"}{\n}That summoners shouldn’t{\n}have to do a pilgrimage...
azit0400.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Was I the only one{\n}who didn’t know?
azit0400.17: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}We all live in fear{\n}of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}. You know that.
azit0400.20: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}We summoners have the power{\n}to make that dream come true.
azit0400.21: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}And we will use that power,{\n}even if it means our lives!
azit0400.24: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Why couldn’t they trust guardians{\n}to protect the summoners?
azit0400.25: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}The {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} had no right{\n}stopping their pilgrimage!
azit0400.26: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}If they don’t, and{\n}they get to Zanarkand...
azit0400.29: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}With the Final Aeon, she can{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}. But then...but then...
azit0400.30: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}If she calls it, then the{\n}Final Aeon’s going to kill her!
azit0400.31: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Even if she defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, it{\n}will kill {MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"} too, you know!
azit0400.32: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Tell me why!{\n}Why were you hiding it?
azit0400.34: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:05:LULU}! How could you? How could you?{\n}Isn’t she like a sister to you?
azit0400.37: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Don’t you think we tried to stop her?
azit0400.39: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, she knew what she was doing{\n}when she chose to become a summoner.
azit0400.43: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}just so the rest of Spira{\n}can be happy, right?
azit0400.46: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I told her all the things{\n}we could...we could...
azit0400.47: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And all along, the whole time,{\n}I didn’t know anything!

bjyt0000.3: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What do we have here?{\n}Nope, can’t read it.
bjyt0000.9: {TIME:00}No memory card (8MB) (for PlayStation®2){\n}found in MEMORY CARD slot 1!
