djyt0000.31: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}So many died in vain...{\n}It was a mistake.
djyt0000.32: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}It’s just you, now. But don’t worry,{\n}we’re here for you!
djyt0000.35: {\n}Here, take this.{\n}I don’t need it anymore.
djyt0000.36: {\n}We should live according to the teachings.{\n}I learned that the hard way.
djyt0000.38: {\n}Maybe I should quit the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}and become a warrior monk.
djyt0000.42: {\n}The warrior monks left for {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"},{\n}so it’s our job to protect this temple.
djyt0000.44: {\n}The monk gave me this, but{\n}I think you should have it.
djyt0000.45: {\n}I will pray for all my lost comrades.
djyt0000.64: {\n}Should you need a place to recuperate,{\n}please return. You are always welcome here.
djyt0000.65: {\n}I believe the wounded soldiers{\n}will find solace in our prayers.
djyt0000.67: {\n}There is nothing I can do but pray.{\n}My faith in {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} will never die.
djyt0000.1: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, it is good to see you{\n}and your companions are well.
djyt0000.2: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Yourselves as well, Captain.{\n}We were worried. Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}!
djyt0000.3: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}We escaped with our lives, but{\n}our troops were decimated.
djyt0000.4: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Of all our chocobos,{\n}only this one made it.
djyt0000.5: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}We make pretty poor Chocobo Mounted{\n}Forces without chocobos.
djyt0000.6: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}We turned our backs on the teachings{\n}and cast away our faith.
djyt0000.10: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I feel that I have rested enough.{\n}But, thank you for your kindness!
djyt0000.13: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Once we find chocobos, our{\n}Mounted Forces will ride again!
djyt0000.17: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}You expect me to keep{\n}up with a chocobo!?
djyt0000.18: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}, I wish you good fortune.{\n}{MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}! {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}! Let’s go!
djyt0000.20: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Eh!? C-Can’t I just rest a sec...?
djyt0000.23: {\n}Stay away from the temple!{\n}Leave at once!
djyt0000.24: {\n}Try to understand our position.{\n}We’d rather not do this, believe me.
djyt0000.25: {\n}Traitors! Just kidding.{\n}Sorry about all that fuss.
djyt0000.26: {\n}Hey, it’s been a long time!{\n}How’s it going?
djyt0000.27: {\n}We’re behind you all the way!{\n}Good luck!
djyt0000.28: {\n}Good luck.{\n}Destroy {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} for us all, all right?
djyt0000.30: {\n}Take care!{\n}Damn, I wish we could go with you!

mtgz0600.24: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mtgz0600.26: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mtgz0600.1: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}She has sent fiends to test{\n}our summoner’s strength.
mtgz0600.5: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}In {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, she awaits{\n}the arrival of the strongest.
mtgz0600.14: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Looks like we got a job to do, ya?
mtgz0600.15: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If anything should happen in the{\n}water, we’re relying on you three.
mtgz0600.16: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If it gets dangerous, pull out quick.

genk1100.14: {\n}It’s my future, so I need to{\n}make my own decisions.
genk1100.15: {\n}Forget about going to {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"}.{\n}It’s so quiet, you’ll go crazy.
genk1100.16: {\n}Rookie {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are training somewhere in{\n}the {MCR:s0Dl39:"Calm Lands"}, waiting for us to regroup.
genk1100.17: {\n}Seems like all the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}{\n}want to go to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
genk1100.20: {\n}This is the situation at hand.{\n}You shall understand soon.
genk1100.22: {\n}Those who object to this wedding have no right{\n}to call themselves followers of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
genk1100.24: {\n}It is my duty to ensure the safety{\n}of visitors to {MCR:s0Dl25:"Guadosalam"}.

bvyt0000.3: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}You would play at marriage{\n}just for a chance to send me?
bvyt0000.5: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}All the more fitting{\n}to be my lovely wife.
bvyt0000.7: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}Do you not value your friends’ lives?
bvyt0000.17: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Throw down your weapons!{\n}Let them go, or else...
bvyt0000.21: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}This is foolish.{\n}If you fall, you’ll die.

slik0800.3: {\n}The power room,{\n}like it says on the door!
slik0800.8: {\n}What kind of backwater island{\n}did you come from, anyway?
slik0800.10: {\n}Miracles and oddities were starting{\n}to become daily routine on this trip.

swin0900.1: {\n}It’s already late.{\n}You should go get some rest.
swin0900.2: {\n}You’re from {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}? Everyone on{\n}the ship’s been talking about you.
swin0900.3: {\n}You’ve got the biggest mouth{\n}of any blitzer I’ve ever seen!
swin0900.5: {\n}Maybe you’re better off asking{\n}the Goers to coach you.
swin0900.6: {\n}We’re lucky that we didn’t run{\n}into any fiends on the open sea.
swin0900.7: {\n}I admire your zeal, but we’re gonna{\n}leave you behind if you do that again.
swin0900.11: {\n}This ship is just a ferry.{\n}We’re doomed if we run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.

hiku0000.40: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}He’ll have to run pretty fast{\n}to beat this {MCR:s06l58:"airship"}!
hiku0000.41: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}We cannot chase if we cannot see.
hiku0000.43: {\n}Your face, I have seen it before.{\n}Perhaps in the temple at {MCR:s0Dl04:"Baaj"}?
hiku0000.44: {\n}It is a battle most dangerous.{\n}Take this with you.
hiku0000.45: {\n}I have lived through bad,{\n}but I fear worse is coming.
hiku0000.46: {\n}With this ship, revenge against the{\n}followers of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} will be ours.
hiku0000.47: {\n}Many of our friends died in the attack{\n}on {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}. Never will I forgive the temples.
hiku0000.48: {\n}You will fight {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} close, no?{\n}Beware its toxin!
hiku0000.49: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} came down on {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}, eh?{\n}It serves the temple worms right!
hiku0000.50: {\n}The main gun is finished.{\n}It I cannot repair.
hiku0000.51: {\n}If only the main gun worked,{\n}we could shoot {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} down!
hiku0000.52: {\n}It is odd to fly in a ship{\n}dragged from the ocean floor!
hiku0000.53: {\n}Do the {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} worms think{\n}to kill us all?
hiku0000.54: {\n}The {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I saw in the ruins{\n}was calm. Why is this?
hiku0000.55: {\n}Will the people of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} listen{\n}to the call and sing for us?
hiku0000.56: {\n}Make sure to check your equipment{\n}before going out on deck!
hiku0000.57: {\n}Even should {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} return, if all{\n}are singing, there will be no fear.
hiku0000.58: {\n}We will charge into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, no?{\n}Let us do great battle!
hiku0000.59: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} sits still. It moves not.{\n}It seems to wait for us.
hiku0000.60: {\n}What will I do? My doll!{\n}I left it in {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}!
hiku0000.62: {\n}But we say ”lose something precious,{\n}find something even more precious.”
hiku0000.68: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}If we lose, you’ll die too, buddy!
hiku0000.76: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Thank you. Your patronage{\n}is very much appreciated.
hiku0000.77: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Ah, how is your{\n}progress with our language?
hiku0000.81: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Just repeating what{\n}I’ve said is not talking, now.
hiku0000.82: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}But your pronunciation’s quite passable.{\n}You’ve been studying, I see.
hiku0000.83: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}If there’s anything I can help{\n}you with in the future, just ask.
hiku0000.110: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
hiku0000.112: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
hiku0000.9: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Get on deck and{\n}show him what you got!
hiku0000.15: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}All this time, I’ve been thinking{\n}about how to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
hiku0000.28: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}No answer in the teachings,{\n}answers lie outside.
hiku0000.31: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}{MCR:s06l19:"Mika"} knows much.{\n}Find him, make him talk.

bsil0700.2: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}So, after quitting,{\n}I got this new job, ya?
bsil0700.3: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But every time my mind wandered,{\n}I thought about the game.
bsil0700.4: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Ten years without{\n}a single win’ll do that.
bsil0700.5: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}My first match last year{\n}was my big chance.
bsil0700.6: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But something else was on my mind.{\n}I couldn’t focus.
bsil0700.7: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So you want to win the next{\n}tournament--go out with a bang.
bsil0700.9: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I don’t care how we do.{\n}Long as we play our best.
bsil0700.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}When you play in a {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"}{\n}tournament, you play to win!
bsil0700.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}If we give it our all,{\n}I can walk away happy.
bsil0700.15: {\n}Be on guard. There are{\n}fiends on the road today!
bsil0700.16: {\n}After surviving your run-in with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}’twould be a shame if something happened now.
bsil0700.21: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Hey, sorry.{\n}Don’t worry about it, I’ll help you out.
bsil0700.23: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}In return, come tournament time,{\n}I’ll make sure we take the cup!

sins0000.10: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
sins0000.12: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

klyt0700.2: {\n}What happened to the Crusaders?{\n}They all look so sad.
klyt0700.3: {\n}We’re supposed to sing when we see{\n}the flying ship, right? See, I knew that!
klyt0700.4: {\n}We saw the flying ship so we all sang our{\n}hearts out. I think I sang the best!
klyt0700.8: {\n}Why are all the monks getting antsy?
klyt0700.9: {\n}We all sang together, so{\n}why isn’t {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} dead yet?

hiku0801.36: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}There’s something I want{\n}to say before the fight.
hiku0801.37: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I, uh... I guess I didn’t know{\n}anything about the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
hiku0801.38: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Didn’t know anything.{\n}Didn’t want to listen to anything.
hiku0801.43: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Hey, I’m guilty of hating{\n}those durn Yevonites, myself!
hiku0801.44: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Well, there’s a lot of folk in this world--{\n}some of ’em good, some of ’em bad.
hiku0801.46: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}When this is all over, we’ll{\n}help you look for your {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}!
hiku0801.62: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}My pop says he’s got{\n}a special surprise for {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
hiku0801.63: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Can’t wait till this is over{\n}so we can relax for a change!
hiku0801.64: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Don’t worry, we’ll be fine!{\n}Everyone’ll sing for us. I know it!
hiku0801.66: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I must admit I was worried at{\n}the beginning, but you’ve done well.
hiku0801.69: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Don’t keep {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} waiting.{\n}He never was a patient man.
hiku0801.70: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We’ll be bringing a new Calm.{\n}One that will last forever.
hiku0801.71: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}This will be a battle unmatched in{\n}the thousand years since {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s birth.
hiku0801.72: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} without {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}...{\n}Why is it so hard to imagine?
hiku0801.77: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}We can think about what will{\n}happen after we beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, right?
hiku0801.78: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}I have to warn you,{\n}thinking is not my forte.
hiku0801.79: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}So if you want a plan,{\n}go to someone else.
hiku0801.80: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}I have to fly the airship now.{\n}Goodbye.
hiku0801.83: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}The song! It is not working on {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
hiku0801.84: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}You go into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} once more, eh?{\n}Leave it to me!
hiku0801.85: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}We will fly anywhere{\n}you want to go!
hiku0801.89: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Now that’s what I call a plan!
hiku0801.95: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
hiku0801.97: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
hiku0801.1: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yu Yevon’s hiding somewhere inside{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and we’re gonna find him.
hiku0801.3: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, simple is the way you like it, right?
hiku0801.20: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}We’ll give that thing a new blowhole.{\n}All you gotta do is jump!
hiku0801.22: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}I won’t tell ya to be careful.{\n}Do your worst, kiddo!
hiku0801.33: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}But the main gun, it is broken!
hiku0801.35: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}The final showdown with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!{\n}I say let’s get this show on the road!

ssbt0300.3: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I wonder if Sir {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} is in pain.
ssbt0300.6: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It bothers me,{\n}the way they said that.
ssbt0300.12: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If I summon an aeon,{\n}Yu Yevon will join with it.
ssbt0300.13: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But at first, it’ll{\n}be small, won’t it?
ssbt0300.15: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Then, we might be able to beat{\n}it without the Final Summoning.
ssbt0300.16: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I don’t know. What if{\n}Yu Yevon jumps again?
ssbt0300.18: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}We’ll fight him until{\n}there’s no place left to run!
ssbt0300.20: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I never thought it{\n}would come down to this.
ssbt0300.22: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, the {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}, they’re{\n}tired of this whole thing, too.
ssbt0300.27: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}And what is it that Yu Yevon{\n}is summoning from within {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}?

hiku0800.26: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Why didn’t I just{\n}shut my big mouth?
hiku0800.27: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I can’t believe we’re flying through{\n}the sky in this! A machina!
hiku0800.29: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I mean, so that makes{\n}her {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}, right?
hiku0800.33: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I’m glad {PC:01:YUNA}’s okay and all,{\n}but what’s with those fancy clothes?
hiku0800.37: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}So much for the Final{\n}Aeon solving everything.
hiku0800.53: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Remember this ship?{\n}It’s the one we found under the sea!
hiku0800.55: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Yeah! We’re gonna save {MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"},{\n}and nobody’s gonna stop us!
hiku0800.63: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Rush this and we’ll lose everything.{\n}We need to plan carefully.
hiku0800.65: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}This is tough on all of us.
hiku0800.66: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We’re powerless as long{\n}as we’re on this ship.
hiku0800.67: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}No matter what happens,{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} won’t give up her pilgrimage.
hiku0800.69: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You or {PC:06:RIKKU} should study{\n}your magic, just in case.
hiku0800.71: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Odd. Why does {MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"}{\n}allow the unsent to walk free?
hiku0800.72: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We need to sit and think this through.{\n}There has to be a way!
hiku0800.73: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Well, I guess it’s all or nothing.
hiku0800.74: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Careful what you touch!{\n}Ship’s not as stable as she looks!
hiku0800.75: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}First, we rescue {PC:01:YUNA}!{\n}Let’s show ’em what we got!
hiku0800.77: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}One of the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} squads{\n}that attacked {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} found her.
hiku0800.78: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Hah! Wedding, my britches!{\n}Not while I’m around!
hiku0800.81: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Eh, relax!{\n}This ship’s still got some fight left in her!
hiku0800.82: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}What are ya doin’ loafing around?{\n}Get out there and get that dragon!
hiku0800.83: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}We’ll wait till you think of a plan.{\n}Get that noggin working!
hiku0800.84: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Well, that sounds{\n}like a plan to me!
hiku0800.85: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}My baby here’ll take{\n}us anywhere we want!
hiku0800.94: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}I have to warn you,{\n}thinking is not my forte.
hiku0800.95: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}So if you want a plan,{\n}go to someone else.
hiku0800.99: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}The song! It is not working on {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
hiku0800.100: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}You go into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} once more, eh?{\n}Leave it to me!
hiku0800.101: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}We will fly anywhere{\n}you want to go!
hiku0800.103: {\n}If the {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"} attack,{\n}the ship will surely sink!
hiku0800.116: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}What is good about {MCR:s06l6A:"machina"},{\n}is they can be built anew, you see?
hiku0800.119: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You can cram your happy{\n}festival, you big meanie!
hiku0800.125: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}I don’t know how it works{\n}either, so don’t ask me, okay?
hiku0800.128: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}I don’t even rightly know{\n}how this rig flies, either!
hiku0800.132: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}You want to keep her safe, correct?
hiku0800.135: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}If she continues this{\n}fool pilgrimage, she will die!
hiku0800.136: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Sure as if you killed her yourself.
hiku0800.137: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}No harebrained law or teaching can{\n}send my little niece to her death!
hiku0800.141: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}And I’ll take down{\n}anyone who don’t agree!
hiku0800.150: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s there,{\n}so we go and get her!
hiku0800.160: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Some of the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} that attacked{\n}{MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} must have snuck on board.
hiku0800.164: {TIME:00}{PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}But destroy the ship and{\n}all go down together!
hiku0800.167: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}If you crash the ship,{\n}we can’t go rescue {MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}!
hiku0800.171: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}{PC:06:RIKKU}, you’ve made some{\n}very good friends, I think.
hiku0800.176: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Now that’s what I call a plan!
hiku0800.178: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Believe it, son!{\n}They’ve done it! It is happening!
hiku0800.180: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s going to come back, isn’t it?
hiku0800.183: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}No!{\n}We have to beat the guy inside {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
hiku0800.184: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s would be{\n}out of a job if it was this easy.
hiku0800.185: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But it has weakened.{\n}I’m sure of it.
hiku0800.187: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}All right, I’ll do what{\n}I can with the main gun!
hiku0800.216: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
hiku0800.218: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
hiku0800.13: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Thus, you have a link...{\n}a bond with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
hiku0800.19: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Didn’t we take care{\n}of him in Macalania?
hiku0800.21: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}His attachment to this world{\n}kept him from the next.
hiku0800.23: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} must be trying to send him.
hiku0800.188: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Hey, guys!{\n}I just had a great idea!
hiku0800.189: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}It was my idea.{\n}Let me tell them!
hiku0800.195: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Sir {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} likes the{\n}Hymn of the Fayth, correct?
hiku0800.197: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}That’s why he was{\n}listening to it in Macalania!
hiku0800.199: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I know it’s your old man, and{\n}I don’t mean no disrespect, but...
hiku0800.203: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If we attack {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} head-on,{\n}we’ve little chance of winning.
hiku0800.204: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}However, if he hears the Hymn{\n}of the Fayth, he will become docile.
hiku0800.205: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Yeah, and that’s when{\n}we make our move!
hiku0800.206: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Might be against the rules and all,{\n}but who’s keeping track, ya?
hiku0800.210: {TIME:00}Talk to {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"} to open the {CLR:YELLOW}NavMap{CLR:WHITE}.{\n}Pick a destination, and you’re there!

mcfr0000.85: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mcfr0000.87: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mcfr0000.10: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well then, why don’t we{\n}do something about it?
mcfr0000.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I just don’t get it!{\n}Doesn’t she trust us?
mcfr0000.15: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}She doesn’t want us caught up{\n}in whatever it is she’s planning.
mcfr0000.17: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But that makes me worry even more.
mcfr0000.20: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}She’s naive, serious to a fault,{\n}and doesn’t ask for help.
mcfr0000.31: {\n}It was just her duty--something she had{\n}to do before returning to her pilgrimage.
mcfr0000.34: {\n}I realized that {PC:01:YUNA} and{\n}I’d never... You know...
mcfr0000.36: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}, it is good to see{\n}you made it through safely.
mcfr0000.37: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}And, if I may,{\n}congratulations on your betrothal.
mcfr0000.41: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}You should hurry to the temple in Macalania.
mcfr0000.42: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}This isn’t the way to the temple!
mcfr0000.46: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}When our assignment here is done{\n}we will be heading north.
mcfr0000.47: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Hopefully we’ll catch some{\n}chocobos and rebuild our unit.
mcfr0000.48: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}But I must say...{\n}it’s been a while.
mcfr0000.49: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Maybe too long since{\n}we’ve had anything to celebrate.
mcfr0000.50: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}We’re on watch duty at the temple{\n}at least until the wedding’s done.
mcfr0000.51: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Anyone tries to crash our party,{\n}we’ll send ’em packing!
mcfr0000.53: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Stop and say hi{\n}if you’ve got the time.
mcfr0000.54: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Next time you see us, we’ll be the{\n}proud Chocobo Knights once again!
mcfr0000.57: {\n}It’s too dangerous to walk to{\n}{CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl2D:"Macalania Temple"}{CLR:WHITE} without my dad.
mcfr0000.58: {\n}Are you a guardian?{\n}Keep up the good work.
mcfr0000.60: {\n}I guess you could say{\n}he is like my guardian.
mcfr0000.62: {\n}I leave Lady {PC:01:YUNA} in your hands{\n}until you are through these woods.
mcfr0000.63: {\n}I’m supposed to meet my dad{\n}here, but he’s late!
mcfr0000.64: {\n}Oh, no. Maybe he forgot{\n}where we’re supposed to meet...
mcfr0000.65: {\n}My dad forgets a lot of things.
mcfr0000.66: {\n}I’m supposed to meet my husband here,{\n}but he hasn’t shown up for the longest time.
mcfr0000.68: {\n}He’s so forgetful. Maybe he’s just{\n}forgotten our meeting place.
mcfr0000.69: {\n}I was reunited with my wife{\n}thanks to all of you.
mcfr0000.70: {\n}But now my boy’s missing.{\n}He went into the woods alone.
mcfr0000.73: {\n}But my son went off into the{\n}woods before my husband came.

znkd0500.13: Fayth{\n}But that wasn’t the first time we met.
znkd0500.14: Fayth{\n}I’ve known about you for a long time.{\n}A long, long time.
znkd0500.15: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I...I feel like I know you, too.
znkd0500.25: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t have time to be{\n}dreaming now!
znkd0500.27: Fayth{\n}It’s not that you’re dreaming.{\n}You are a dream.
znkd0500.29: Fayth{\n}You really don’t remember?{\n}Does this ring any bells?

bika0100.48: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
bika0100.49: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
bika0100.50: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
bika0100.52: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}H{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}N{CLR:WHITE} ]
bika0100.58: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bika0100.60: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
bika0100.0: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} First Aid Kit{CLR:WHITE}{\n}A first aid kit placed by the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}{\n}to aid desert travelers.
bika0100.11: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}There’s something I wanna tell you,{\n}but promise not to say anything.
bika0100.13: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I know where we are.{\n}We’re on Bikanel Island.
bika0100.14: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}There’s a place us {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}call {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} near here.
bika0100.18: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What does it matter{\n}as long as she’s safe?
bika0100.20: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Anyway, I will take you{\n}there if you promise...
bika0100.21: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}that you won’t tell anyone about it.
bika0100.23: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You know they don’t like us {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
bika0100.24: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Who knows what they’ll do if they knew?
bika0100.25: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Gimme a break.{\n}What are you accusing {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} of this time?
bika0100.26: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} did something{\n}really bad to us before.
bika0100.29: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Just promise you won’t tell{\n}anyone about this island. Promise?

guad0300.21: {\n}Good traveler, prithee forgive us{\n}our antiquated prattling.
guad0300.23: {\n}The youth laugh upon us as stale old{\n}relics who live too much in the past.
guad0300.26: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} detests the old tongue.{\n}It shames us.
guad0300.30: {\n}They say Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} discovered{\n}his gift for summoning as a mere child.
guad0300.32: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} is a great teacher.{\n}He explains everything quite clearly.
guad0300.34: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} marries into the {MCR:s06l50:"Guado"} tribe,{\n}we will all welcome her warmly.
guad0300.38: {\n}It’s just what old folks do, I guess.{\n}Please, take no offense.
guad0300.41: {\n}I want to return the favor by giving{\n}them a performance to remember.

ptkl1600.4: {\n}The village may have recovered, but{\n}people’s hearts are still heavy.
ptkl1600.6: {\n}I’m sure that our song reached{\n}the people on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
ptkl1600.8: {\n}What were the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s trying{\n}to prove? I just don’t get it.
ptkl1600.10: {\n}I pray each day for a future where my{\n}grandchildren can sleep in peace.
ptkl1600.12: {\n}Well, now. I forgot{\n}what I was up to.

bsyt0001.0: {\n}It was then, standing in that place.
bsyt0001.1: {\n}I began to realize how different{\n}this world was from my own.
bsyt0001.2: {\n}Ten years have passed since{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} became high summoner.
bsyt0001.3: {\n}And finally we receive{\n}a statue for our temple.
bsyt0001.5: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I...I got too close to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s, uh, toxin.
bsyt0001.12: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsyt0001.13: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsyt0001.15: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsyt0001.17: {\n}Don’t bother people when they’re{\n}praying! It’s against the teachings!
bsyt0001.18: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsyt0001.19: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsyt0001.20: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.

luca0400.5: {\n}I couldn’t get any tickets, so I was{\n}watching the game on that sphere.
luca0400.6: {\n}I was lucky to miss the fiends.
luca0400.7: {\n}I was lucky. That’s all I can say.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}!
luca0400.8: {\n}I’d like to recruit as many as{\n}possible and rebuild the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
luca0400.10: {\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} is full of fiends.{\n}Who knows when or where they’ll strike?
luca0400.15: {\n}The high summoner’s daughter would never{\n}turn traitor. The temple must be mistaken.
luca0400.16: {\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} is getting married?{\n}Aww, what a shame.
luca0400.17: {\n}There are warrior monks everywhere{\n}you look. I think it’s an occupation!
luca0400.18: {\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s aeon was really something,{\n}wasn’t it? I’ve never seen anything like it!
luca0400.19: {\n}I’d like to believe that a maester of{\n}such power could keep {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} peaceful.
luca0400.33: {\n}When the flying ship came by,{\n}we raised our glasses and sang.
luca0400.37: {\n}Hey, you’re an {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} player,{\n}aren’t you? You were great today!
luca0400.38: {\n}You ended a twenty-three-year losing streak.{\n}I never thought it would happen. What a miracle!
luca0400.39: {\n}Even though you didn’t win, it was{\n}a good game. Keep up the good work.
luca0400.41: {\n}We should hold a {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} tournament{\n}to aid Yevon in this time of crisis.
luca0400.43: {\n}So shall we start a {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} tournament{\n}to console the defeated {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s?
luca0400.44: {\n}The tournament’s finally over.{\n}Gimme some peace, will you?
luca0400.45: {\n}It’s terrible. The fiends attacked{\n}while His Holiness was here.
luca0400.48: {\n}I heard that the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} razed the{\n}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}’s hometown. That’s horrible!
luca0400.50: {\n}Seems that summoners are{\n}disappearing from all over Spira, huh?
luca0400.55: {\n}We have to repair the stadium{\n}now because of the fiends.
luca0400.62: {\n}The temple is a wreck.{\n}I really want to quit the warrior monks.
luca0400.63: {\n}Then join the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!{\n}We’d love to have you join our force.
luca0400.64: {\n}With {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"} a failure,{\n}it’s over for the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s...
luca0400.65: {\n}Then do you wanna become a warrior monk?{\n}I’ll introduce you to our leader.
luca0400.66: {\n}What? We disobeyed the{\n}teachings, but it’s still okay?
luca0400.67: {\n}Hey, we all help each other{\n}out in a time of need, right?
luca0400.68: {\n}The fiends were the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}’s doing!{\n}They’re out to get the temples!
luca0400.69: {\n}What’re you saying?{\n}You know the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} use machina!
luca0400.71: {\n}The fiends were the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ doing!{\n}They’re out to sabotage the tournament!
luca0400.82: {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} so small can’t see{\n}{MCR:s06l14:"Yenke"} and {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}’s faces.
luca0400.91: {\n}Take it outside!{\n}The tournament’s starting, you hear?
luca0400.94: {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}{\n}to participate in this great contest{\n}of bravery, skill, and strength.
luca0400.96: {\n}You’re a good player,{\n}but still need some work.
luca0400.97: {\n}If you want to get your hands on that{\n}thing, you’ll have to win more games.
luca0400.99: {\n}Now, as long as you bring it to me,{\n}I’ll present you with our heirloom.
luca0400.101: {\n}Hey, you have it, right?{\n}Lemme see it for a second.
luca0400.103: {\n}Aw, too bad! If it had enough,{\n}I would’ve given you our heirloom.
luca0400.104: {\n}This is the legendary ball{\n}of Lord {MCR:s06l38:"High Summoner Ohalland"}.
luca0400.106: {\n}I beg of you, carry on the spirit{\n}of Lord {MCR:s06l38:"High Summoner Ohalland"}.
luca0400.60: {\n}Hello! Blitzball players{\n}are welcome here any time!

bjyt1200.1: {\n}So you know.{\n}Yet still you seek my aid?
bjyt1200.2: {\n}My son... Do you not hate him?
bjyt1200.4: {\n}He is the one who sowed the{\n}seeds of hatred. He is to blame.
bjyt1200.5: {\n}But I am at fault for letting{\n}him become what he was.
bjyt1200.8: {\n}Come, summoner.{\n}I will bestow you with my power:
bjyt1200.11: {\n}Though it is small recompense{\n}for what I did to him.

bsyt0000.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Why don’t you go in and help?
bsyt0000.12: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}There’s already guardians in there.{\n}Besides, it’s forbidden.
bsyt0000.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, but what if somethin’ happens?{\n}What if the summoner dies!?
bsyt0000.16: {\n}Maybe this wasn’t such a good idea{\n}after all.
bsyt0000.18: {\n}And here I was thinking summoners{\n}were all old geezers.
bsyt0000.19: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsyt0000.20: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsyt0000.21: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsyt0000.22: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsyt0000.24: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsyt0000.27: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsyt0000.28: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsyt0000.29: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsyt0000.30: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsyt0000.31: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsyt0000.32: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsyt0000.35: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsyt0000.37: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsyt0000.38: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsyt0000.39: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsyt0000.40: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsyt0000.41: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsyt0000.43: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsyt0000.44: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsyt0000.47: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsyt0000.48: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsyt0000.49: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsyt0000.50: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsyt0000.54: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsyt0000.55: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsyt0000.56: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsyt0000.57: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsyt0000.58: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsyt0000.59: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsyt0000.60: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsyt0000.61: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsyt0000.62: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsyt0000.63: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsyt0000.65: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsyt0000.66: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsyt0000.67: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsyt0000.68: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsyt0000.69: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsyt0000.71: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsyt0000.72: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsyt0000.73: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsyt0000.75: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsyt0000.76: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsyt0000.77: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsyt0000.78: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsyt0000.85: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsyt0000.87: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsyt0000.90: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsyt0000.96: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsyt0000.97: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsyt0000.99: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsyt0000.103: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsyt0000.105: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsyt0000.106: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsyt0000.107: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsyt0000.110: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsyt0000.111: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsyt0000.113: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsyt0000.114: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsyt0000.115: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsyt0000.118: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsyt0000.119: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsyt0000.121: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsyt0000.122: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsyt0000.124: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsyt0000.126: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsyt0000.127: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsyt0000.128: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsyt0000.129: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsyt0000.130: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsyt0000.133: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsyt0000.134: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsyt0000.135: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsyt0000.136: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsyt0000.138: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsyt0000.139: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsyt0000.141: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsyt0000.142: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsyt0000.143: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsyt0000.144: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsyt0000.145: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsyt0000.146: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsyt0000.147: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsyt0000.148: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsyt0000.151: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsyt0000.152: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsyt0000.155: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsyt0000.156: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsyt0000.159: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsyt0000.160: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsyt0000.163: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsyt0000.172: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsyt0000.173: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsyt0000.175: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsyt0000.177: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsyt0000.178: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsyt0000.179: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsyt0000.180: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsyt0000.182: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsyt0000.184: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsyt0000.185: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsyt0000.186: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsyt0000.187: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsyt0000.189: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsyt0000.190: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsyt0000.191: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsyt0000.196: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsyt0000.197: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsyt0000.199: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsyt0000.201: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsyt0000.202: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsyt0000.203: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsyt0000.204: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsyt0000.205: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsyt0000.207: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsyt0000.208: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsyt0000.210: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsyt0000.211: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsyt0000.213: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsyt0000.215: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsyt0000.216: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsyt0000.217: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsyt0000.220: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsyt0000.223: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsyt0000.224: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsyt0000.225: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsyt0000.228: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsyt0000.231: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsyt0000.232: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsyt0000.234: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsyt0000.237: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsyt0000.239: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsyt0000.241: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsyt0000.244: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsyt0000.245: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsyt0000.247: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsyt0000.248: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsyt0000.249: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsyt0000.251: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsyt0000.252: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsyt0000.253: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsyt0000.256: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsyt0000.258: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsyt0000.259: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsyt0000.261: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsyt0000.262: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsyt0000.266: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsyt0000.268: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsyt0000.272: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsyt0000.274: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsyt0000.275: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsyt0000.276: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsyt0000.278: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsyt0000.280: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsyt0000.283: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsyt0000.284: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsyt0000.285: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsyt0000.288: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsyt0000.289: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsyt0000.290: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsyt0000.292: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsyt0000.294: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsyt0000.295: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsyt0000.296: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsyt0000.298: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsyt0000.300: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsyt0000.301: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsyt0000.303: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsyt0000.304: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsyt0000.305: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

mihn0600.92: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Help him look for them.{\n}{CHOICE:01}I’ve got better things to do.
mihn0600.93: {\n}There aren’t many guards{\n}beyond here, so watch it.
mihn0600.102: {\n}I guess the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are the{\n}only ones we can really count on.
mihn0600.104: {\n}Maybe there is a way for the people of{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} and the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} to get along.
mihn0600.105: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Don’t worry about it.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Tell me about the operation.
mihn0600.109: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Let me ride one!{\n}{CHOICE:01}I’ll walk.{\n}{CHOICE:02}How do you ride a chocobo?
mihn0600.118: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mihn0600.120: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mihn0600.0: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}How many times do I have{\n}to tell you? I’m a summoner!
mihn0600.5: {\n}I’m sorry, I can’t let you pass.
mihn0600.6: {\n}I know it’s a pain, but{\n}I can’t let you pass, okay?
mihn0600.7: {\n}Come on! We’re trying to{\n}rid the world of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} here!
mihn0600.9: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}As you can see, not{\n}even summoners can pass.
mihn0600.10: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}But they’ll call on us in{\n}the end. Just wait and see.
mihn0600.11: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}In the meantime,{\n}I think I’ll have a nap.
mihn0600.13: {\n}The Mushroom Rock Road is off-limits to non-{\n}Crusader personnel until the end of the mission!
mihn0600.14: {\n}We apologize for the inconvenience,{\n}but this road is closed!
mihn0600.15: {\n}Any donation towards {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}would be greatly appreciated!
mihn0600.16: {\n}Thank you for your generosity!{\n}Here, you should have this.
mihn0600.20: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Support units are in place.{\n}Mounted units have finished all exercises.
mihn0600.22: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Just a few stragglers--{\n}nothing to worry about, sir.
mihn0600.29: {\n}Hey, you’re a summoner and her guardians,{\n}right? Sorry for the inconvenience.
mihn0600.34: {\n}We’re going to lure it into a trap!
mihn0600.35: {\n}This mission, {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"},{\n}is a Crusader-{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} joint mission.
mihn0600.36: {\n}We {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s lure {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} in,{\n}and the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} strike it down.
mihn0600.37: {\n}You see, {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} hate{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} as much as we do.
mihn0600.39: {\n}They say they’re as powerful{\n}as the mighty aeons.
mihn0600.41: {\n}Ah...on second thought, let’s not{\n}go there. Better for you not to know.
mihn0600.43: {\n}My own family won’t{\n}even speak to me now.
mihn0600.45: {\n}Otherwise, there’s nowhere for us to go.
mihn0600.48: {\n}Good to have you with us.{\n}Go on through!
mihn0600.50: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Wait around. We’ll have{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} beaten in no time!
mihn0600.51: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Captain {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"} and {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}should have been here by now.
mihn0600.53: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}You have to leave your chocobos here.
mihn0600.57: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}You look troubled.{\n}Is there anything I can do?
mihn0600.60: {\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}. Let me show{\n}you to the command center.
mihn0600.65: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Do not worry. I will{\n}take full responsibility.
mihn0600.72: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}He’s a maester.{\n}Better get used to it, ya?
mihn0600.75: {\n}Do you want to ride a chocobo?
mihn0600.77: {\n}Do you want me to teach you{\n}how to ride a chocobo?
mihn0600.79: {\n}The operation’s gonna start soon.{\n}All civilians must leave.
mihn0600.80: {\n}Then {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s gonna eat you!{\n}Mom said {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} eats bad people.
mihn0600.81: {\n}The operation’s gonna start soon.{\n}All civilians must leave!
mihn0600.86: {\n}A great maester is here, too, so{\n}we’re gonna work really hard!
mihn0600.87: {\n}We are securing the Highroad{\n}under {MCR:s06l2D:"Maester Kinoc"}’s orders.
mihn0600.89: {\n}Sooner or later, we warrior monks{\n}will crush the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}.

omeg0000.2: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}a monk who defied the{\n}teachings was sentenced here.
omeg0000.4: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Omega’s loathing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}has turned him into a fiend.
omeg0000.5: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}They say he liked it{\n}underground, out of the light.
omeg0000.12: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}What, so the main man’s still around?
omeg0000.14: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}When we meet, I will send it.

nagi0400.5: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The summoner I guarded{\n}on my first pilgrimage...
nagi0400.9: {\n}Yet, our numbers have greatly diminished.{PAUSE}{\n}Is there nothing we can do now?
nagi0400.11: {\n}Once we complete our training here,{\n}we plan to resume fiend hunting.
nagi0400.13: {\n}We aren’t getting enough new recruits{\n}to rebuild the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
nagi0400.17: {\n}My family is against it, but I’ve{\n}decided to fight as a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}.
nagi0400.19: {\n}The warrior monks are a pack of cowards{\n}hiding within the walls of {MCR:s0Dl34:"St. Bevelle"}.

dome0500.6: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I think I kinda knew.{\n}It was {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"}, wasn’t it?
dome0500.9: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I came back here...{\n}tried to avenge them.
dome0500.11: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Somehow I made my way,{\n}crawling, down Mount Gagazet.
dome0500.13: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I told him about {PC:01:YUNA}...{\n}just before I died.
dome0500.14: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I’ve been wandering ever since,{\n}never going to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
dome0500.16: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Don’t make that face.{\n}Being dead has its advantages.
dome0500.17: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I was able to ride {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}and go to your {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.
dome0500.18: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And you’ve been watching over{\n}me since then, haven’t you?
dome0500.21: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It is one of those things{\n}that is difficult to explain.
dome0500.24: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Can I ask you one last favor?
dome0500.31: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}He needs someone there{\n}to hold his hand, see?
dome0500.33: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But how am I supposed{\n}to go to {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}?
dome0500.35: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}There must be a way to{\n}get there, right? You’ll find it.
dome0500.38: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I’ll take care of your son.{\n}I’ll guard him with my life.
dome0500.40: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}You were always such a stiff,{\n}but that’s what I liked about you.

zkrn0300.1: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I am the summoner {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}I have come from the island of {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
zkrn0300.2: {\n}Your eyes, my dear. Show me the{\n}long road you have traveled.
zkrn0300.8: {\n}Go to her now, and bring{\n}your guardians with you. Go.

kamm0300.3: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}What do you see there, my lord?
kamm0300.12: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}What I am about to tell{\n}you is the unclouded truth.
kamm0300.13: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I swear it on my honor{\n}as a {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}.
kamm0300.15: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}His mind is closed even to{\n}me, a maester of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
kamm0300.16: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}But I can feel flames of{\n}darkness burning in his heart.
kamm0300.17: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}He is using {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"},{\n}and even the summoners.
kamm0300.18: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}If he is not stopped, he will surely bring{\n}destruction and chaos to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
kamm0300.19: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I will leave this world soon,{\n}killed by my own son.
kamm0300.21: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}Because I was not wise enough,{\n}he has suffered, and become twisted.
kamm0300.22: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I could not protect him and his mother{\n}from the world and its cruelty.
kamm0300.23: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I will accept death as{\n}punishment for my deeds.
kamm0300.25: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I implore you to stop {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}!{\n}Stop my son.

maca0100.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}There is a saying:{\n}”hurry up and wait.”
maca0100.8: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It means, prepare quickly so{\n}you’re ready for whatever comes next.
maca0100.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Sounds like something{\n}an old man would say.
maca0100.12: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Can we go now?{\n}I’m tired of waiting!
maca0100.14: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Sitting here like this,{\n}you really get to thinking.
maca0100.17: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}A wedding’s not supposed{\n}to make people feel this bad, huh?
maca0100.20: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I say what I want,{\n}ever since I was a kid!
maca0100.23: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Anyways... How long we supposed{\n}to stay here, you think?
maca0100.25: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Things’ve sure gotten complicated{\n}since Sir {PC:02:AURON} joined us.
maca0100.29: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}It is great news.{\n}I’d like to congratulate her.
maca0100.31: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}I’d hoped Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would defeat{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} and bring the {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"} to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
maca0100.32: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s still gonna journey,{\n}even after she’s married.
maca0100.33: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}That is also great news!{\n}Her resolve is admirable!
maca0100.36: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Lake Macalania is frozen{\n}over all through the year.
maca0100.37: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}It stays frozen even{\n}on the hottest of days.
maca0100.41: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Hopefully I can be{\n}present at the wedding.
maca0100.42: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}It is not every day that one{\n}can attend such a joyous event.
maca0100.44: {\n}Could the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} be celebrating the{\n}wedding, too? It’s hard to believe.
maca0100.46: {\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s wedding is so soon!{\n}I’m so excited I can hardly sleep!
maca0100.47: {\n}Could it be true that Lady {PC:01:YUNA} is a{\n}traitor? Oh, I hope not...
maca0100.49: {\n}The way things are these days, even{\n}this store isn’t safe from attack.
maca0100.51: {\n}You look an awful lot like those traitors.{\n}Take care you don’t get mistaken for them!
maca0100.53: {\n}I too can fight!{\n}Yet I am treated like an infant!
maca0100.54: {\n}They say that {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} has fallen on {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.{\n}All the {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} folk are in a panic!
maca0100.56: {\n}Now we must all employ two tongues,{\n}as do Master {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} and {PC:06:RIKKU}.
maca0100.57: {\n}Outside, I felt the white sand with{\n}my hand and it became most cold!
maca0100.58: {\n}Could this be the snow?{\n}It is my first time seeing it!
maca0100.59: {\n}When I sang the song outside,{\n}my breath--it became most white!
maca0100.60: {\n}He is so weak to the cold, he just sits{\n}there and misses all there is to see!
maca0100.61: {\n}I was playing at sliding on the ice,{\n}and I almost fell into a big hole!
maca0100.62: {\n}Our new {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} we should build here!{\n}Then we can have snow fun every day!
maca0100.63: {TIME:00}{\n}Welcome to the {MCR:s0Dl2B:"Lake Macalania"} branch of{\n}{MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}’s Travel Agency, now Spira-wide!

kami0200.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}What do you think you’re up to?
kami0200.16: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}She’ll tell us when she’s ready,{\n}so hold your chocobos till then, ya?
kami0200.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The sphere is his will...{\n}It says, ”Take care of my son.”
kami0200.10: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well, I know one way{\n}to take care of him.

lchb0400.2: {\n}Seems to have been put to sleep.
lchb0400.3: {\n}{CLR:BLUE}Dock number 3{CLR:WHITE} lies straight ahead.{\n}{CLR:BLUE}Dock number 5{CLR:WHITE} lies in the opposite direction.
lchb0400.4: {\n}The sphere monitor makes our{\n}job a lot easier.
lchb0400.19: {\n}The {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} grow stronger each day.{\n}One day, we will beat the {MCR:s06l45:"Luca Goers"}.
lchb0400.20: {\n}Best of luck to the {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"}.{\n}The {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} will be waiting.
lchb0400.21: {\n}If {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} win, our brothers{\n}on the Farplane will rejoice.
lchb0400.22: {\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} are pious race. But still,{\n}we respect {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ courage.
lchb0400.23: {\n}We swore victory on our horns and lost.{\n}We cannot go home until we win the cup.
lchb0400.26: {\n}Many {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} return home to mountain.{\n}But {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} will stay in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.
lchb0400.27: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s stand strong once more.{\n}We admire their fortitude.
lchb0400.28: {\n}{MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} want to play more{\n}teams to hone blitz skills.
lchb0400.29: {\n}{MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are true warriors.{\n}{MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} deserve mighty horns.
lchb0400.30: {\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} are pious race.{\n}But cannot trust temple now.
lchb0400.32: {\n}The honorable warrior tribe {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}{\n}fight enemies fair and square.
lchb0400.33: {\n}No longer can temple help us.{\n}Must protect {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} on our own.
lchb0400.34: {\n}When warrior monks protect stadium,{\n}fiends have no chance of breaking in.
lchb0400.35: {\n}{MCR:s06l52:"Ronso"} are strong, but{\n}winning takes more than strength.
lchb0400.38: {\n}I may be enjoying the game, but I’m keeping{\n}watch, too. Everything’s okay here!
lchb0400.39: {\n}I’m still in training, so I’m watching{\n}the game on the sphere.
lchb0400.40: {\n}A flying ship, huh?{\n}What will they think of next?
lchb0400.41: {\n}Everybody loves blitz!{\n}Even the warrior monks love it!
lchb0400.42: {\n}The port is full of excitement, too!{\n}We’ve gotta beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}! We’ve just got to!
lchb0400.66: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
lchb0400.68: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
lchb0400.54: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, aren’t you being{\n}just a little unfair?
lchb0400.57: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You’re the one who told{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA} that, right, {PC:05:LULU}?
lchb0400.58: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And I don’t think {PC:04:WAKKA} would{\n}ever try to take {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}’s pl--

slik0000.132: {\n}That’s right. I knew I was right.{\n}He doesn’t know what he’s talking about!
slik0000.133: {\n}You men are all alike!{\n}Get away from me!
slik0000.135: {\n}It makes me so mad.{\n}I’m not going inside anymore!
slik0000.137: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}I’d say they’re related.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Looks like they’re married.
slik0000.0: Datto{\n}Victory! Victory! We’re taking home{\n}that cup, no matter what it takes, ya?
slik0000.5: Letty{\n}Should I practice kick passes too?
slik0000.7: Letty{\n}Okay, I’ll pretend I’m{\n}kicking with my hands!
slik0000.9: Letty{\n}I’m gonna sharpen my hand skills!
slik0000.10: Jassu{\n}I’m so tired of practicing passes.{\n}I wanna do some shooting, too!
slik0000.14: {\n}No way. Remember what{\n}you did last time?
slik0000.17: {\n}If anyone can defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}the daughter of Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} can!
slik0000.19: Letty{\n}Man, I wish we were{\n}half as popular as {PC:01:YUNA}.
slik0000.20: Jassu{\n}Hey, don’t let it get to you.{\n}It’s the same as always, ya?
slik0000.21: {\n}Can I have a sphere taken with you?{\n}Or maybe just an autograph?
slik0000.22: Datto{\n}Someday we’ll earn some{\n}respect, just like {PC:01:YUNA}.
slik0000.23: {\n}A summoner’s confident smile is{\n}always a great encouragement to us.
slik0000.28: {\n}Just watch what your big{\n}sis is doing and learn!
slik0000.29: {\n}How long do you think you’ve been{\n}doing that? Stop it right now!
slik0000.30: {\n}Okay, okay. I see it, so can you{\n}just calm down for a change?
slik0000.33: {\n}Oh, all right, all right.{\n}Happy, happy! Goody, goody!
slik0000.34: {\n}Why are we so quiet,{\n}all of a sudden?
slik0000.37: {\n}Wow! I just saw a real flying ship!{\n}I thought I was dreaming again!
slik0000.42: {\n}I pray that the elders of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}can keep peace in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
slik0000.44: {\n}Ships aren’t supposed to fly!{\n}It’s frightened my precious dogs!
slik0000.45: {\n}Hey, you. You were on the ship{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} attacked us, right?
slik0000.47: {\n}I should probably find a{\n}new job on land somewhere.
slik0000.48: {\n}They put me on watch duty, since{\n}I can’t handle my old post anymore.
slik0000.56: {\n}Well, it’ll probably be a long time{\n}before I’m sent to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}, though.
slik0000.58: {\n}Every story you hear{\n}lately is so depressing.
slik0000.62: {\n}Once little kids learn something fun,{\n}they just repeat it over and over.
slik0000.63: {\n}The kids found a new way to play.{\n}They’ll never be merchants now!
slik0000.66: {\n}Just watching those two{\n}made me a little envious.
slik0000.68: {\n}The people of {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} refused{\n}to tell them anything.
slik0000.70: {\n}All we can do now is{\n}pray for {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} to go away.
slik0000.71: {\n}My husband used to be a pro{\n}blitzer, and I was his goalie.
slik0000.72: {\n}Whether in a tournament or in{\n}life, we’re the best partners.
slik0000.76: {\n}I was one of those young blitzers once...{\n}I’ll leave the rest up to your imagination!
slik0000.82: {\n}Thank god for that flying ship.{\n}Now that’s the blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}!
slik0000.83: {\n}Go ahead and rest down below.{\n}We’ll be there by the time you wake up.
slik0000.88: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}’s daughter?{\n}She just might have a chance!
slik0000.92: {\n}Well then, we pray for{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s safe passage!
slik0000.93: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Come to think of it, I haven’t{\n}told you where we’re going!
slik0000.94: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}First to {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}{CLR:WHITE} Island, then we{\n}change boats and head for Luca.
slik0000.95: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}’Fore that, though, {PC:01:YUNA}’s gotta{\n}pray at the temple. I’ll be guarding.
slik0000.96: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We’ll be praying for the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}’{\n}victory, too, so you come along, ya?
slik0000.103: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s the heir to a great legacy!
slik0000.107: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Oh yeah, you talk to {PC:01:YUNA} yet?{\n}She had some questions for you.
slik0000.108: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I don’t know who you are,{\n}or where you came from.
slik0000.109: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}If you interfere with {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}pilgrimage, we won’t take it lightly.
slik0000.113: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}{MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"} was upset with me,{\n}but Captain {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"} understood.
slik0000.114: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Now, I’m working as a{\n}chocobo breeder on this ship.
slik0000.115: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I really, really love{\n}taking care of chocobos!
slik0000.116: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Being with chocobos all the time...{\n}I think I’ve found my calling!
slik0000.117: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}And it’s all thanks{\n}to you! Thank you!
slik0000.120: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I found this in one of the{\n}chocobo nests the other day.
slik0000.121: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}It’s no use to me, so{\n}I want you to have it.
slik0000.122: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}Ah, I have to go now.{\n}It’s time for lunch.
slik0000.123: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, I want to talk to you some more.{\n}Can’t your stomach wait?
slik0000.124: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}I meant I have to feed the chocobos.
slik0000.125: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}They get really upset{\n}if they’re not fed!

djyt0700.18: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Quite the show, ya?{\n}Not so good on the heart, though.
djyt0700.19: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}You grow stronger,{\n}but are still a pup.
djyt0700.22: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You should try to settle down.{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} will be blamed if anything happens.
djyt0700.23: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Now we wait.{\n}This is also a guardian’s duty.
djyt0700.24: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}We’ve got places to go.{\n}We can’t be kept waiting like this.
djyt0700.25: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}How much longer? She sure{\n}is taking her sweet time.
djyt0700.1: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Still traveling with{\n}quite the crowd, I see.
djyt0700.8: {MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}{\n}Thank you, sir!{\n}This means so much to me!
djyt0700.14: {MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}{\n}I swear, I’ll never{\n}wash this hand again!
djyt0700.15: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Please! Touch me with that{\n}hand and I’ll remove it!

hiku1900.14: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Man, we must have hit{\n}that thing enough by now!
hiku1900.15: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We been through a lot, ya?{\n}And hey, we’re not finished yet!
hiku1900.16: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}All {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s rooting for us!{\n}Let’s not let them down, ya?
hiku1900.17: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}And to think, if you hadn’t come{\n}floating out of the sea that day.
hiku1900.31: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Pop’s machina always seem to{\n}break when you need them most.
hiku1900.32: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Sometimes, when I got a lot on{\n}my mind, it just helps to go ”Aaaaa!”
hiku1900.33: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Once the Calm starts, we’ll take{\n}the {MCR:s06l58:"airship"} to your {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}!
hiku1900.34: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Just a feeling, but I think{\n}my dad kinda likes you.
hiku1900.36: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Better watch out! Next time,{\n}it might be you we kidnap!
hiku1900.38: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I’d like to meet {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}before he fades away.
hiku1900.39: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}When this is over, I will leave.{\n}I have played at life too long.
hiku1900.42: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I planned to stay there,{\n}watching over you.
hiku1900.43: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} attacked {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}{\n}that day, I changed my mind.
hiku1900.45: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He wanted you to{\n}have a shot at life.
hiku1900.48: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I think it’s a little{\n}early to start celebrating.
hiku1900.49: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You’ve proven yourself as a guardian.{\n}Maybe even as the best.
hiku1900.50: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You know, your meeting{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} was really quite...
hiku1900.52: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}When this is all over, maybe we{\n}can talk more. Just the two of us.
hiku1900.53: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}No matter what happens, I’ll see{\n}this through to the end. I promise.
hiku1900.60: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You don’t have to smile,{\n}if it’s too tough.
hiku1900.61: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I’ve been able to smile through{\n}all of this, because of you.
hiku1900.64: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}The song! It is not working on {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
hiku1900.66: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}You go into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} once more, eh?{\n}Leave it to me!
hiku1900.67: {MCR:s06l2B:"Brother"}{\n}We will fly anywhere{\n}you want to go!
hiku1900.69: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Believe it, son! They’ve{\n}done it! It is happening!
hiku1900.71: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s going to come back, isn’t it?
hiku1900.74: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}No!{\n}We have to beat the guy inside {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
hiku1900.75: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s would be{\n}out of a job if it was this easy.
hiku1900.76: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But it has weakened.{\n}I’m sure of it.
hiku1900.78: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}All right, I’ll do what{\n}I can with the main gun!
hiku1900.84: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
hiku1900.86: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
hiku1900.1: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Well, son, the main gun is still busted!{\n}We can’t give you any cover fire!
hiku1900.2: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, just take us in.{\n}We’ll do the rest.
hiku1900.4: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Take us up, flush to the mouth!
hiku1900.5: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}No mistakes, or I’m gonna{\n}tear out that mop you call hair!
hiku1900.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Our fathers’ wishes...{\n}Let’s make them come true!
hiku1900.11: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Time to show them{\n}what we’re made of, ya?

kino0600.0: {\n}I have no idea what I was thinking{\n}when I ran after {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} that day.
kino0600.2: {\n}Maybe I was angry,{\n}maybe I wanted to go home.
kino0600.3: {\n}I kept thinking of {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"},{\n}and my old man.

azit0300.37: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}I{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}U{CLR:WHITE} ]

azit0300.40: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
azit0300.41: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
azit0300.42: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
azit0300.43: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
azit0300.44: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
azit0300.45: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
azit0300.46: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
